english_verse: Some of the teachers of the Law of Moses were Pharisees, and they saw Jesus eating with sinners and tax collectors. So they asked his disciples, “Why does he eat with tax collectors and sinners?”
translation_verse: Na Farisifoɔ he mu atwerɛfoɔ he huu sɛ ɔne atogyefoɔ ne nnebɔnyɛfoɔ oodidi he, bebisaa n’asuafoɔ he sɛ, “Mmɛ nti ne ɔne atogyefoɔ ne nnebɔnyɛfoɔ didi yi?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The friends of a bridegroom don't go without eating while he is still with them.

english_verse: But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.
translation_verse: Nso nna bi bɛba a bɛbɛfa ayefokunu he afiri bɛ nkyɛne, na afei bɛbɛkyene kɔm.

english_verse: No one patches old clothes by sewing on a piece of new cloth. The new piece would shrink and tear a bigger hole.
translation_verse: “Bɛmmfa ntoma mono sini ntɛ ataadeɛ dada mu; anyɛ saa a, ntemu he bɛte afiri mu, kyerɛ sɛ, ntemu mono he befiri dada he mu, na nteɛ he bɛyɛ kɛse paa.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined. New wine must be put into new wineskins. A Question about the Sabbath (Matthew
translation_verse: Saa ara nso ne bɛmmfa bobesa foforɔ nngu nsakotokuo dada mu, anyɛ saa a, nsa foforɔ he bɛpae kotokuo he na nsa he ahwie agu, na kotokuo he nso bɛsɛe; na mmom bɛde bobesa foforɔ gu nsakotokuo foforɔ mu.” Homeda He Ho Asɛnka

english_verse: One Sabbath Jesus and his disciples were walking through some wheat fields. His disciples were picking grains of wheat as they went along.
translation_verse: Na ɔbaa sɛ homeda bi na Yesu nam aburofuo bi mu, na bɛɛkɔ he, n’asuafoɔ he hyɛɛ aseɛ pempanee aburo mmɛtem he bi.

english_verse: Some Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do that!”
translation_verse: Yei maa Farisifoɔ he bisaa no sɛ, “Hwɛ, mmɛ nti ne bɛɛyɔ deɛ otia mmara homeda?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Haven't you read what David did when he and his followers were hungry and in need?
translation_verse: Na obisaa bɛ sɛ, “Honnkenkanee deɛ Dawid yɔeɛ berɛ a na kɔm de ɔne ne nkurofoɔ na bɛɛpɛ aduane adi he?

english_verse: So the Son of Man is Lord over the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: nti Nipa Ba he yɛ homeda he so tumfoɔ.”

english_verse: He even had to tell his disciples to get a boat ready to keep him from being crushed by the crowds.

english_verse: The Pharisees wanted to accuse Jesus of doing something wrong, and they kept watching to see if Jesus would heal him on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Na bɛhwɛɛ sɛ ɔbɛsa no yadeɛ homeda he anaa, na bɛde abu no fɔ.

translation_verse: Na ɔde abufuo hwɛɛ bɛ nyinaa hyiaeɛ; na ne werɛ hoeɛ bɛ akoma dene he nti, na ɔka kyerɛɛ beema he sɛ, “Tene wo nsa.” Ɔteneeɛ, na ahoɔdene baa ne nsa he mu bio.

english_verse: Jesus led his disciples down to the shore of the lake. Large crowds followed him from Galilee, Judea,

translation_verse: Nnipa dummienu bɛ he ne: Simon ,

english_verse: and to force out demons.

translation_verse: Sebedeo ba Yakubu ɔne Yohane a ɔyɛ Yakubu nua ;

translation_verse: Na atwerɛfoɔ he a befiri Yerusalem baeɛ he kaa sɛ, “Ɔwɔ Beelsebul, na ɔde ahonhommɔne panyini he tumidie ne tutu ahonhom fi.”

translation_verse: Na nnipa atwa ne ho ahyia; na bɛka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Hwɛ, wo maame ne wo nua mmeema ne wo nua mmaa gyina abɔntene a bɛɛfrɛ wo.”

translation_verse: Na ɔfrɛɛ bɛ baa ne nkyɛne na ɔyɔɔ saa mfantoho yi kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na Satan atutu Satan?

english_verse: Jesus went back home, and once again such a large crowd gathered that there was no chance even to eat.
translation_verse: na nnipadɔm he sane behyiaa mu a na bennya aduane mpo nni.

english_verse: A nation whose people fight each other won't last very long.
translation_verse: Sɛ ahennie bi ne ne ho di asie a, ahennie he ntumi nnyina.

english_verse: And a family that fights won't last long either.
translation_verse: Na sɛ mpaepaemu ya fie bi mu a, saa fie he ntumi nnyina.

english_verse: So if Satan fights against himself, that will be the end of him.
translation_verse: Na sɛ Satan asɔre atia ne ho na ne mu akyekyɛ a, ontumi nnyina, na mmom n’awieeɛ ne aba.

translation_verse: Na bi ntumi nkɔ ahoɔdenfoɔ fie nkɔfom ne nnoɔma gye sɛ waakyekyere ahoɔdenfoɔ he, ansa na wafom fie hɔ nnoɔma.

english_verse: I promise you that any of the sinful things you say or do can be forgiven, no matter how terrible those things are.
translation_verse: Nɔkorɛ, meeka akyerɛ ho sɛ, ɔde nipa bɔne ne abususɛm biaa a ɔbɛka bɛkyɛ no,

english_verse: But if you speak against the Holy Spirit, you can never be forgiven. That sin will be held against you forever.
translation_verse: nso deɛ ɔka abususɛm tia Honhom Kronkron he deɛ onnya bɔne fakyɛ, na daa afobuo da ne so.”

english_verse: Jesus said this because the people were saying that he had an evil spirit in him. Jesus' Mother and Brothers (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɔkaa yei sɛ efiri sɛ na bɛɛkeka sɛ, “Ɔwɔ honhom fi.” Yesu Abusua kann

english_verse: Jesus' mother and brothers came and stood outside. Then they sent someone with a message for him to come out to them.
translation_verse: Na afei Yesu maame ne ne nuanom baeɛ, na begyinaa abɔntene somaa sɛ bɛnkɔfrɛ no mmara.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
translation_verse: Na obuaa sɛ, “Me maame ne me nuanom ne hefoɔ?”

english_verse: Then he looked at the people sitting around him and said, “Here are my mother and my brothers.
translation_verse: Na ɔhwɛɛ bɛ a bɛtete ne nkyɛne he kaa sɛ, “Yeinom ne me maame ne me nuanom.

english_verse: Anyone who obeys God is my brother or sister or mother.”
translation_verse: Nea ɔyɔ Nyankopɔn apɛdeɛ biaa yɛ me nua beema ne me nua baa ne me maame.”

english_verse: The next time Jesus taught beside Lake Galilee, a big crowd gathered. It was so large that he had to sit in a boat out on the lake, while the people stood on the shore.
translation_verse: Na afei nso, Yesu hyɛɛ aseɛ maa nkyerɛkyerɛ po he ho. Nnipadɔm betwaa ne ho hyiaeɛ ma ɔkɔforoo kodoɔ bi po he so na ɔtenaa mu, berɛ a na nnipadɔm he tete po he ano.

english_verse: While the farmer was scattering the seed, some of it fell along the road and was eaten by birds.
translation_verse: Na oogu he, aba he bi koguu kwane nkyɛne, na nnomaa bediiɛ.

english_verse: He used stories to teach them many things, and this is part of what he taught:
translation_verse: Ɔhyɛɛ aseɛ de mfantoho kyerɛkyerɛɛ bɛ nnoɔma pii, ne nkyerɛkyerɛ he mu he, ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ,

english_verse: Other seeds fell on thin, rocky ground and quickly started growing because the soil wasn't very deep.
translation_verse: Aba he bi nso koguu abotane so, baabi a nɛteɛ nni papa, esiane sɛ nɛteɛ he mu nnɔ nti ofifirii ntɛm.

english_verse: But when the sun came up, the plants were scorched and dried up, because they did not have deep roots.
translation_verse: Na awia bɔeɛ he, ɔhyee no; na ɔnam sɛ onni nhini nti otwintwameeɛ.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked out the plants. So they did not produce any grain.
translation_verse: Na aba he bi koguu nkasɛem, na nkasɛe he nyiniiɛ he, omiaa no, na anso aba biaa.

english_verse: Finally, Jesus said: What is God's kingdom like? What story can I use to explain it?
translation_verse: Ɔkaa bio sɛ, “Mmɛ ne yebetumi de atoto Nyankopɔn ahennie he ho, anaa mmɛ mfantoho ne yɛbɛyɔ afa ahennie he ho?

english_verse: When Jesus was alone with the twelve apostles and some others, they asked him about these stories.
translation_verse: Berɛ a Yesu nkoaa ya hɔ he, bɛ a na bɛya ne nkyɛne he ne n’asuafoɔ dummienu he bisaa no mfantoho he ho asɛm.

english_verse: But they don't have roots, and they don't last very long. As soon as life gets hard or the message gets them in trouble, they give up.
translation_verse: Nso ɔnam sɛ benni nhini nti, begyina kakra bi, na sɛ haw anaa taa ba bɛ so ɔnam asɛm he nti a, bɛhwe ase ntɛm so.

english_verse: The reason is, “These people will look and look, but never see. They will listen and listen, but never understand. If they did, they would turn to God and be forgiven.” Jesus Explains the Story about the Farmer (Matthew
translation_verse: sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a, ‘bɛbɛhwɛ paa deɛ nso benhu, na bɛatie paa nso bɛnte aseɛ; na bɛansakra annya bɔne fakyɛ.’ ”

english_verse: The seeds that fell along the road are the people who hear the message. But Satan soon comes and snatches it away from them.
translation_verse: Na aba a oguu kwane nkyɛne he gyina hɔ ma nnipa a bɛte asɛm he a, ɔnkyerɛ na Satan abeyi asɛm a bɛagu ne bɛ mu he kɔ.

english_verse: The seeds that fell on good ground are the people who hear and welcome the message. They produce
translation_verse: Na nea beguu no asaase pa mu he gyina hɔ ma nnipa a bɛte asɛm he a bɛgye na bɛsõ aba mmɔho aduasa ne aduosia ne mmɔho ha.” Kanea a ɔhyɛ Atam Ase

english_verse: Jesus also said: You don't light a lamp and put it under a clay pot or under a bed. Don't you put a lamp on a lampstand?

english_verse: Listen carefully to what you hear! The way you treat others will be the way you will be treated—and even worse.

translation_verse: Na Yohane asuafoɔ he tee asɛm he, bɛba bɛfaa n’amu he na bɛkɔpɛɛ no koraberɛ bodane bi mu. Yesu maa Nnipa Mpem Nnum Aduane

translation_verse: Na bɛtenaa akuo akuo, ha ha ne aduonum aduonum.

translation_verse: Na biaa didi mmeeɛ.

translation_verse: Berɛ a Yesu huu sɛ nnipadɔm bi abom de mmirika ɔɔba he, ɔkaa honhom he anim, ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Wo honhom a womma abeemaa yi ntumi nkasa, na ɔnte asɛm, mehyɛ wo sɛ, firi ne mu firi kɔ, na mankɔhyɛ ne mu bio.”

english_verse: The spirit screamed and made the boy shake all over. Then it went out of him. The boy looked dead, and almost everyone said he was.

translation_verse: Ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Sɛ ɔnyɛ mpaebɔ ne [akɔnkyena] a, bibiaa nni hɔ a obetumi atutu no.” Yesu sane hyɛɛ ne Wuo ne ne Sɔreeɛ ho Nkɔm

translation_verse: efiri sɛ ná ɔɔkyerɛkyerɛ n’asuafoɔ he sɛ, “Bebeyi Nipa Ba he ama de no ahyɛ nnipa nsa, na bebeku no, na nnansa akyi he waasɔre bio.”

translation_verse: Afei bɛbaa Kapernaum; na ɔya fie he, obisaa bɛ sɛ, “Mmɛ ne ná hoogye ho akyinnye berɛ a ná yɛnam kwane so he?”

translation_verse: Nso bɛyɛɛ komm, efiri sɛ, bɛnam kwane so ɔɔba he bɛgyee bɛ ho bɛ ho akyinnye faa nea ɔyɛ kɛseɛ paa ho.

translation_verse: Ɔtenaa ase, frɛɛ dummienu he ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Nea ɔpɛ sɛ ɔyɛ kannifoɔ he, ɔsɛ sɛ ɔto ne ho mpan, na ɔnsom biaa.”

english_verse: Everyone must be salted with fire.
translation_verse: “Na gya ne bɛde bɛhyɛ biaa nkyene.

english_verse: Salt is good. But if it no longer tastes like salt, how can it be made salty again? Have salt among you and live at peace with each other.
translation_verse: Nkyene yɛ; nso sɛ nkyene dɛ firi mu a, wobɛyɛ dɛ ahyɛ no nkyene? Honnya nkyene ho mu, na ho ne ho ho ntena asomdwie mu.”

english_verse: John said, “Teacher, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But he wasn't one of us, and we told him to stop.”
translation_verse: Yohane ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ, yehuu sɛ bi de wo dini ootu ahonhommɔne, na yɛbɔɔ mmɔdene sɛ yebesi no kwane, efiri sɛ ɔnnka yɛ ho.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: Don't stop him! No one who works miracles in my name will soon turn and say something bad about me.
translation_verse: Nso Yesu kaa sɛ, “Honnsi no kwane; na biaa nni hɔ a ɔyɔ tumidwuma me dini mu a ɔno akyi heaa obetumi aka me ho asɛm bɔne.

english_verse: Anyone who isn't against us is for us.
translation_verse: Nea ɔnko ntia yɛ he ya yɛ afa.

translation_verse: “Sɛ ho mu bi to nkumaa yi a bɛgye me di yi mu baako sintidua a, afanyinam sɛ bɛde boɔ keseɛ paa ato no kɔno mu, na bɛato mo atwene po mu.

translation_verse: na sɛ baa he nso gyae ne kunu na ɔware foforɔ a wasɛe awareɛ.” Yesu hyiraa Mmɔfra Nketewa

translation_verse: Obisaa bɛ sɛ, “Mmɛ ne Mose hyɛɛ ho?”

english_verse: They answered, “Moses allows a man to write out divorce papers and send his wife away.”
translation_verse: Bɛkaa sɛ, “Mose maa ho kwane sɛ betumi twerɛ awaregyaeɛ krataa de gyae baa he.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Moses gave you this law because you are so heartless.
translation_verse: Nso Yesu ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Ho akoma pirim nti ne ɔtwerɛɛ saa ahyɛdeɛ yi maa ho.

english_verse: But in the beginning God made a man and a woman.
translation_verse: Na ofiri adebɔ mfitiaseɛ he, ‘Nyankopɔn yɔɔ beema ne baa.’

translation_verse: ‘Yei nti, beema begya n’agya ne ne na hɔ, na ɔne ne yerɛ aka abom,

translation_verse: na bɛ mmienu he ayɛ honam baako.’ Ɔba saa a bɛnna so nyɛ mmienu, na mmom bɛyɛ honam baako.

english_verse: And no one should separate a couple that God has joined together.”
translation_verse: Nti nea Nyankopɔn aka abom he, mma nipa biaa ntetem.”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were back in the house, they asked him about what he had said.
translation_verse: Afei bɛ ya fie he, asuafoɔ he bisaa yei ho asɛm bio.

translation_verse: Ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Sɛ bi gyae ne yerɛ, na ɔware foforɔ a, na wasɛe awareɛ ɔnam baa he a ogyae no he nti;

translation_verse: Na nnipa bebree de mmɔfra nketewa ɔɔbra no sɛ ɔde ne nsa bɛka bɛ; na asuafoɔ he kaa bɛ anim dendenndene.

english_verse: Jesus looked closely at the man. He liked him and said, “There's one thing you still need to do. Go sell everything you own. Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come with me.”
translation_verse: Na Yesu hwɛɛ no he, ɔdɔɔ no, na ɔkaa sɛ, “Aaka wo adeɛ baako; kɔ, kɔtɔno nea wowɔ, na fa sika he ma ahiafoɔ, na wobenya agyapadeɛ soro; na afei bra bedi m’akyi.”

english_verse: When the man heard Jesus say this, he went away gloomy and sad because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Ɔtee yei he, ne ho dwirii no, na ɔde awerɛhoɔ kɔeɛ, efiri sɛ, na ɔwɔ ahonyadeɛ pii.

english_verse: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, “It's hard for rich people to get into God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Na Yesu too n’ani hwɛɛ nnipa a na bɛya hɔ he, ɔka kyerɛɛ n’asuafoɔ he sɛ, “Hwɛ dene a ɔbɛyɛ ama adefoɔ sɛ bɛbɛkɔ Nyankopɔn ahennie he mu!”

english_verse: The disciples were shocked to hear this. So Jesus told them again, “It's terribly hard to get into God's kingdom!
translation_verse: Na nsɛm yi haa asuafoɔ he adwene. Nso Yesu ka kyerɛɛ bɛ bio sɛ, “Mmɔfra, honhwɛ dene a ɔyɛ sɛ bi bɛkɔ Nyankopɔn ahennie he mu!

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Ɔmmerɛ ma yoma sɛ obewura paneɛ tokuro mu sene sɛ sikani bɛkɔ Nyankopɔn ahennie mu.”

translation_verse: Ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Mmɛ ne hopɛ sɛ meyɔ ma ho?”

translation_verse: na Nipa Ba he amma sɛ bɛnsom no, na mmom ɔbɛsomeeɛ, na ɔde ne nkwa ayɛ agyedeɛ ama nnipa bebree.” Nifirani Bartimeo Ayaresa

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to Jericho. And as they were leaving, they were followed by a large crowd. A blind beggar by the name of Bartimaeus son of Timaeus was sitting beside the road.

english_verse: Many people told the man to stop, but he shouted even louder, “Son of David, have pity on me!”

translation_verse: Na owuraa Yerusalem, na ɔkɔɔ asɔrefie hɔ; na ɔhwɛɛ nnoɔma a ɔya hɔ he nyinaa hyiaeɛ he, na adeɛ asa nti ɔne dummienu he kɔɔ Betania.

translation_verse: Ɔka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Wonnso aba bio na bi anya bi adi.” Na n’asuafoɔ he teeɛ. Yesu dwiraa asɔredane he mu

translation_verse: Yesu buaa bɛ sɛ, “Honnya gyidie Nyankopɔn mu.

translation_verse: Afei bɛbaa Yerusalem. Na ɔkɔɔ asɔrefie hɔ na ɔhyɛɛ aseɛ pamoo bɛ a bɛɛtɔno ne bɛ a bɛɛtɔ nnoɔma asɔrefie hɔ, na ɔdanee sika sesafoɔ apono, ɔne bɛ a bɛtɔno mmorɔnoma he nkonnwa butubutuiɛ.

translation_verse: Nti meeka akyerɛ ho, nea hobebisa no mpaebɔ mu biaa, honnye nni sɛ hoanya na ɔbɛyɛ ho deɛ.”

translation_verse: [Na sɛ hoamfa ankyɛ a, ho Agya a ɔya soro nso mfa ho mfomsoɔ nkyɛ ho.] Bebisaa Yesu Tumi a ɔde yɔ Nsɛnkyerɛnne ho Asɛm

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joseph were watching and saw where the body was placed.

english_verse: Later, Jesus appeared in another form to two disciples, as they were on their way out of the city.
translation_verse: Yei akyi he, Yesu yii ne ho adi tebea foforɔ mu kyerɛɛ bemu mmienu, berɛ a na bɛnam ɔɔkɔ kuro he mu.

english_verse: Then the disciples left and preached everywhere. The Lord was with them, and the miracles they worked proved that their message was true. ANOTHER OLD ENDING TO MARK'S GOSPEL
translation_verse: Na bɛkɔɔ abɔntene kɔbɔɔ asɛm he dawuro baabiaa, na Awurade de bɛ yɔɔ adwuma na ɔde nsɛnkyerɛnne a odi akyire hyɛɛ asɛm he dene.]

english_verse: She left and told his friends, who were crying and mourning.
translation_verse: Nti ɔkɔ kɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ a na bɛ ne no ya hɔ he, berɛ a na beesu di awerɛhoɔ he.

english_verse: Very early on Sunday morning, just as the sun was coming up, they went to the tomb.
translation_verse: Na nnawɔtwe da a odi kane anɔpatutuutu he, berɛ na awia oopieɛ he, bɛkɔɔ nna he so.

english_verse: On their way, they were asking one another, “Who will roll the stone away from the entrance for us?”
translation_verse: Na bebisabisaa bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, “Hwane ne bemini boɔ he afiri nna he so ama yɛ?”

english_verse: The women went into the tomb, and on the right side they saw a young man in a white robe sitting there. They were alarmed.
translation_verse: Beewura nna he mu he, behuu abeemaa bi a ɔhyɛ ataadeɛ tentene fitaa te nifa so hɔ, na bɛ akoma tuiɛ.

english_verse: Now go and tell his disciples, and especially Peter, that he will go ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there, just as he told you.”
translation_verse: Na honkɔ, nkɔka nkyerɛ n’asuafoɔ ne Petro sɛ oodi ho anim kane Galilea, hɔ ne ho behu no, sɛdeɛ ɔka kyerɛɛ ho he.”

english_verse: They will handle snakes and will drink poison and not be hurt. They will also heal sick people by placing their hands on them. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Bɛde bɛ nsa bɛfa awɔ, na sɛ bɛnom awuduro mpo a, ɔnyɔ bɛ hwee, bɛde bɛ nsa begu ayarefoɔ so, na bebenya ayaresa.” Yesu Soro kɔ (Luka

english_verse: But when these disciples told what had happened, the others would not believe either. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Na bɛsane kɔɔ kuro he mu kɔka kyerɛɛ nkaeɛ he, nso bɛangye anni. Yesu maa Asuafoɔ he Ahyɛdeɛ (Luka

english_verse: Anyone who believes me and is baptized will be saved. But anyone who refuses to believe me will be condemned.
translation_verse: Nea ɔbɛgye adi na hobɛbɔ no asu he benya nkwa, na nea wannye anni he bebebu no fɔ.

english_verse: After the Lord Jesus had said these things to the disciples, he was taken back up to heaven where he sat down at the right side of God.
translation_verse: Na afei Awurade Yesu ne bɛ kasa wieeɛ he, Nyankopɔn maa no so kɔɔ soro kɔtenaa ne nsa nifa so.

english_verse: Afterwards, Jesus appeared to his eleven disciples as they were eating. He scolded them because they were too stubborn to believe the ones who had seen him after he had been raised to life.
translation_verse: Akyire yi oyii ne ho kyerɛɛ dubaako he berɛ a na bɛte adidi pono ho, na ɔkaa bɛ anim ɔnam gye a bɛannye anni ne bakoma dene nti, efiri sɛ bɛannye bɛ a bɛka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ waasɔre he anni.

english_verse: Then he told them: Go and preach the good news to everyone in the world.
translation_verse: Na ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Honkɔ wiase nkɔbɔ asɛmpa he dawuro nkyerɛ abɔdeɛ nyinaa.

english_verse: Everyone who believes me will be able to do wonderful things. By using my name they will force out demons, and they will speak new languages.
translation_verse: Na nsɛnkyerɛnne yeinom bedi bɛ a bɛbɛgye adi he akyi, bɛde me dini betutu ahonhommɔne, bɛbɛka kasa foforɔ.

english_verse: Many people have tried to tell the story of what God has done among us.
translation_verse: Esiane sɛ nnipa bebree afa ato bɛ ho so sɛ bɛbɛkyerɛ nsɛm a abam yɛ ntam he nnidisoɔ nnidisoɔ,

english_verse: They wrote what we had been told by the ones who were there in the beginning and saw what happened.
translation_verse: sɛnea bɛ a befiri mfitiaseɛ de bɛ ani huiɛ na bɛyɛɛ asɛm he ho asomfoɔ he de abra yɛ he nti,

english_verse: So I made a careful study of everything and then decided to write and tell you exactly what took place. Honorable Theophilus,
translation_verse: Nimuonyamfoɔ Teofilo, me nso maabɔ me tim pɔ sɛ nea meaa mahwehwɛ mu defedefe firi ahyɛaseɛ he, meetwerɛ no nnidisoɔ nnidisoɔ de ama wo,

english_verse: I have done this to let you know the truth about what you have heard. An Angel Tells about the Birth of John
translation_verse: na woahu nɔkorɛ a ɔfa nnoɔma a bɛakyerɛkyerɛ wo he ho. Suboni Yohane awofoɔ

english_verse: When Herod was king of Judea, there was a priest by the name of Zechariah from the priestly group of Abijah. His wife Elizabeth was from the family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Yudea hene Herode berɛ so he, na sɔfo bi ya hɔ a bɛfrɛ no Sakaria a ofiri Abia asɔfokuo he mu, na ne yerɛ yɛ Aaron mma mmaa he mu baako a ne dini de Elisabet.

english_verse: Both of them were good people and pleased the Lord God by obeying all that he had commanded.
translation_verse: Na bɛ mmienu nyinaa tene Nyankopɔn anim di Awurade mmara ne n’atemmudeɛ ne n’atenenedeɛ nyinaa so pɛpɛɛpɛ a asɛm biaa nni bɛ ho.

english_verse: But they did not have children. Elizabeth could not have any, and both Zechariah and Elizabeth were already old.
translation_verse: Na benni ba, efiri sɛ, na Elisabet yɛ bonyini, na bɛ mmienu nyinaa nso anyinyini paa. Suboni Yohane awoɔ ho nkɔmhyɛ

english_verse: One day Zechariah's group of priests were on duty, and he was serving God as a priest.
translation_verse: Berɛ a oduruu Sakaria asɔfokuo so sɛ bɛne bɛyɔ asɔfodwuma he, na Sakaria ɔɔyɔ n’asɔfodwuma Nyankopɔn anim he,

english_verse: According to the custom of the priests, he had been chosen to go into the Lord's temple that day and to burn incense,
translation_verse: na sɛnea asɔfodwuma ho amanneɛ teɛ he, bɛtwee ntonto yii no sɛ ɔno ne nkɔ Awurade kronkronbea hɔ nkɔhye aduhwam.

english_verse: All at once an angel from the Lord appeared to Zechariah at the right side of the altar.
translation_verse: Awurade bɔfoɔ begyinaa aduhwam afɔrebokyia he nifa yii ne ho adi kyerɛɛ no.

english_verse: Zechariah was confused and afraid when he saw the angel.
translation_verse: Berɛ a Sakaria huu no he, ne ho yeraa no na ɔbɔɔ hu.

english_verse: But the angel told him: Don't be afraid, Zechariah! God has heard your prayers. Your wife Elizabeth will have a son, and you must name him John.
translation_verse: Nso bɔfoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ. “Nsuro, Sakaria, efiri sɛ bɛatie w’adesrɛ, na wo yerɛ Elisabet bɛwo babeema ama wo, na woato ne dini Yohane.

english_verse: His birth will make you very happy, and many people will be glad.
translation_verse: W’ani bɛgye na woadi ahurusie, na nnipa pii hobɛsɛpɛ bɛ, ɔnam n’awoɔ he nti;

english_verse: Your son will be a great servant of the Lord. He must never drink wine or beer, and the power of the Holy Spirit will be with him from the time he is born.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, ɔbɛyɛ kɛseɛ Awurade anim. Nso ɔnsɛ sɛ ɔnom bobesa ne nsãdene biaa, na Honhom Kronkron bɛhyɛ no mã firi ne maame yam;

english_verse: John will lead many people in Israel to turn back to the Lord their God.
translation_verse: na ɔbɛdane Israel mma pii asane aba Awurade bɛ Nyankopɔn nkyɛne.

english_verse: He will go ahead of the Lord with the same power and spirit that Elijah had. And because of John, parents will be more thoughtful of their children. And people who now disobey God will begin to think as they ought to. This is how John will get people ready for the Lord.
translation_verse: Na ɔde Elia honhom ne tumi bedi Awurade anim na wadane agyanom akoma aba bɛ mma so asoɔdenfoɔ akɔ teneneefoɔ adwene ho, na wasiesie mane he ama Awurade.”

english_verse: Zechariah said to the angel, “How will I know this is going to happen? My wife and I are both very old.”
translation_verse: Afei Sakaria bisaa bɔfoɔ he sɛ. “Maabɔ akɔkora na me yerɛ nso mfie kɔ animu paa. Afei ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na nea wooka yi abam?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “I am Gabriel, God's servant, and I was sent to tell you this good news.
translation_verse: Bɔfoɔ he buaa no sɛ, “Mene Gabriel, Nyankopɔn somfo a wasoma me sɛ me ne wo mmɛkasa na menka nnoɔma yi ho asɛmpa nkyerɛ wo.

english_verse: You have not believed what I have said. So you will not be able to say a thing until all this happens. But everything will take place when it is supposed to.”
translation_verse: Hwɛ! Wobɛtɔre mum, wontumi nkasa kosi da a yeinom bɛba mu, efiri sɛ, woannye me nsɛm a ɔbɛba mu berɛ a bɛahyɛ mu he anni.”

english_verse: The crowd was waiting for Zechariah and kept wondering why he was staying in the temple so long.
translation_verse: Saa berɛ he nyinaa na nkurofoɔ he ɔɔtwɛne Sakaria, na ɔyɛɛ bɛ nwanwa sɛ wakyɛre kronkronbea hɔ saa.

english_verse: When he did come out, he could not speak, and they knew he had seen a vision. He motioned to them with his hands, but did not say a thing.
translation_verse: Nso ɔbaeɛ he wantumi ne bɛ ankasa, na behuu sɛ wakohu bibi kronkronbea hɔ, na ɔde ni ti ne ne nsa yɔɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne kyerɛɛ bɛ efiri sɛ wantumi ankasa.

english_verse: When Zechariah's time of service in the temple was over, he went home.
translation_verse: Afei nna a Sakaria de ɔɔsom he baa awieeɛ he, ofirii hɔ kɔɔ ne fie.

english_verse: Soon after this, his wife was expecting a baby, and for five months she did not leave the house. She said to herself,
translation_verse: Nna yi akyi he, ne yerɛ Elisabet nyinsɛneeɛ; na ɔde ne ho siee abosome nnum, na ɔkaa sɛ:

english_verse: “What the Lord has done for me will keep people from looking down on me.” An Angel Tells about the Birth of Jesus
translation_verse: “Yei ne kwane a Awurade afa so ne me adi berɛ a wabɛhwɛ me sɛ oobeyi m’ahohora nnipa anim afiri hɔ he mu.” Yesu awoɔ ho nkɔmhyɛ

english_verse: One month later God sent the angel Gabriel to the town of Nazareth in Galilee
translation_verse: Na Elisabet anyinsɛne mu bosome a ɔtoɔ so nsia he, Nyankopɔn somaa bɔfoɔ Gabriel kɔɔ Galilea kuro a bɛfrɛ no Nasaret mu,

english_verse: with a message for a virgin named Mary. She was engaged to Joseph from the family of King David.
translation_verse: babunu bi a bɛde no ama beema bi a bɛfrɛ no Yosef a ofiri Dawid fie asiwa he nkyɛne; na babunu he dini ne Maria.

english_verse: The angel greeted Mary and said, “You are truly blessed! The Lord is with you.”
translation_verse: Ɔkɔɔ ne nkyɛne he, ɔkyea no kaa sɛ, “Asomdwie nka wo, wo a bɛadom wo, Awurade ka wo ho.”

english_verse: Mary was confused by the angel's words and wondered what they meant.
translation_verse: Na asɛm he maa Maria ho dwirii no yie, na ɔdwendwenee ho sɛ, “Mmɛ nkyea di?”

english_verse: Then the angel told Mary, “Don't be afraid! God is pleased with you,
translation_verse: Nti bɔfoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ: “Nsuro Maria, na woanya Nyankopɔn anim adom;

english_verse: and you will have a son. His name will be Jesus.
translation_verse: na hwɛ, wobenyinsɛne na woawo babeema, na woato no dini Yesu.

english_verse: He will be great and will be called the Son of God Most High. The Lord God will make him king, as his ancestor David was.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne bɛyɛ kɛse, na bɛbɛfrɛ no Sorosoroni he Ba; na Awurade Nyankopɔn de n’agya Dawid ahennwa bɛma no,

english_verse: He will rule the people of Israel forever, and his kingdom will never end.”
translation_verse: na obedi Yakob fie so hene afebɔɔ, na n’ahennie ɔmma awieeɛ da.”

english_verse: Mary asked the angel, “How can this happen? I am not even married!”
translation_verse: Maria bisaa bɔfoɔ he sɛ, “Ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na yei aba mu berɛ a me ne beema nnaa da?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “The Holy Spirit will come down to you, and God's power will come over you. So your child will be called the holy Son of God.
translation_verse: Afei bɔfoɔ he buaa no sɛ, “Honhom Kronkron bɛba wo so, na Sorosoroni he tumi bɛkata wo so. Yei nti ne bɛbɛfrɛ nea wobɛwo no he Kronkron, Nyankopɔn Ba.

english_verse: Your relative Elizabeth is also going to have a son, even though she is old. No one thought she could ever have a baby, but in three months she will have a son.
translation_verse: Hwɛ! Wo busuani Elisabet nso anyinsɛne babeema ne mmerewaberɛ mu, na ɔno a bɛfrɛ no bonyini he anyinsɛne bosome nsia di;

english_verse: Mary said, “I am the Lord's servant! Let it happen as you have said.” And the angel left her. Mary Visits Elizabeth
translation_verse: Afei Maria kaa sɛ. “Hwɛ! Meyɛ Awurade afenaa! Ɔmmra mu sɛdeɛ waka he.” Na bɔfoɔ he firii ne nkyɛne kɔeɛ. Maria kɔsraa Elisabet

english_verse: A short time later Mary hurried to a town in the hill country of Judea.
translation_verse: Afei Maria sɔree saa nna he mu de ahoɔhare kɔɔ Yuda kuro bi a ɔda bepɔ so mu,

english_verse: She went into Zechariah's home, where she greeted Elizabeth.
translation_verse: ɔkɔɔ Sakaria fie, na ɔkyeaa Elisabet.

english_verse: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, her baby moved within her. The Holy Spirit came upon Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Na Elisabet tee Maria nkyea heaa pɛ, akokoa a ɔhyɛ ne yafunu mu he huruiɛ; na Honhom Kronkron hyɛɛ Elisabet mã,

english_verse: Then in a loud voice she said to Mary: God has blessed you more than any other woman! He has also blessed the child you will have.
translation_verse: na ɔde nne kɛseɛ teaam sɛ, “Bɛahyira wo mmaa nyinaa mu, na bɛahyira wo yafunu mu aba!

english_verse: Why should the mother of my Lord come to me?
translation_verse: Mmɛ akwannya ne manya sɛ m’Awurade maame aba me nkyɛne yi?

english_verse: As soon as I heard your greeting, my baby became happy and moved within me.
translation_verse: Hwɛ! Wo nkyea twaa m’asomaa pɛ ne akokoa a ɔya me yam he de anigyeɛ kɛseɛ huruiɛ.

english_verse: The Lord has blessed you because you believed that he will keep his promise. Mary's Song of Praise
translation_verse: Na nhyira nso ne nea wagye adi, efiri sɛ nea ofiri Awurade hɔ a bɛabɛka akyerɛ no he biaa bɛyɛ hɔ.”

english_verse: Mary said: With all my heart I praise the Lord,
translation_verse: Maria kaa sɛ. “Me kra kamfo Awurade,

english_verse: and I am glad because of God my Savior.
translation_verse: na m’Agyenkwa Nyankopɔn ho ne me honhom di ahurusie;

english_verse: God cares for me, his humble servant. From now on, all people will say God has blessed me.
translation_verse: Efiri sɛ waahwɛ n’afenaa hianiwaa. Nɔkorɛ, efiri nnɛ ɔɔkɔ yi, awoɔ ntoatoasoɔ nyinaa bɛfrɛ me nhyira;

english_verse: God All-Powerful has done great things for me, and his name is holy.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Nea ɔwɔ tumi he ayɔ adeɛ kɛseɛ ama me, na ne dini ne Kronkron;

english_verse: He always shows mercy to everyone who worships him.
translation_verse: efiri awoɔ ntoatoasoɔ so kosi awoɔ ntoatoasoɔ so he, ohu bɛ a besuro no he mmɔbɔ.

english_verse: The Lord has used his powerful arm to scatter those who are proud.
translation_verse: Ɔde ne basa ayɔ ahoɔdenneɛ, waabɔ bɛ a bedi ahantansɛm bɛ akomam apansam:

english_verse: God drags strong rulers from their thrones and puts humble people in places of power.
translation_verse: Waatu atumfoɔ afiri bɛ nhennwa so na waama mmɔborɔfoɔ so;

english_verse: God gives the hungry good things to eat, and sends the rich away with nothing.
translation_verse: waama nnepa amee bɛ a kɔm de bɛ na waama bɛ a bɛwɔ ahodeɛ de nsapan kɔ.

english_verse: God helps his servant Israel and is always merciful to his people.
translation_verse: Wabɛhwɛ n’akoa Israel, na wakaeɛ ne mmɔborɔhunu

english_verse: The Lord made this promise to our ancestors, to Abraham and his family forever!
translation_verse: daa sɛnea ɔka kyerɛɛ yɛ agyanom, Abraham ne n’asefoɔ he.”

english_verse: Mary stayed with Elizabeth about three months. Then she went back home. The Birth of John the Baptist
translation_verse: Na Maria tenaa ne nkyɛne bɛyɛ abosome mmeɛnsa, na ɔsane kɔɔ ne fie. Suboni Yohane awoɔ

english_verse: When Elizabeth's son was born,
translation_verse: Na Elisabet awoɔ duruu so he, ɔwoo babeema.

english_verse: her neighbors and relatives heard how kind the Lord had been to her, and they too were glad.
translation_verse: Na mpɔtamu hɔfoɔ ne n’abusuafoɔ tee sɛ Awurade mmɔborɔhunu adɔɔso ne so he, bɛ ne no dii ahurusie.

english_verse: Eight days later they did for the child what the Law of Moses commands. They were going to name him Zechariah, after his father.
translation_verse: Na da a ɔtɔ so nwɔtwe he, bɛbaa sɛ beebetwa abɔfra kumaa he twetia, na nka bɛde no ɔɔto ne papa Sakaria.

english_verse: But Elizabeth said, “No! His name is John.”
translation_verse: Nso ne maame kaa sɛ, “Daabi! Bɛbɛfrɛ no Yohane.”

english_verse: The people argued, “No one in your family has ever been named John.”
translation_verse: Afei bɛka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Biaa nni w’abusua mu a ne dini de saa.”

english_verse: So they motioned to Zechariah to find out what he wanted to name his son.
translation_verse: Nti bɛde nsɛnkyerɛnne bisaa ne papa sɛnea ɔpɛ sɛ bɛfrɛ no.

english_verse: Zechariah asked for a writing tablet. Then he wrote, “His name is John.” Everyone was amazed.
translation_verse: Afei ɔgyee boɔ twerɛ-pono twerɛɛ so sɛ, “Ne dini ne Yohane.” Na ɔyɛɛ bɛ nyinaa nwanwa.

english_verse: At once, Zechariah started speaking and praising God.
translation_verse: Mpofirem hɔaa Sakaria ano bieeɛ na ne kɛtrɛma saneeɛ na ofirii aseɛ kasaeɛ, na ohyiraa Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: All the neighbors were frightened because of what had happened, and everywhere in the hill country people kept talking about these things.
translation_verse: Hu kaa bɛ a bɛte mpɔtamu hɔ nyinaa; na befirii aseɛ kaa yeinom nyinaa ho asɛm Yudea nkuro a ɔdeda mmepɔ so he nyinaa mu,

english_verse: Everyone who heard about this wondered what this child would grow up to be. They knew the Lord was with him. Zechariah Praises the Lord
translation_verse: na bɛ a bɛteeɛ nyinaa de siee bɛ akoma mu, na bebisaa sɛ, “Ɛɛne koraa ne abɔfra kumaa yi bɛyɔ?” Nea nti a bɛkaa saa ne sɛ, na bennim sɛ Awurade nsa ya abɔfra he so ampa. Sakaria nhyira dwom

english_verse: The Holy Spirit came upon Zechariah, and he began to speak:
translation_verse: Na Honhom Kronkron hyɛɛ ne papa Sakaria ma, na ɔhyɛɛ nkɔm sɛ:

english_verse: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel! He has come to save his people.
translation_verse: “Nhyira nka Awurade, Israel Nyankopɔn, sɛ wama n’ani aba ne nkurofoɔ so na wagye bɛ.

english_verse: Our God has given us a mighty Savior from the family of David his servant.
translation_verse: Waama nkwagyeɛ abɛne n’akoa Dawid fie ama yɛ,

english_verse: Long ago the Lord promised by the words of his holy prophets
translation_verse: sɛnea ɔnam n’adiyifoɔ kronkron a bɛtenaa ase tete he anum asɛ so aka

english_verse: to save us from our enemies and from everyone who hates us.
translation_verse: sɛ ɔbɛgye yɛ afiri yɛ atamfoɔ ne bɛ a bɛmpɛ yɛ asɛm nyinaa nsam he;

english_verse: God said he would be kind to our people and keep his sacred promise.
translation_verse: waahu yɛ agyanom mmɔbɔ de akaeɛ n’apam kronkron he,

english_verse: He told our ancestor Abraham
translation_verse: ntam a ɔka kyerɛɛ yɛ agya Abraham

english_verse: that he would rescue us from our enemies. Then we could serve him without fear,
translation_verse: sɛ onya gye yɛ firi atamfoɔ nsam a, ɔbɛma yɛ ho kwane de asom no a yensuro,

english_verse: by being holy and good as long as we live.
translation_verse: ahoteɛ ne tenenee mu n’anim, yɛ nna nyinaa.

english_verse: You, my son, will be called the prophet of God Most High. You will go ahead of the Lord to get everything ready for him.
translation_verse: Na wo abɔfra kumaa yi, bɛbɛfrɛ wo Sorosoroni he diyifoɔ, efiri sɛ wobedi Awurade anim akosiesie n’akwane,

english_verse: You will tell his people that they can be saved when their sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: na waama ne nkurofoɔ anya nkwagyeɛ a ɔnam bɛ bɔne fakyɛ so ba he ho nimdeɛ,

english_verse: God's love and kindness will shine upon us like the sun that rises in the sky.
translation_verse: yɛ Nyankopɔn mmɔborɔhunu nti. Saa mmɔborɔhunu yi nti adekyeɛ hann firi soro bepie yɛ so,

english_verse: On us who live in the dark shadow of death this light will shine to guide us into a life of peace.
translation_verse: ama bɛ a bɛtete sum ne wuo sunsum ase he anya hann, na wagye yɛ taataa akɔ asomdwie kwane so.”

english_verse: As John grew up, God's Spirit gave him great power. John lived in the desert until the time he was sent to the people of Israel.
translation_verse: Na abɔfra kumaa he nyini yɛɛ dene honhom mu, na ɔtenaa serɛ so kosii da a oyii ne ho adi kyerɛɛ Israel.

english_verse: About that time Emperor Augustus gave orders for the names of all the people to be listed in record books.
translation_verse: Na nna he mu he, Kaesare Augusto hyɛɛ mmara sɛ bɛntwerɛ nnipa a bɛya n’ahennie mu nyinaa dini.

english_verse: At this time a man named Simeon was living in Jerusalem. Simeon was a good man. He loved God and was waiting for him to save the people of Israel. God's Spirit came to him
translation_verse: Na afei na beema bi ya Yerusalem a bɛfrɛ no Simeon a na ɔyɛ nipa tenennee a nyamesuro ya ne mu a ɔɔtwɛne Israel awerɛkyekyerɛ, na Honhom Kronkron ya no so.

english_verse: These first records were made when Quirinius was governor of Syria.
translation_verse: Yei ne nnipa-kane na odi kane; na ɔkɔɔ so berɛ a na Kirenio yɛ Siria amrado he.

english_verse: Everyone had to go to their own hometown to be listed.
translation_verse: Na nnipa nyinaa tuu kwane kɔɔ bɛ kurom kɔtwerɛɛ bɛ dini.

english_verse: So Joseph had to leave Nazareth in Galilee and go to Bethlehem in Judea. Long ago Bethlehem had been King David's hometown, and Joseph went there because he was from David's family.
translation_verse: Yosef nso firii Nasaret a ɔya Galilea kɔɔ Yudea, na esiane sɛ ofiri Dawid fie ne Dawid abusua mu nti, ɔkɔɔ Dawid kuro a bɛfrɛ no Betlehem mu

english_verse: Mary was engaged to Joseph and traveled with him to Bethlehem. She was soon going to have a baby,
translation_verse: sɛ ɔɔkɔtwerɛ ɔne Maria a na waasi no asiwa he dini; saa berɛ he na Maria ɔɔgye nna awo.

english_verse: and while they were there,
translation_verse: Na ɔbaa sɛ bɛya hɔ he, awoɔ kaa Maria.

english_verse: she gave birth to her first-born son. She dressed him in baby clothes and laid him on a bed of hay, because there was no room for them in the inn. The Shepherds
translation_verse: Na ɔwoo n’abakane beema, na ɔde ntoma kyekyeree ne ho de no too mmoa adididaka mu, efiri sɛ bɛannya kwane ahɔhodane he mu.

english_verse: That night in the fields near Bethlehem some shepherds were guarding their sheep.
translation_verse: Saa berɛ he, na nnwanhwɛfoɔ bi nso ya wuram ɔɔwɛne bɛ nwane anadwo.

english_verse: All at once an angel came down to them from the Lord, and the brightness of the Lord's glory flashed around them. The shepherds were frightened.
translation_verse: Amonom hɔaa Awurade bɔfoɔ begyinaa bɛ nkyɛne, na Awurade animuonyam hyerɛn twaa bɛ ho hyiaeɛ, na hu kaa bɛ yie.

english_verse: But the angel said, “Don't be afraid! I have good news for you, which will make everyone happy.
translation_verse: Na bɔfoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Honnsuro, hwɛ, mede asɛmpa a ɔfa anigyeɛ pii a nnipa nyinaa benya he ho ɔɔbra ho,

english_verse: This very day in King David's hometown a Savior was born for you. He is Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ bɛawo Agyenkwa a ɔne Awurade Kristo he ama ho nnɛ Dawid kurom.

english_verse: You will know who he is, because you will find him dressed in baby clothes and lying on a bed of hay.”
translation_verse: Na yei bɛyɛ nsɛnkyerɛnne ama ho. Hobehu akokoa a bɛde ntoma akyekyere ne ho sɛ ɔda mmoa adididaka mu.”

english_verse: Suddenly many other angels came down from heaven and joined in praising God. They said:
translation_verse: Na amonom hɔaa, soro asafodɔm bɛkaa bɔfoɔ he ho yii Nyankopɔn ayɛ sɛ,

english_verse: “Praise God in heaven! Peace on earth to everyone who pleases God.”
translation_verse: “Animuonyam nka Nyankopɔn sorosoro, na asomdwie nka nnipa a bɛsɔ n’ani asaase so.”

english_verse: After the angels had left and gone back to heaven, the shepherds said to each other, “Let's go to Bethlehem and see what the Lord has told us about.”
translation_verse: Nti berɛ a abɔfoɔ he gyaa bɛ hɔ kɔɔ soro he, nnwanhwɛfoɔ he keka kyerɛɛ bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, “Homma yɛnkɔ Betlehem nkɔhwɛ nea asi a Awurade ayi no adi akyerɛ yɛ yi.”

english_verse: They hurried off and found Mary and Joseph, and they saw the baby lying on a bed of hay.
translation_verse: Na bɛyɔɔ ntɛm kɔeɛ, na bekohuu Maria ne Yosef, ne akokoa he sɛ ɔda mmoa adididaka mu.

english_verse: When the shepherds saw Jesus, they told his parents what the angel had said about him.
translation_verse: Na behuu no he, bɛkaa nsɛm a bɛaka akyerɛ bɛ afa abɔfra he ho kyerɛɛ Yosef ne Maria.

english_verse: But Mary kept thinking about all this and wondering what it meant.
translation_verse: na Maria de nsɛm yi nyinaa sieeɛ ne tim, na ɔdwendwenee ho.

english_verse: As the shepherds returned to their sheep, they were praising God and saying wonderful things about him. Everything they had seen and heard was just as the angel had said.
translation_verse: Na nnwanhwɛfoɔ he sane kɔeɛ, na ɔnam sɛ nea abɔfoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ bɛ he, bɛkɔteeɛ na behuiɛ nti, bɛɛhyɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam na beeyi no ayɛ.

english_verse: Eight days later Jesus' parents did for him what the Law of Moses commands. And they named him Jesus, just as the angel had told Mary when he promised she would have a baby. Simeon Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Afei nnawɔtwe duruiɛ a betwaa no twetia he, bɛtoo ne dini sɛ Yesu, dini a bɔfoɔ he bɔeɛ ansa na beenyinsɛne no he. Bɛde abɔfra kɔɔ Yerusalem

english_verse: The time came for Mary and Joseph to do what the Law of Moses says a mother is supposed to do after her baby is born. They took Jesus to the temple in Jerusalem and presented him to the Lord,
translation_verse: Bio nso, berɛ a nna a bɛde dwira bɛ ho sɛnea Mose mmara he kyerɛ he baa awieeɛ he, bɛde no baa Yerusalem sɛ bɛde no ɔɔbra Awurade,

english_verse: The Law of the Lord also says parents have to offer a sacrifice, giving at least a pair of doves or two young pigeons. So that is what Mary and Joseph did.
translation_verse: na afei bɛbɔɔ afɔdeɛ sɛnea bɛaka no Awurade mmara mu sɛ, “Mmuburo mmienu anaa mmorɔnoma nkumaa mmienu ne bɛmfa mmɔ afɔdeɛ.” Simeon huu Agyenkwa he

english_verse: and told him that he would not die until he had seen Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: Bio nso, na Honhom Kronkron ayi akyerɛ no sɛ onwu gye sɛ waahu Kristo a ɔyɛ Awurade deɛ he ansa.

english_verse: When Mary and Joseph brought Jesus to the temple to do what the Law of Moses says should be done for a new baby, the Spirit told Simeon to go into the temple.
translation_verse: Honhom he de no kɔɔ asɔrefie hɔ; na berɛ a awofoɔ he de abɔfra Yesu baa sɛ bɛɛbɛyɔ nea mmara he mu amanneɛ kyerɛ sɛ bɛnyɔ mma no he,

english_verse: Simeon took the baby Jesus in his arms and praised God,
translation_verse: ɔgyee no too ne nsa so hyiraa Nyankopɔn sɛ,

english_verse: “Lord, I am your servant, and now I can die in peace, because you have kept your promise to me.
translation_verse: “Awurade, afei woogya w’akoa kwane asomdwie mu sɛnea w’asɛm teɛ;

english_verse: With my own eyes I have seen what you have done to save your people,
translation_verse: efiri sɛ m’ani ahu nea wonam so bɛgye nkwa

english_verse: and foreign nations will also see this.
translation_verse: a woasiesie amane nyinaa anim he,

english_verse: Your mighty power is a light for all nations, and it will bring honor to your people Israel.”
translation_verse: kanea a wonam so beyi nea ɔkata Amanamane he so na ama ahyɛ wo mane Israel animuonyam.”

english_verse: Jesus' parents were surprised at what Simeon had said.
translation_verse: Na nea ɔka faa ne ho he yɛɛ ne papa ne ne maame nwanwa.

english_verse: Then he blessed them and told Mary, “This child of yours will cause many people in Israel to fall and others to stand. The child will be like a warning sign. Many people will reject him,
translation_verse: Afei Simeon hyiraa bɛ, na ɔka kyerɛɛ ne maame Maria sɛ, “Hwɛ! Yei ne bɛayi no ama Israelfoɔ bebree sɛ ɔnam ne so nti bɛbɛhwe ase na bebree nso bɛsɔre. Na ɔno nso ne bɛyɛ nsɛnkyerɛnne a bɛbɛkasa atia,

english_verse: and you, Mary, will suffer as though you had been stabbed by a dagger. But all this will show what people are really thinking.” Anna Speaks about the Child Jesus
translation_verse: na ama nnipa bebree akoma mu nsusuiɛ ada adi, na wo deɛ wo ahohera bɛyɛ te sɛ deɛ .” Hana huu Agyenkwa hu

english_verse: The prophet Anna was also there in the temple. She was the daughter of Phanuel from the tribe of Asher, and she was very old. In her youth she had been married for seven years, but her husband died.
translation_verse: Afei na diyifoɔ baa bi ya hɔ a bɛfrɛ no Hana, Fanuel babaa a ofiri Aser abusuakuo mu a na ne mfie kɔ anim paa. Na ɔwaree ne mmabunu berɛ mu ne ne kunu tenaeɛ mfie nson.

english_verse: At this time Anna came in and praised God. She spoke about the child Jesus to everyone who hoped for Jerusalem to be set free. The Return to Nazareth
translation_verse: Na dɔno heaa mu he, Hana baa hɔ bɛdaa Nyankopɔn ase kaa abɔfra he ho asɛm kyerɛɛ bɛ a bɛɛtwɛne gye a bɛbɛgye Yerusalem he nyinaa.

english_verse: After Joseph and Mary had done everything that the Law of the Lord commands, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee.
translation_verse: Bɛyɛɛ nea Awurade mmara hwehwɛ nyinaa wieeɛ he, bɛsane kɔɔ bɛ kuro Nasaret a ɔya Galilea mu.

english_verse: The child Jesus grew. He became strong and wise, and God blessed him. The Boy Jesus in the Temple
translation_verse: Na abɔfra he kɔɔ so nyini yɛɛ dene, nyansa hyɛɛ no mã, na Nyankopɔn adom ya ne so. Yesu ya asɔrefie

english_verse: Every year Jesus' parents went to Jerusalem for Passover.
translation_verse: Afe biaa na n’awofoɔ kɔ Yerusalem kodi Twam afahyɛ he.

english_verse: And when Jesus was twelve years old, they all went there as usual for the celebration.
translation_verse: Na berɛ a odii mfie dummienu he, bɛkɔeɛ sɛnea afahyɛ he ho amanneɛ teɛ,

english_verse: After Passover his parents left, but they did not know that Jesus had stayed on in the city.
translation_verse: na bɛtenaa hɔ kosii nna he awieeɛ. Nso berɛ a bɛɛsane aba he, abɔfra Yesu kaa Yerusalem a n’awofoɔ anhu.

english_verse: They thought he was traveling with some other people, and they went a whole day before they started looking for him.
translation_verse: Bɛdwenee sɛ wafra nnipadɔm he mu kɔ, nti betwaa bɛyɛ nkwansini dunnum kosi aduonu. Na afei befirii aseɛ kyini hwehwɛɛ no abusuafoɔ ne manifoɔ mu.

english_verse: When they could not find him with their relatives and friends, they went back to Jerusalem and started looking for him there.
translation_verse: Ɔbaa sɛ bɛanhu no he, bɛsane kɔɔ Yerusalem kɔhwehwɛɛ no anibereɛ so.

english_verse: Three days later they found Jesus sitting in the temple, listening to the teachers and asking them questions.
translation_verse: Na nnansa akyi he, behuu no asɔrefie hɔ sɛ ɔte akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ he mfinimfini ootie bɛ na oobisabisa bɛ nsɛm.

english_verse: Everyone who heard him was surprised at how much he knew and at the answers he gave.
translation_verse: Na sɛnea n’adwene mu dɔ na oyi nsɛm ano he nti, bɛ a beetie no he ho dwirii bɛ.

english_verse: When his parents found him, they were amazed. His mother said, “Son, why have you done this to us? Your father and I have been very worried, and we have been searching for you!”
translation_verse: Afei behuu no he, ɔyɛɛ bɛ nwanwa, na ne maame ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ: “Me ba, ɛɛne nti ne woyɔɔ yɛ saa? Hwɛ, me ne wo agya de ahodwiri ahwehwɛ wo.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Why did you have to look for me? Didn't you know that I would be in my Father's house?”
translation_verse: Na ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Mmɛ nti ne ɔsɛ sɛ hokyini hwehwɛ me? Nti honnim sɛ otwa sɛ metena m’Agya fie anaa?”

english_verse: But they did not understand what he meant.
translation_verse: Nso bɛante asɛm a ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ he ase. Yesu setie ne ne nyini

english_verse: Jesus went back to Nazareth with his parents and obeyed them. His mother kept on thinking about all that had happened.
translation_verse: Na ɔne bɛ kɔɔ Nasaret, na ɔkɔɔ so brɛɛ ne ho ase hyɛɛ bɛ ase. Ne maame nso de nsɛm yi nyinaa siee n’akoma mu.

english_verse: Jesus became wise, and he grew strong. God was pleased with him and so were the people.
translation_verse: Na Yesu nyini nyansa ne honam mu, na onyaa Nyankopɔn ne nnipa anim adom.

english_verse: When tax collectors came to be baptized, they asked John, “Teacher, what should we do?”
translation_verse: Na atogyefoɔ nso baa sɛ ɔmmɔ bɛ asu, na bebisaa no sɛ, “Kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ, abɛ ne yɛnyɔ?”

english_verse: Do something to show that you really have given up your sins. Don't start saying you belong to Abraham's family. God can turn these stones into children for Abraham.
translation_verse: Honso aba a ɔkyerɛ adwensakra. Na honnka no ho mu sɛ, ‘Yɛ agya ne Abraham.’ Na meeka akyerɛ ho sɛ Nyankopɔn betumi ama Abraham anya mma afiri aboɔ yi mu.

english_verse: But to Herod the ruler, he said, “It was wrong for you to take Herodias, your brother's wife.” John also said Herod had done many other bad things.
translation_verse: Nso esiane sɛ Herode a ɔyɛ mantam sodifoɔ he ntene, na Yohane aka n’anim ne nua yerɛ Herodia ho ne nnoɔma bɔne a Herode ayɔ nyinaa ho nti,

english_verse: Melchi, Addi, Cosam, Elmadam, Er,
translation_verse: Melki ba, Adi ba, Kosam ba, Elmadam ba, Er ba,

english_verse: Annas and Caiaphas were the Jewish high priests. At that time God spoke to Zechariah's son John, who was living in the desert.
translation_verse: Asɔfoɔ mpanyimfoɔ Anas ne Kaiafa nna he mu he, Nyankopɔn asɛm baa Sakaria ba Yohane nkyɛne ya serɛ he so.

english_verse: Isaiah the prophet wrote about John when he said, “In the desert someone is shouting, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord! Make a straight path for him.
translation_verse: sɛnea bɛatwerɛ no diyifoɔ Yesaia nwoma mu sɛ, “Bi ɔɔteam serɛ so sɛ: ‘Honsiesie Awurade kwane, homma n’akwane ntene.

english_verse: Fill up every valley and level every mountain and hill. Straighten the crooked paths and smooth out the rough roads.
translation_verse: Homma bonhwa nyinaa nyɛ mã, na honnwiri mmepɔ ne nkokoɔ nyinaa ngu fam, na nea akyea he, homma ɔntene na mmonkyimmɔnka nnane akwane tromtrom,

english_verse: Then everyone will see the saving power of God.’ ”
translation_verse: na nnipa nyinaa behu Nyankopɔn nkwagyeɛ he.’ ”

english_verse: Crowds of people came out to be baptized, but John said to them, “You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Na Yohane ka kyerɛɛ nnipadɔm a bɛbaa sɛ ɔmmɔ bɛ asu he sɛ, “Nankatia mma, hwane ne ka kyerɛɛ ho sɛ honwane mfiri abufuo a ɔɔba he ho?

english_verse: The crowds asked John, “What should we do?”
translation_verse: Na nnipadɔm he bisaa no sɛ, “Saa dea, mmɛ ne yɛnyɔ?”

english_verse: Some soldiers asked him, “And what about us? What do we have to do?” John told them, “Don't force people to pay money to make you leave them alone. Be satisfied with your pay.”
translation_verse: Asraafoɔ nso bisaa no sɛ, “Ɛɛne ne yɛ nso yɛnyɔ?” Na ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Honnwodwoo biaa, na hommfa asɛm nto biaa so, na homma ho ani nsɔ ho akatua.” Kristo ba ne n’adwuma ho nkɔmhyɛ

english_verse: John said, “I am just baptizing with water. But someone more powerful is going to come, and I am not good enough even to untie his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
translation_verse: Yohane buaa bɛ sɛ, “Me deɛ, mede nsuo ne bɔ ho asu, na nea ɔwɔ tumi sene me ɔɔba a ne mpaboa ahoma mpo memfata sɛ mesane. Ɔno ankasa ne de Honhom Kronkron ne gya bɛbɔ ho asu.

english_verse: In many different ways John preached the good news to the people.
translation_verse: Nti Yohane nam afotuo bebree so pae mu kaa asɛmpa kyerɛɛ nkurofoɔ he.

english_verse: Finally, Herod put John in jail, and this was the worst thing he had done. The Baptism of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: nea ɔyɔ kaa yeinom nyinaa ho ne sɛ, ɔde Yohane too afiase. Yesu asubɔ (Mateo

english_verse: While everyone else was being baptized, Jesus himself was baptized. Then as he prayed, the sky opened up,
translation_verse: Berɛ a ɔbɔɔ nnipa he nyinaa asu he, ɔbɔɔ Yesu nso asu, na ɔɔbɔ mpaeɛ he, soro bieeɛ,

english_verse: and the Holy Spirit came down upon him in the form of a dove. A voice from heaven said, “You are my own dear Son, and I am pleased with you.” The Ancestors of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: na Honhom Kronkron sianee honam tebea mu te sɛ abuburo baa ne so, na nne bi fi soro kaa sɛ. “Wone me dɔba, wo ne wo sɔ m’ani.” Yesu awoɔ ntoatoasoɔ (Mateo
