translation_verse: Benni hɔhoɔ biaa akyi, na mmom bebedwane afiri ne nkyɛne efiri sɛ bennim ahɔhoɔ he nne.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu kaa saa kasakoa yi kyerɛɛ bɛ, nso bɛante nea na ɔɔka kyerɛ bɛ he ase.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Nti Yesu kaa bio sɛ, “Meeka akyerɛ ho nɔkorem paa sɛ, mene nnwammuo he ano pono ma nnwane he.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Bɛ a bɛde me dini aba nyinaa yɛ akorɔmfoɔ ne dwotwafoɔ; nso nnwane he antie bɛ.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Mene pono he, biaa a ɔfa me so kɔ mu he, bɛbɛgye no nkwa, na ɔbɛba mu, na wafiri adi, na wanya adidibea.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Korɔmfoɔ mma, gye sɛ oobewia, adi awu, na waseɛ adeɛ. Na me deɛ, mebaa sɛ hobenya nkwa na hoanya no mmorosoɔ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Mene dwanhwɛfoɔ pa he. Dwanhwɛfoɔ pa he de ne nkwa to hɔ ma nnwane he.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Na nipa a bɛabɔ no paa sɛ ɔnhwɛ nnwane he, na nnwane he nyɛ ɔno ankasa ne deɛ he hu pataku sɛ ɔɔba a, ogya nnwane he hɔ dwane ma pataku he bɛkye bɛ, na wabɔ bɛ ahwete.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Paani he dwane efiri sɛ ɔyɛ paani, na ɔnnwene nnwane he ho.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and they know me.
translation_verse: Mene dwanhwɛfoɔ pa he, menim me deɛ, na me deɛ nso nim me,

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: sɛnea Agya he nim me na me nso menim Agya he. Na mede me nkwa to hɔ ma nnwane he.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: Mewɔ nnwane foforɔ a bemfiri bane yi mu. Ɔsɛ sɛ mede bɛ nso ba na bebetie me nne, na ayɛ kuo baako a ɔwɔ hwɛfoɔ baako.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne Agya he dɔ me, efiri sɛ mede me nkwa to hɔ na mefa bio.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Biaa nnye mfiri me nsam, na m’ankasa ne mefiri mepɛ mu de to hɔ. Mewɔ tumi sɛ mede to hɔ, na mewɔ tumi sɛ mesane fa bio. Menyaa yei ho ahyɛdeɛ firii m’Agya nkyɛne.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Na nsɛm yi nti mpapaemu baa Yudafoɔ he mu bio.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Na bɛ mu pii kaa sɛ, “Ɔwɔ honhommɔne na waabɔ dam. Mmɛ nti ne hotie no?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Na binom nso kaa sɛ, “Nsɛm yi nyɛ nea ɔwɔ honhommɔne nsɛm. Honhommɔne betumi abie nifirani ani anaa?” Yudafoɔ he poo Yesu

english_verse: That winter, Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Temple Festival.
translation_verse: Saa berɛ he na ahodwira afahyɛ aduru so ya Yerusalem. Na ɔyɛ awɔ berɛ.

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Na Yesu nenam asɔrefie hɔ, Salomo abranaa he so.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Nti Yudafoɔ he twa hyiaa ne ho bisaa no sɛ, “Wobɛma yɛatwɛne akosi da bɛ? Sɛ wone Kristo he a, pae mu ka kyerɛɛ yɛ pefee.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Maka akyerɛ ho, na honnye nni. Nnwuma a meyɔ no m’Agya dini mu heaa di me ho adanseɛ;

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: nso honnye nni, efiri sɛ honka me nnwane he ho.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Me nnwane te me nne. Menim bɛ, na bedi m’akyi.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: Mema bɛ daa nkwa, na bɛnyera da. Na biaa ntumi nhwim bɛ mfiri me nsam.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Nea m’Agya de ama me he so kyɛne bibiaa, na biaa ntumi nhwim mfiri Agya he nsam.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Mene Agya he yɛ baako.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Na Yudafoɔ he sesaa aboɔ bio sɛ bɛɛbɛtoto abɔ no.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Yesu buaa bɛ sɛ, “Maada nnwumapa pii adi akyerɛ ho a efiri Agya he nkyɛne. Nnwuma yi mu nea ɔya he nti ne hoobesi me aboɔ yi?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Yudafoɔ he buaa sɛ, “Ɔnyɛ nnwumapa bi nti ne yeebesi wo aboɔ, na mmom abususɛm ntia, efiri sɛ wo a woyɛ nipa he woyɛ wo ho sɛ Nyankopɔn.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: In your Scriptures doesn't God say, “You are gods”?
translation_verse: Yesu buaa bɛ sɛ, “Bɛntwerɛɛ wɔ ho mmara mu sɛ, ‘Mekaa sɛ, hoyɛ anyame’?

english_verse: You can't argue with the Scriptures, and God spoke to those people and called them gods.
translation_verse: Sɛ bɛfrɛ bɛ a Nyankopɔn asɛm baa bɛ nkyɛne he anyame na bentumi nsɛe twerɛ he a,

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: hoka kyerɛ me a Agya he ate me ho asoma me aba wiase he sɛ, ‘Woaka abususɛm’ esiane sɛ mekaa sɛ ‘Meyɛ Nyankopɔn Ba nti’?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Sɛ ɔnyɛ m’Agya adwuma ne meeyɔ a, hedeɛ honnye me nni.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Na sɛ m’Agya adwuma ne meeyɔ deɛ a, hedeɛ sɛ mene honnye me nni a, honye nnwuma he nni na hoahu na ho ate aseɛ sɛ Agya he ya me mu na me nso meya ne mu.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Na bɛbɔɔ mmɔdene sɛ bɛbɛkye no, nso ofiri bɛ nsa kɔeɛ.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Nti osiim bio kotwaa Yordan kɔɔ baabi a na kane he Yohane bɔ asu he, na ɔtenaa hɔ.

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: Na nnipa bebree baa ne nkyɛne, na ɔkaa sɛ, “Yohane anyɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne baako pɛ mpo, nso nea Yohane ka faa saa nipa yi ho he nyinaa yɛ nɔkorɛ.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Na pii gyee no dii hɔ.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Nti ne nuamaanom too Yesu nkra sɛ, “Awurade, nea wodɔ no he yare.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Na Yesu teeɛ he, ɔkaa sɛ, “Saa yadeɛ yi nyɛ wuyareɛ; na mmom Nyankopɔn animuonyam ntia, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ na bɛnam so bɛhyɛ Nyankopɔn Ba he animuonyam.”

english_verse: But he stayed where he was for two more days.
translation_verse: nso ɔtee sɛ ɔyare he ɔtenaa baabi a na ɔya heaa nnaanu.

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Na ɔno akyi he ɔka kyerɛɛ n’asuafoɔ he sɛ, “Homma yɛnkɔ Yudea bio.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Asuafoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ, ɔnyɛ nnaano yiaa ne Yudafoɔ yi pɛɛ sɛ besi wo aboɔ, ne woobɛkɔ hɔ bio yi?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Ɔnyɛ nnɔnhwere dummienu ne ya adekyeɛ mu? Bɛ a bɛnante awia berɛ he nsonti bibiaa, efiri sɛ behu wiase hann.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Nso bɛ a bɛnante anadwo he sonti, efiri sɛ benni hann mu.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Ɔkaa yei wieeɛ he, ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Yɛ adamfo Lasaro ada, na meekɔ hɔ akonyane no.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Asuafoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Awurade, sɛ waada deɛ a, ɔbɛsɔre.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Yesu deɛ na Lazuro wuo ho asɛm ne ɔɔka, nso asuafoɔ he susuu sɛ ɔyɛ nna ho asɛm ne ɔɔka.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: Na ho nti ɔyɛ me anigye sɛ na menni hɔ, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ na hobɛgye adi. Nso ho mma yɛnkɔ ne nkyɛne.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Toma a na bɛfrɛ no Ata he ka kyerɛɛ ne mfɛfoɔ asuafoɔ he sɛ, “Homma yɛ nso yɛnkɔ na yɛ ne no nkowu.” Yesu yɛ Wusɔreɛ ne Nkwa

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Berɛ a Yesu duruu hɔ he, ohuu sɛ Lasaro adi nnanan adamena mu.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Na Betania bɛne Yerusalem bɛyɛ nkwansini mmienu ne fa,

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: na Yudafoɔ bebree aba Marta ne Maria nkyɛne ɔɔbɛkyekyere bɛ werɛ, bɛ nua he nti.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Afei Marta tee sɛ Yesu ɔɔba he, okohyiaa no; na Maria deɛ ɔtenaa fie.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Marta ka kyerɛɛ Yesu sɛ, “Awurade, sɛ na woya ha a, nka me nua beema yi anwu.

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: Yesu ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Wo nua beema he bɛsɔre bio.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Marta ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Menim sɛ wusɔreɛ a ɔbɛba da a odi akyire he mu he, ɔbɛsɔre.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Yesu ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Me ne wusɔreɛ ne nkwa. Bɛ a bɛgye me di he, bewu mpo a bebenya nkwa.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Ɔka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Ɛɛ, Awurade, megye di sɛ wo ne Kristo, Nyankopɔn Ba a ɔɔba wiase mu he.” Yesu suiɛ

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Ɔkaa yei wieeɛ he, Marta kɔfrɛɛ ne Maria kokoam ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ he aba ha, na ɔɔfrɛ wo.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Na ɔtee yei he, ɔsɔree ntɛm siim kɔɔ ne nkyɛne.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Nso saa berɛ he nyinaa na Yesu nnya nnuruu kuro he mu, na mmom na ɔda so ya baabi a Marta behyiaa no he.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Afei berɛ a Yudafoɔ a na bɛ ne Marta ya fie hɔ ɔɔkyekyere ne were he huu sɛ Maria asɔre ntɛm afiri adi he, bedii n’akyi susuu sɛ ɔɔkɔ nna he so akosu.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Na Maria duruu baabi a na Yesu ya he na n’ani bɔɔ ne so he, obuu nkotodwe ne nane ase, na ɔka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Awurade, sɛ na woya ha a, nka me nua beema yi anwu.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Yesu huu sɛ oosu he, na Yudafoɔ a bɛ ne no baeɛ nso beesu he, osii apinie ya ne honhom mu na ne ho nso yera no.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Obisaa sɛ, “Hefa ne hode no toeɛ?” Bɛka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Awurade, bra na bɛhwɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus started crying,
translation_verse: Yesu suiɛ.

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Nti Yudafoɔ he kaa sɛ, “Honhwɛ sɛnea na osi dɔ no fa!”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Nso binom kaa sɛ, “Yei ne bie nifirani ani he; nka ontumi nsi yei wuo yi ho kwane anaa?” Yesu nyanee Lasaro firii Wuom

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Afei Yesu a na oosi apinie bio he, baa nna he so. Na ɔyɛ abodane, na boɔ twere ano.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Yesu kaa sɛ, “Honyi boɔ he.” Marta a na ne nua aka baabi he ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Sesɛɛ deɛ, ɔbɔno, efiri sɛ waadi nnanan.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Yesu bisaa no sɛ, “Menka nkyerɛɛ wo sɛ, sɛ wogye di a, hobehu Nyankopɔn animuonyam?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Nti beyii boɔ he hɔ. Na Yesu hwɛɛ soro, na ɔkaa sɛ, “Agya, meda wo ase sɛ woatie me.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Menim sɛ wotie me daa, nso nnipakuo a begyina ha he nti ne maka saa na ama bɛagye adi sɛ wone wosomaa me.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Ɔkaa saa he, ɔde nne kɛseɛ teaam sɛ, “Lasaro, firi bra!”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Afei beema a na wawu he firi baeɛ a na bɛde ntoma akyekyere ne nane ne ne nsa, na bɛde ntoma nteantea akyekyere n’anim. Yesu ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Honsane no na homma no nkɔ.” Bɛbɔɔ Yesu ho pɔ sɛ bebeku no

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Nti Yudafoɔ a na bɛaba Maria nkyɛne a behuu deɛ Yesu yɔeɛ he mu bebree gye diiɛ,

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: nso bɛ mu bi kɔɔ Farisifoɔ he hɔ kɔkaa deɛ Yesu yɔeɛ he kyerɛɛ bɛ.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Nti asɔfo mpanyimfoɔ ne Farisifoɔ he maa bekohyiaa abadwafoɔ he, na bɛkaa sɛ, “Mmɛ ne yɛbɛyɔ efiri sɛ nipa yi ɔɔyɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne pii?

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Sɛ yɛma no kɔ so saa a, biaa bɛgye no adi, na Romafoɔ he bɛba abɛsɛe yɛ kronkron bea ne yɛ mane yi.”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Na bɛ mu baako, Kaiafa a na ɔyɛ sɔfo panyini saa afe he, ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Honnim hwee koraa,

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: na honnwene nso sɛ ɔyɛ ma ho sɛ nipa baako bewu ama manfoɔ na mane mũ he nyinaa ansɛe.”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: Nso, omfiri n’ankasa ne tim ne ɔkaa yei; na mmom esiane sɛ na ɔyɛ sɔfo panyini saa afe he nti, ɔhyɛɛ nkɔm sɛ otwa sɛ Yesu wu ma mane he,

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: na ɔnyɛ mane he nko, na mmom sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ na Nyankopɔn bɛka ne mma a bɛabɔ bɛ ahwete he abom ayɛ baako.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: Nti ofiri saa da he bɛbɔɔ pɔ sɛ bebeku no.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Saa nti afei Yesu annante badwam bio wɔ Yudafoɔ he mu, na ofirii hɔ kɔɔ asaase a ɔbɛne serɛ so, kuro bi a bɛfrɛ no Efraim mu, na ɔne n’asuafoɔ he tenaa hɔ.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Saa berɛ he na Yudafoɔ Twam he abɛne, na nnipa bebree firi nkurase baa Yerusalem ansa na Twam afahyɛ he ooduru so sɛnea bebedwira bɛ ho.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Na bɛɛhwehwɛ Yesu, na berɛ a begyinagyina asɔrefie hɔ he, bɛ bisabisa bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, “Hodwene ho sɛ? Nti ɔmma afahyɛ he ase koraa anaa?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Na asɔfo mpanyimfoɔ ne Farisifoɔ he ahyɛ sɛ, sɛ bi nim baabi a ɔya a, ɔmmɛkyerɛ, na bɛnkɔ kye no.

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi yɛ me somfoɔ a ma no nni m’akyi, na baabi a meya he, hɔ ne me somfoɔ bɛba; na sɛ bi som me a, m’Agya bedi no ni. Yesu kaa ne wuo ho asɛm

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: bɛfaa berɛɛ, na befiri adi sɛ beekohyia no, na bɛteaam sɛ, “Hosiana! Nhyira ne deɛ ɔɔba Awurade dini mu— Israel hene he!”

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Na berɛ a Yesu huu afunumu ba bi he, ɔtenaa ne so, sɛnea bɛatwerɛ sɛ:

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Na Maria faa ngo hwamhwam krɔgyee a na ne boɔ bɛyɛ nkariboɔ baako de bɛsraa Yesu nane ase, na ɔde ne tinwii popaeɛ. Na ne hwam hyɛɛ fie hɔ ma.

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Na afei Yudafoɔ nnipakuo kɛseɛ bi huu sɛ ɔya hɔ, na bɛbaa hɔ. Ɔnyɛ Yesu nko nti, na mmom bɛbaa sɛ bɛɛbɛpɛ Lasaro a wanyane afiri wuom he ahwɛ.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Bɛtoo Yesu pono hɔ. Marta someeɛ, na Lasaro deɛ na ɔka bɛ a na bɛ ne no te adidipono he ho.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Nso, Yuda Iskariot, asuafoɔ he mu baako a na oobeyi no ama he kaa sɛ,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Yesu kaa sɛ, “Honyaa no, na ɔde yei asie ama me sie da.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Ahiafoɔ deɛ, bɛya ho nkyɛne daa, na me deɛ honnya me daa.” Bɛbɔɔ Lasaro ho pɔ sɛ bebeku no

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Nti yeinom baa Filipo a na ofiri Betsaida a ɔya Galilea he nkyɛne, na befirii aseɛ srɛɛ no sɛ, “Owura, yɛpɛ sɛ yehu Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Farisifoɔ he keka kyerɛɛ bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, Honhu sɛ hontumi nyɔ no hwee. Hwɛ! Wiase atu di n’akyi. Helafoɔ pɛɛ sɛ bebehu Yesu

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Agya, hyɛ wo dini animuonyam.” Na afei nne bi firi soro baeɛ sɛ, “Maahyɛ no animuonyam dada, na mɛhyɛ no animuonyam bio.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: “Wafira bɛ ani na waama bɛ akoma ayɛ dene, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ na bɛmmfa bɛ ani nnhu, na bɛ akoma ante aseɛ na bɛansakra na mansa bɛ yadeɛ.”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Adeɛ kyeɛ he, nnipakuo pii a na bɛaba afahyɛ he asɛ he tee sɛ Yesu ɔɔba Yerusalem he,

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Sion babaa, nsuro. Hwɛ, wo hene ɔɔba, ɔte afunumu ba so!”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Nso n’asuafoɔ he ante yeinom ase saa berɛ he; na Nyankopɔn hyɛɛ Yesu animuonyam akyi he ne bɛkae sɛ bɛatwerɛ yeinom afa ne ho, na bɛayɔ nea bɛatwerɛ he nyinaa ama no.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ bɛtee sɛ wayɔ saa nsɛnkyerɛnne yi nti, nnipakuo he kohyiaa no.

english_verse: Some Greeks had gone to Jerusalem to worship during Passover.
translation_verse: Na Helafoɔ bi ka bɛ a bɛbaa sɛ bɛɛbɛsom afahyɛ he ase he ho.

english_verse: Philip told Andrew. Then the two of them went to Jesus and told him. The Son of Man Must Be Lifted Up
translation_verse: Filipo kɔka kyerɛɛ Andreo, na Andreo ne Filipo kɔka kyerɛɛ Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Berɛ he aduru sɛ bɛhyɛ Nipa Ba he animuonyam.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Meeka akyerɛ ho nɔkorem paa sɛ, sɛ ayuo ba baako antɔ fam anwu a, ɔdasoaa yɛ ba baako; nso sɛ owu a ɔsõ mma bebree.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Deɛ ɔdɔ ne nkwa he, obefiri ne nsa; na deɛ ɔtane ne nkwa wiase ha yi bɛkora no akɔ daa nkwam.

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: “Afei me kra ho yera no. Na mmɛ ne menka? ‘Agya, gye mefiri dɔno yi mu’? Daabi! Yei nti ne saa mmerɛ yi ato me.

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Na nnipakuo a begyina hɔ na bɛteeɛ he kaa sɛ, “Agradaa abom.” Binom nso kaa sɛ, “Bɔfoɔ akasa akyerɛ no.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Yesu kaa sɛ, “Ɔnyɛ me nti ne nne yi baeɛ, na mmom ho ntia.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: Afei ne beebebu wiase atɛne; afei ne beebetu wiase sodifoɔ afiri hɔ.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Na me deɛ, sɛ bɛma me so firi wiase a, mɛtwe nnipa bebree aba me nkyɛne.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Ɔkaa yei de kyerɛɛ wuo ko a na oobewu.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Nti nnipakuo he buaa no sɛ, “Yɛte firi mmara he mu sɛ, Kristo he ya hɔ daa. Afei mmɛ nti ne wooka sɛ otwa sɛ bɛma Nipa Ba he so? Hwane ne Nipa Ba he?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Yesu ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Hann he bɛtena ho nkyɛne kakra. Howɔ hann he, honante na sum anni ho so. Na deɛ ɔnante sum mu he nnim baabi a meekɔ.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Howɔ hann he yi, honye hann he nni, na hoayɛ hann he mma.” Nnipa he annyeanie Na Yesu kaa yei wieeɛ he, ofirii hɔ kohintaeɛ.

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Ewom sɛ na waayɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne pii bɛ anim deɛ, nso bɛannye no anni.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Yei siiɛ sɛ asɛm a diyifoɔ Yesaia kaeɛ he bɛbam sɛ: “Awurade, hwane ne agye yɛ asɛm adi, na hwane ne bɛayi Awurade abasa akyerɛ no?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Deɛ ntia bɛantumi annye anni ne sɛ Yesaia kaa bio sɛ,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Yesaia kaa yeinom, efiri sɛ ohuu n’animuonyam, na ɔkaa ne ho asɛm.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Yei nyinaa akyi he, mpanyimfoɔ he mu pii nso gyee no diiɛ; nso Farisifoɔ he nti bɛanka sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ na bentu bɛ mfiri hyiadane he mu,

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: efiri sɛ bɛpɛ nnipa animuonyam kyɛne Nyankopɔn animuonyam mpo. Yesu Nkyerɛkyerɛ Tɔfabɔ

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Afei Yesu teaam dendene sɛ, “Deɛ ɔgye me di he, ɔnyɛ menko ne ɔgye me di, na mmom nea ɔsomaa me he nso.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Na nea ohu me he hu deɛ ɔsomaa me he nso.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Maaba wiase sɛ hann, na biaa a ɔgye me di he antena sum mu.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi te m’asɛm na onni so a, me deɛ memmu no atɛne efiri sɛ mamma sɛ meebebu wiase atɛne, na mmom mebaa sɛ meebɛgye wiase nkwa.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Nea ɔpo me na ɔnnye me nsɛm he wɔ temmufoɔ baako. Nsɛm a maka heaa ne bebu no atɛne da a odi akyire he mu,

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ me deɛ ɔnyɛ mene mehyɛɛ me ho kasaeɛ, na Agya he a ɔsomaa me he ne hyɛɛ me nea menka ne sɛnea menkasa.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Na menim sɛ n’ahyɛdeɛ yɛ daa nkwa. Nti deɛ maka he, sɛnea Agya he aka akyerɛ me he, saa ne meka.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Na afei Twam afahyɛ he oobeduru he, na Yesu nim sɛ berɛ he aduru sɛ oobefiri wiase akɔ Agya he nkyɛne. Na ɔdɔɔ ɔnoaa ne deɛ a na bɛya wiase he, na ɔdɔɔ bɛ de kosii awieeɛ.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Nti berɛ a na beebedi anwummerɛduane he, na bronsam de ahyɛ Simon ba Yuda Iskariot akomam dada sɛ onyi no ma.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Na esiane sɛ na Yesu nim sɛ Agya he de nnoɔma nyinaa ahyɛ ne nsa, na ofiri Nyankopɔn nkyɛne, na ɔɔkɔ Nyankopɔn hɔ nti,

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: ɔsɔre firii aduane he ho yii n’ataadeɛ ngusoɔ guu hɔ. Afei ɔfaa bɔɔdoa de bɔɔ n’asenem.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Ɔno akyi he ohwiee nsuo guu dwaresɛn mu, na ofiri aseɛ hohoroo asuafoɔ he nane ho. Na ɔde bɔɔdoa a ɔde bɔɔ n’asenem he popaa ho.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Na oduruu Simon Petro so he, obisaa Yesu sɛ, “Awurade, wo ne woobɛhohoro me nane ase yi?

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Na Yesu buaa sɛ, “Nea meeyɔ yi wonte aseɛ seesei na akyire he wobɛte aseɛ.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Petro ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Aa! Awurade, memma wonhohoro me nane ase.” Yesu buaa sɛ, “Sɛ manhohoro wo nane ase a wonni kyɛfa biaa me mu.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Sɛ ɔte deɛ a, Awurade, ɔnyɛ me nane ase nkoaa, na me nsa ne meti nso ka ho!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Nea woadware he nhia sɛ ɔbɛhohoro bio, na mmom ohia sɛ ohohoro ne nane ase, efiri sɛ, ne ho nyinaa afiri. Ho ho afiri nso ɔnyɛ ho nyinaa.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Na onim nipa korɔ a obeyi no ama he, nti ne ɔkaa sɛ “Ɔnyɛ ho nyinaa ne ho ho afiri he.”

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Afei berɛ a ɔhohoroo bɛ nane ase wieeɛ a ɔhyɛɛ n’ataadeɛ ngusoɔ, na ɔkɔtenaa pono he ho bio he, obisaa bɛ sɛ, “Hoahu nea maayɔ ho yi?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Hofrɛ me Kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ ne Awurade, na ɔyɛ ne kwane so sɛ hoka saa, efiri sɛ meyɛ saa.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Na maama ho nhwɛsoɔ sɛnea mayɔ ho he, ho nso honyɔ saa.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Meeka akyerɛ ho nɔkorem paa sɛ, akoa nsene ne wura, na saa ne somafoɔ nso nsene onii a ɔsomaa no he.

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: Afei meeka akyerɛ ho nnɛ ansa na aba, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ na sɛ onya ba a, hobɛgye adi sɛ mene no.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Nti ɔpa tweree Yesu kokom bisaa no sɛ, “Awurade, ɔyɛ hwane a?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Na Yesu kaa yei wieeɛ he, ne ho yeraa no ne honhom mu, na ɔpaem kaa sɛ, “Meeka akyerɛ ho nɔkorem paa sɛ, ho mu baako beyi me ama.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Na asuafoɔ he mu baako a Yesu dɔ no he twere Yesu kokom

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: na Simon Petro bɔɔ n’ani kyerɛɛ no sɛ, omisa onii korɔ a ɔɔka ne ho asɛm he.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Afei ɔgyee paanoo sini he, ntɛmaa na ofiri adi. Na ɔyɛ anadwo. Ahyɛdeɛ foforɔ

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn ankasa bɛhyɛ no animuonyam, na ɔbɛhyɛ no animuonyam ntɛm.

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro bisaa no sɛ, “Awurade, hefa ne wookɔ?” Yesu buaa sɛ, “Baabi a meekɔ he wontumi nni m’akyi seesei, nso akyire yi wobedi m’akyi aba hɔ.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Petro ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Awurade, mmɛ nti ne mentumi nni w’akyi seesei? Mede me nkwa bɛto hɔ ama wo.”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Wode wo nkwa bɛto hɔ ama me? Meeka akyerɛ wo nɔkorem paa sɛ, ansa na akokɔ bɛbɔno he, na woapa me mprɛnsa.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: “Hommma ho akoma ntutu! Honye Nyankopɔn nni, na me nso honye me nni.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Tenabea pii ya m’Agya fie. Sɛ ɔnte saa a, nka mɛka akyerɛ ho sɛ, meekosiesie baabi ama ho?

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Na sɛ mekosiesei baabi ma ho a, mɛba bio, na mabɛfa ho akɔ me nkyɛne, na nea meya he ho nso hoaba hɔ.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Honnim kwane a ɔkɔ baabi a meekɔ he.”

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Toma bisaa no sɛ, “Awurade, yennim baabi a wookɔ, na ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na yɛatumi ahu kwane he?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Yesu ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Mene kwane he, nɔkorɛ he ne nkwa he, bi nkɔ Agya he nkyɛne gye sɛ ɔfa me so.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Sɛ honim me a hobehu Agya he nso. Ofiri saa berɛ yi, ho nim no, na hoahu no.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Filipo ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Awurade kyerɛ yɛ Agya he, na ɔnoaa yɛ ma yɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Yesu bisaa no sɛ, “Filipo, me ne hoya hɔ dadaada yi, honhuu me anaa? Biaa a w’ahu me he ahu Agya he nso. Afei mmɛ nti ne wooka sɛ, ‘Kyerɛ yɛ Agya he’?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Wonnye nni sɛ meya Agya he mu, na Agya he nso ya me mu anaa? Nsɛm a meka kyerɛ ho he, omfiri meaa me tim ne meka, na Agya a ɔte me mu he ne yɔ ne nnwuma.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Honye me nni sɛ meya Agya he mu, na Agya he nso ya me mu, na sɛ ɔnte saa nnwuma heaa nti honye nni.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Meeka akyerɛ ho nɔkorem paa sɛ, nea ɔgye me di he, nnwuma a meyɔ he ɔno nso bɛyɔ bi, na ɔbɛyɔ nnwuma bebree asene yeinom, efiri sɛ, me deɛ meekɔ Agya he nkyɛne.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Na bibiaa a hobɛsrɛ me dini mu he ɔno ne mɛyɔ na Agya he anya animuonyam Ba he mu.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Sɛ hosrɛ bibi me dini mu a, mɛyɔ.” Honhom Kronkron he ho bɔhyɛ

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Na m’ankasa mebisa Agya he na wama ho Kyigyinafoɔ foforɔ, na ɔne ho abɛtena daa,

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Nɔkorɛ Honhom a wiase ntumi nnye no he, efiri sɛ, onhu no, na onnim no nso. Na ho deɛ honim no, efiri sɛ ɔya ho nkyɛne, na ɔbɛtena ho mu.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: “Mennyae ho nyanka, na mɛba honkyɛne.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Aaka kakra na wiase nhu me bio, na ho deɛ hobehu me efiri sɛ, mete ase, nti ho nso hobɛtena ase.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: Nea ɔwɔ m’ahyɛdeɛ na odi so he, ɔno ne nea ɔdɔ me, na nea ɔdɔ me he m’Agya bɛdɔ no, na me nso mɛdɔ no, na mayi me ho akyerɛ no.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Yesu buaa no sɛ, “Sɛ bi dɔ me a obedi m’asɛm so, na m’Agya bɛdɔ no, na yɛbɛba ne nkyɛne na yɛ ne no abɛtena.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Nea ɔnnɔ me he nni me nsɛm so, na nsɛm a hoate he nyɛ me deɛ na ɔyɛ Agya a ɔsomaa me he deɛ.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “Meya ho nkyɛne yi, ne meeka yeinom.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Na Kyigyinafoɔ a ɔno ne Honhom Kronkron a m’Agya bɛsoma no me dini mu he, ɔno ne bɛkyerɛkyerɛ ho nnoɔma nyinaa na ɔbɛkae ho nea maka akyerɛ ho nyinaa.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: Asomdwie ne mede oogya ho, m’asomdwie ne mede ɔɔma ho, nyɛ sɛnea wiase de ma ho he ne mede ɔɔma ho. Hommma ho akoma ntutu, na hommɔ hu nso.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Hoate sɛ meka kyerɛɛ ho sɛ, ‘Meekɔ na mɛba ho nkyɛne.’ Sɛ hodɔ me a nka ho ani bɛgye sɛ meekɔ Agya he nkyɛne efiri sɛ m’Agya he yɛ keseɛ kyɛne me.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Afei maka akyerɛ ho ansa na aba mu, na sɛ onya ba mu a hoagye adi.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Me ne ho nkasa pii bio, na wiase sodifoɔ he ɔɔba, na onni tumi biaa me so

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: nso meeyɔ sɛnea Agya he hyɛ me he, na wiase ahu sɛ me dɔ Agya he. Honsɔre ma yemfiri ha nkɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: “Mene bobe trodoo he, m’Agya ne kuafoɔ he.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Mmane biaa ɔnso aba he, oyi firi ho; na nea ɔsõ aba he oyiyi ho ma ne so bebree.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Asɛm a maka akyerɛ ho nti, ho ho afiri dada.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Hontena me mu na me nso mentena ho mu. Sɛnea mmane bi ankasa ntumi nso aba gye sɛ ɔtena bobe he mu he, saa nso ne hontumi nso aba gye sɛ hotena me mu.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: Mene bobe he, ho ne mmane he. Nea ɔtena me mu na me nso metena ne mu he, ɔsõ aba bebree; na ho kwati me a hontumi nyɔ hwee.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi antena me mu a, betwa no twene sɛ mmabaa a mfasoɔ nni so; na bɛboaboa ano de kogu gya mu ma ɔhye.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Sɛ hotena me mu na me nsɛm tena ho mu a, hommisa bibiaa a hopɛ na ɔbɛyɛ hɔ ama ho.

english_verse: When you become fruitful disciples of mine, my Father will be honored.
translation_verse: Nea ɔhyɛ m’Agya animuonyam ne sɛ hobɛkɔ so aso aba bebree na hoada ho ho adi sɛ m’asuafoɔ.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: Sɛnea Agya he adɔ me na me nso madɔ ho he, hontena me dɔ mu.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Sɛ hodi m’ahyɛdeɛ so a, hobɛtena me dɔ mu, sɛnea madi m’Agya ahyɛdeɛ so na mete ne dɔ mu he.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: Maaka nsɛm yei akyerɛ ho sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ na m’anigyeɛ bɛtena ho mu, na ama ho anigyeɛ awie pɛyɛ.”

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: “Yei ne m’ahyɛdeɛ, sɛ honnodɔ ho ho sɛnea medɔɔ ho he.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Biaa nni dɔ a ɔkyɛne yei, sɛ bi de ne nkwa bɛto hɔ ama ne nnamfo.

english_verse: And you are my friends, if you obey me.
translation_verse: Sɛ hoyɔ nea mehyɛ ho he a, hedeɛ hoyɛ me nnamfo.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: Memmfrɛ ho nkoa bio, efiri sɛ akoa nnim nea ne wura yɔ. Na mmom maafrɛ ho me nnamfo, efiri sɛ maada bibiaa a mate afiri m’Agya hɔ adi akyerɛ ho.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ ho na hoayi me, na mmom mene maayi ho. Na maayi ho sɛ honkɔso aba, na hoaba he atena hɔ, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a nea hobebisa Agya he me dini mu biaa ɔde bɛma ho.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: Yei ne meehyɛ ho na ama hoadodɔ ho ho.” Tane a wiase betane ho

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: “Sɛ wiase tane ho a, honhu sɛ ɔtane me ansa na ɔɔtane ho.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Sɛ howɔ wiase afa a, wiase bɛdɔ ho sɛ ɔnoaa ne deɛ. Na esiane sɛ honni wiase afa, na mmom maayi ho afiri wiase nti, wiase tane ho.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Honkae asɛm a maka akyerɛ ho yi, ‘Akoa nkyɛne ne wura.’ Sɛ bɛtane me a, bɛbɛtane ho nso, sɛ bedi me nsɛm so a, bebedi ho deɛ nso so.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Na bɛbɛyɔ yei nyinaa atia ho ɔnam me dini nti, efiri sɛ bennim nea ɔsomaa me he.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Sɛ mamma ammɛkasa ankyerɛ bɛ a, nka bɛnnyɔɔ bɔne; na seesei deɛ benni bɛ bɔne ho anoyie biaa.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Nea ɔtane me he tane m’Agya nso.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Sɛ mannyɔ nnwuma a biaa nyɔɔ bi da bɛ mu a, nka bɛnnyɔɔ bɔne. Na afei deɛ bɛahu, nso bɛatane me ne m’Agya nyinaa.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Na ɔno ne ɔbɛma asɛm a bɛatwerɛ bɛ mmara he mu aba mu sɛ, ‘Bɛtane me tane hunu.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: “Sɛ Kyigyinafoɔ a mɛsoma no afiri Agya he nkyɛne aba ho hɔ he, Nɔkorɛ Honhom a ofiri Agya nkyɛne he nya ba a, ɔno ne bedi me ho adanseɛ.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Ho nso ɔsɛ sɛ hodi adanseɛ efiri sɛ ho ne me atena ase firi mfitiaseɛ he.

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: “Maaka yei nyinaa akyerɛ ho sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bibiaa nto ho sintidua.”

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Bɛbɛpam ho afiri hyia adane mu. Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, berɛ bi ɔɔba a biaa a obeku ho he bɛdwene sɛ ɔɔyɔ saa Nyankopɔn dini mu.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Na bɛbɛyɔ yei, efiri sɛ, bennim Agya he anaa me.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: Na maaka yei nyinaa akyerɛ ho na saa berɛ he duru a, hoakae sɛ maaka akyerɛ ho dada. Honhom he Dwumadie “Na manka saa nsɛm yi ankyerɛ ho mfitiaseɛ he, efiri sɛ na meya ho nkyɛne.

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: Na afei deɛ meekɔ nea ɔsomaa me he nkyɛne, nso ho mu biaa mmisa me sɛ, ‘He ne wookɔ?’

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Na esiane sɛ maka yei akyerɛ ho nti, awerɛhoɔ ahyɛ ho akoma ma.

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Nso meeka nɔkorɛ akyerɛ ho sɛ, ɔyɛ ma ho sɛ mɛkɔ, efiri sɛ, sɛ mankɔ a, Kyigyinafoɔ he ɔmma ho nkyɛne. Na sɛ mekɔ a, mɛsoma no ama no aba ho nkyɛne.

english_verse: The Spirit will come and show the people of this world the truth about sin and God's justice and the judgment.
translation_verse: Na sɛ ɔba a, obeyi wiase atɛne afa bɔne ne tenenee ne atemmuo ho:

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: tenenee ho, efiri sɛ meekɔ Agya he nkyɛne, na honhu me bio;

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: atemmuo ho, efiri sɛ nea odi wiase yi so he bɛabu no fɔ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: “Mewɔ nsɛm pii ka kyerɛɛ ho, nso hontumi nnye ne nyinaa seesei.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Na sɛ Nɔkorɛ Honhom he ba a, ɔbɛkyerɛ ho kwane akɔ nɔkorɛ he nyinaa mu, efiri sɛ omfiri ɔno ankasa ne mu ne bɛkasa, na mmom bibiaa ɔbɛte he ɔno ne ɔbɛka. Na ɔbɛkyerɛ ho nnoɔma a ɔɔba.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne bɛhyɛ m’animuonyam; efiri sɛ ɔbɛfa nea ɔyɛ me deɛ he bi na wapaem aka akyerɛ ho.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Nea Agya he wɔ nyinaa yɛ me dea. Saa nti ne mekaa sɛ nɔkorɛ Honhom he bɛfa nea ɔyɛ me deɛ na wapaem aka akyerɛ ho he. Awerɛhoɔ bɛdane Anigyeɛ

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: “Aaka kakraa bi na honhu me, na bio aaka kakraa bi hobehu me.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Afei n’asuafoɔ he binom bisaa bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, “Asɛm a ɔɔka kyerɛ yɛ yi kyerɛ sɛ, “Aaka kakraa bi na honhu me, na bio aaka kakraa bi hobehu me; ne sɛ ‘Efiri sɛ meekɔ Agya he nkyɛne’?”

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Bɛkaa sɛ, “ ‘Aaka kakraa bi’ he kyerɛ sɛ? Yennim nea ɔka ho asɛm yi.”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Na Yesu huu sɛ bɛpɛ sɛ bebisa no nea ɔkaeɛ he asekyerɛ he, ɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Asɛm a mekaa sɛ ‘Aaka kakraa bi na honhu me, na bio aaka kakraa bi hobehu me’ he ne hoobisabisa ho ho asekyerɛ yi?”

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm paa ne sɛ, hobesu atwa agyaadwoɔ, nso wiase ani bɛgye. Hobedi awerɛhoɔ nso ho awerɛhoɔ he bɛdane anigyeɛ.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Sɛ baa ɔɔwo a, ɔte yeyaa efiri sɛ ne berɛ aduru. Na sɛ ɔwo ne ba he a, ɔnkae ne yeyaa he bio esiane anigyeɛ a wanya sɛ wawo nipa aba wiase nti.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Ho nso, seesei deɛ howɔ awerɛhoɔ mu, nso mehu ho bio he, na ho ani agye ho akoma mu, na biaa ntumi nnye ho anigyeɛ he mfiri ho nsam.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Saa da he, hommmisa me asɛm biaa. Nɔkwasɛm paa ne meeka akyerɛ ho sɛ, hobisa bibiaa firi Agya he hɔ ya me dini mu a, ɔde bɛma ho.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Obesi sesɛɛ hommisaa bibiaa a me dini mu. Hommisa, na ho nsa bɛka, na ho anigyeɛ awie pɛyɛ. Asuafoɔ he asomdwie

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: “Menam mfantoho so aka yeinom akyerɛ ho. Berɛ he ɔɔba a memmfa mfantoho ne bɛkasa ho ho bio, na mmom mɛka Agya he ho asɛm akyerɛ ho pefee.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Saa da he me dini mu ne hobebisa. Nso menka nkyerɛ ho sɛ mebisa Agya he ama ho.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: Na Agya he ankasa dɔ ho, efiri sɛ hodɔ me na hoagye adi sɛ mefiri Nyankopɔn nkyɛne ne aba.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: Mefiri Agya he nkyɛne ne aba wiase. Afei deɛ meefiri wiase akɔ Agya he nkyɛne.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: N’asuafoɔ he kaa sɛ, “Hwɛ! Afei wookasa pefee, ɔnyɛ mfantoho so!

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Afei deɛ yɛahu sɛ wonim bibiaa, na onhia sɛ biaa bebisa wo hwee. Yei nti yɛagye adi sɛ wofiri Nyankopɔn hɔ ne baeɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Yesu bisaa bɛ sɛ, “Afei hogye di anaa?”

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Berɛ he ɔɔba, na anya aba awie sɛ ho nyinaa hobɛhwete akɔ ho nkurom, na hoagya me nkoaa. Nso ɔnka me nkoaa efiri sɛ Agya he ka me ho.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: Maaka yeinom nyinaa akyerɛ ho sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a hobenya asomdwie me mu. Hobehyia taa wiase mu. Nso homma ho bo ntɔ ho yam; na maadi wiase so nkunim dada!

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Yesu kaa nsɛm yeinom wieeɛ he, ɔhwɛɛ soro kaa sɛ, “Agya, berɛ he anya aduru, hyɛ wo ba animuonyam na Ba he nso ahyɛ wo animuonyam

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: sɛnea woama no nnipa nyinaa so tumi, sɛ biaa a wode ama no he ɔmma bɛ daa nkwa.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Na yei ne daa nkwa sɛ bebehu wo, wo a aoyɛ Nyankopɔn kann koro he, ne Yesu Kristo nea wasoma no he.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: Mawie adwuma a wode ama me sɛ menyɔ he de ahyɛ wo animuonyam asaase so.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Na afei, Agya, fa animuonyam a na mewɔ no wo nkyɛne ansa na wiase ɔɔba he hyɛ me bio woaa wo nkyɛne.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: “Maada wo dini adi akyerɛ bɛ a wode befiri wiase ama me he. Bɛyɛ wo deɛ ne wode bɛ ama me. Na bɛadi w’asɛm so.

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: Afei bɛahu sɛ adeɛ biaa a wode ama me he nyinaa firi wo nkyɛne;

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ nsɛm a wode maa me he mede ama bɛ; na bɛ nso bɛagye; na bɛahu ampa sɛ, mefiri wo nkyɛne ne baeɛ, na bɛagye adi sɛ wone wosomaa me.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: Meebisa ama bɛ; memmisa mma wiase na mmom mebisa ma bɛ a wode bɛ ama me he, efiri sɛ bɛyɛ wo deɛ.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Nea mewɔ nyinaa yɛ wo dea, na wo deɛ nyinaa nso yɛ me deɛ, na maanya animuonyam yam.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Na afei nso, menni wiase bio, na mmom bɛ deɛ bɛya wiase, na meeba wo nkyɛne. Agya Kronkron, bɔ bɛ a wode bɛ ama me he ho bane wo dini mu na bɛayɛ baako sɛ yɛyɛ baako he.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Meya bɛ nkyɛne he, mede bɛ siee wo dini mu. Mekoraa bɛ yie na bɛ mu baako pɛ mpo annyera gye sɛ yera ba he, na ama twerɛsɛm he aba mu.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: Na afei meeba wo nkyɛne, na meeka yeinom wiase na ama bɛanya m’anigyeɛ, na awie pɛyɛ bɛ mu.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: Mede w’asɛm ama bɛ, na wiase atane bɛ efiri sɛ bɛnyɛ wiase deɛ sɛnea me nso menyɛ wiase deɛ he.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: Mensrɛ sɛ yi befiri wiase, na mmom mesrɛ sɛ bɔ bɛ ho bane firi sɛefoɔ he ho.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Bemfiri wiase sɛnea me nso memfiri wiase he.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Fa nɔkorɛ he te bɛ ho, w’asɛm yɛ nɔkorɛ,

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: sɛnea woasoma me wiase he, saa ne me nso meesoma bɛ wiase.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: Meyɔɔ me kronkron maa bɛ, na bɛ nso bɛ ho ate nɔkorɛ mu.

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: “Mensrɛ mma yeinom nkoaa, na mmom mesrɛ ma bɛ a bɛnam bɛ asɛm so bɛgye me adi nso

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: sɛ bɛ nyinaa bɛbɛyɛ baako, sɛnea wo, Agya, woya me mu, na meya wo mu; sɛ bɛ nso bɛnyɛ baako yɛ mu, na ama wiase agye adi sɛ wone wosomaa me.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: Animuonyam a wode maa me he mede ama bɛ, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ na bɛbɛyɛ baako sɛnea yɛyɛ baako he.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: Meya bɛ mu, na woya me mu, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bebewie pɛyɛ baakoyɛ mu, na wiase ahu sɛ wone woasoma me na wodɔ bɛ sɛnea wodɔ me he.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: Agya mepɛ sɛ bɛ a wode bɛ ama me he ba baabi a meya he. Bɛmmɛka me ho na benhu m’animuonyam a wode ama me he, efiri sɛ wodɔɔ me ansa na wohyɛɛ wiase fapem ase.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: “Oo! Agya Teneneeni, wiase nnim wo, nso menim wo, na yeinom nim sɛ woasoma me.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: Maada wo dini adi akyerɛ bɛ, na mɛda no adi akyerɛ, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a dɔ a wode adɔ me he bɛtena bɛ mu, na matena bɛ mu.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Na sɔfopanyini he akoa a Petro twaa n’aso he busuani kaa sɛ, “Manhu wo ne no turom hɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Na obisaa bɛ bio sɛ, “Hwane ne hoohwehwɛ no?” Na bɛkaa sɛ, “Yesu, Nasareni he a.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Maka akyerɛ ho sɛ ɔyɛ me a.” Nti sɛ me ne hoohwehwɛ me deɛ a, homma saa mmeema yi nkɔ!

english_verse: Then everything will happen, just as I said, ‘I did not lose anyone you gave me.’ ”
translation_verse: Yei maa asɛm a bɛkaeɛ he baam sɛ, “Mamma bɛ a wode bɛ maa me he mu baako koraa anyera.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Na Simon Petro twee sekane twaa sɔfopanyini he akoa aso nifa. Na akoa he de Malko.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Afei asrafokuo he ne bɛ safohene ne Yudafoɔ awɛmfoɔ he kyee Yesu, na bɛkyekyeree no.

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: nso Petro deɛ na ogyina aboboa he ano abɔntene hɔ. Nti suani foforɔ a na sɔfopanyini he nim no he baa abɔntene. Na ɔne baa a na ɔyɛ aboboa he ano hwɛfoɔ he kɔkasae. Na ɔde Petro baa mu.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Na baa he bisaa Petro sɛ, “Wo nso woyɛ beema yi asuafoɔ he mu baako, ɔnte saa?” Petro kaa sɛ, “Daabi menka ho.”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Na esiane sɛ na awɔ yam nti, na nkoa ne awɛmfoɔ he de bidie asɔ gya gyinagyina ho ɔɔto. Na Petro nso ne begyina hɔ ɔɔto gya he bi. Sɔfopanyini he totoo Yesu Ano

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Mmɛ nti ne wobisa me? Bisa bɛ a bɛtee nea meka kyerɛɛ bɛ he; benim nea mekaeɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Na Anas maa bɛkyekyeree Yesu de no kɔmaa sɔfopanyini Kaiafa. Petro yii Yesu mmaa bio

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Na bɛde Yesu firii Kaiafa hɔ kɔɔ amrado Pilato abane mu. Na ɔyɛ anɔpatutuutu. Na Yudafoɔ he ankasa ankɔ amrado abane he mu sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a bengu bɛ ho fi na bɛatumi adi Twam he bi.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Nti Pilato kɔɔ bɛ nkyɛne abɔntene bisaa bɛ sɛ, “Mmɛ soboɔ ne hode ɔɔbɔ saa beema yi?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Bɛkaa sɛ, “Sɛ beema yi nyɛ nipa bɔnefoɔ a, nka yɛamfa no ammrɛ wo.”

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Nti Pilato kɔɔ amrado abane he mu hɔ bio, na ɔfrɛɛ Yesu bisaa no sɛ, “Wo ne Yudafoɔ hene he?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “W’ankasa na woabɔ wo tim ɔɔka yei anaa nipa bi ne kaa me ho asɛm kyerɛɛ wo?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Pilato buaa sɛ, “Menyɛ Yudani, anaa meyɛ bi? Wo ankasa wo manfoɔ ne asɔfoɔ mpanyimfoɔ he ne de wo ahyɛ me nsa. Mmɛ adeɛ ne woayɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “M’ahennie mfiri wiase yi mu. Sɛ nka ofiri wiase yi mu a, nka m’asomfoɔ bɛko na bɛamfa me anhyɛ Yudafoɔ he nsa. Nso m’ahennie mfiri ha.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Pilato bisaa no sɛ, “Nti woyɛ hene?” Yesu buaa sɛ, “Wone wooka sɛ meyɛ hene. Me deɛ yei nti ne bɛwoo me, na mebaa wiase sɛ meebedi nɔkorɛ he ho adanseɛ. Biaa a ofiri nɔkorɛ he tie me nne.”

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Nso howɔ amanneɛ bi sɛ, sɛ Twam duru a megyae nipa baako ma ho. Nti hopɛ sɛ megyae Yudafoɔ hene he ma ho anaa?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: Bɛteaam kaa sɛ, “Ɔnyɛ yie, na mmom Baraba!” Na Baraba yɛ dwotwafoɔ.

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Afei Pilato faa Yesu, na ɔmaa bɛbɔɔ no mmaa.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Na asraafoɔ he de nkasɛe yɔɔ kyɛ de hyɛɛ ne ti, na bɛde ataadeɛ ngugusoɔ kɔkɔɔ bi hyɛɛ no.

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: Na bɛkɔɔ so baa ne nkyɛne bɛkaa sɛ, “Yudafoɔ hene, mo oo mo!” Na bɛbobɔɔ no asotorɔ.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Pilato kɔɔ abɔntene bio kɔka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Hwɛ! Mede no oofiri adi abra ho na hoahu sɛ menhuu ne ho mfomsoɔ biaa.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Nti Yesu firii adi baeɛ a na nkasɛe kyɛ hyɛ no na ataadeɛ ngugusoɔ kɔkɔɔ bi nso hyɛ no. Pilato ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Beema he di!”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Berɛ a asɔfoɔ ne awɛmfoɔ he huu Yesu he, bɛteateaam sɛ, “Bɔ no asennua mu! Bɔ no asennua mu!” Pilato ka kyerɛɛ bɛ sɛ, “Ho ankasa homfa no na hommɔ no asennua mu. Menhu mfomsoɔ biaa ne ho.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Yudafoɔ he buaa no sɛ, “Yɛwɔ mmara, na sɛnea mmara he kyerɛ he ɔsɛ sɛ owu efiri sɛ ɔyɛ ne ho sɛ Nyankopɔn Ba.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Afei berɛ a Pilato tee yei he, osuroo paa.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Ɔkɔɔ n’abane mu bio, na obisaa Yesu sɛ, “Wofiri he?” Na Yesu ammua no.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Na Pilato ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Wommua me? Wonnim sɛ mewɔ tumi sɛ megyae wo anaa mebɔ wo asennua mu?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Yesu buaa sɛ, “Sɛ bɛamfa amfiri soro amma wo a wonnya me so tumi biaa. Ɔno nti nea oyii me maa wo he bɔne so paa.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Ofiri saa berɛ he Pilato kɔɔ so hwehwɛɛ kwane a ɔbɛfa so agyae Yesu, nso Yudafoɔ he teaam kaa sɛ, “Sɛ wogyae beema yi a na wonyɛ Kaesare adamfo. Nipa biaa a ɔyɛ ne ho sɛ hene he kasa tia Kaesare.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Na Pilato tee nsɛm yi, ɔde Yesu pie baa abɔntene na ɔtenaa atemmuo adwa so baabi a bɛfrɛ hɔ Aboɔ-nsɛeɛ, na Hebri kasa mu bɛfrɛ no Gabata.

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Saa berɛ he na bɛɛboaboa bɛ ho ama Twam he, na aabɔ bɛyɛ awia dummienu. Na ɔka kyerɛɛ Yudafoɔ he sɛ, “Hwɛ, ho hene di!”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Na ɔde Yesu maa bɛ sɛ bɛnkɔ bɔ no asennua mu. Bɛbɔɔ Yesu asennua mu (Mateo

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Na asraafoɔ he ba bebubuu nipa a odi kane ne nea ɔka ho he nane mu.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Na Yuda asɔfo mpanyimfoɔ he ka kyerɛɛ Pilato sɛ, “Ntwerɛ sɛ, ‘Yudafoɔ hene,’ na mmom twerɛ sɛ ‘Saa beema yi dɛ, mene Yudafoɔ hene.’ ”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Na Yesu huu ne maame ne suani a ɔdɔ no he sɛ ogyina ne maame nkyɛne he, ɔka kyerɛɛ ne maame sɛ, “Baa, hwɛ, wo ba beema di.”

english_verse: and he carried his cross to a place known as “The Skull.” In Aramaic this place is called “Golgotha.”
translation_verse: berɛ a na ɔno ankasa so n’asennua. Ofirii adi kɔɔ baabi a bɛfrɛ hɔ Tikankuro .

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Hɔ ne bɛbɔɔ ɔne nnipa mmienu asennua mu. Na nnipa mmienu he mu baako ya Yesu nifa ne baako nso ya ne benkum.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Pilato twerɛɛ asɛm bi bɔɔ asennua he atifi. Ɔtwerɛɛ sɛ, “Yesu Nasareni, Yudafoɔ hene he.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Yudafoɔ bebree kane saa ntwerɛeɛ yi efiri sɛ na baabi a bɛbɔɔ Yesu asennua he bɛne kuro he. Bɛtwerɛɛ asɛm yi Hebri ne Roma ne Hela kasa mu.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Pilato kaa sɛ, “Nea matwerɛ he na matwerɛ.”

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Nti bɛkeka kyerɛɛ bɛ ho bɛ ho sɛ, “Hommma yɛ ntete mu, na mmom yɛntwe so ntonto nhwɛ nea ɔbɛyɛ ne deɛ.” Na yei ma twerɛ he baa mu sɛ, “Bɛkyekyɛɛ me ngusoɔ mu faeɛ, na bɛ twee m’ataadeɛ nso so ntonto.”

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Na yei ne nea asraafoɔ he yɔeɛ. Saa berɛ heaa na Yesu maame, ne maame nua baa, Maria a ɔyɛ Klopa yerɛ ne Maria Magdalene gyina Yesu asennua he ho.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Na beduruu Yesu nkyɛne a behuu sɛ wawu dada he, bɛammubu ne nane mu.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Na turo bi ya baabi a bɛbɔɔ no asennua mu he, na nna bi ya turom hɔ a ɔyɛ foforɔ a bensie biaa mu da.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Yei akyi a Yesu huu sɛ woanya awie nnoɔma nyinaa he , ɔkaa sɛ, “Sukɔm de me.”

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Na adeɛ bi si hɔ a nsa kekakeka ahyɛ no ma. Nti bɛde nsa he bi hyɛɛ sapɔ ma de hyɛɛ dua so de kaa n’ano.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Na Yesu gyee nsa he, ɔkaa sɛ, “Mawie!” Osii ne ti ase, na ogyaam. Bɛde pea wɔɔ Yesu mfe

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Na saa da he yɛ ahosiesie da. Na sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a homeda he beduru na amu he nsɛne asennua he so nti, Yudafoɔ he bɛsrɛɛ Pilato sɛ ɔmma bemmubu bɛ a bɛabɔ bɛ asennua he nane mu, na benyi amu he mfiri hɔ.
