translation_verse: Na afei, sɛ bɛpae mu ka sɛ bɛanyane Kristo afiri awufoɔ mu a, obaa no sɛ ne homu binom ka sɛ awufoɔ sɔreeɛ nni hɔ?

english_verse: If they won't be raised to life, Christ himself wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Sɛ awufoɔ sɔreeɛ nni hɔ a, hedeɛ bɛanyane Kristo;

english_verse: And if Christ wasn't raised to life, our message is worthless, and so is your faith.
translation_verse: na sɛ Kristo ansɔre a, hedeɛ na yɛ asɛnka he yɛ kwa, na ho gyidie nso yɛ kwa.

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: Na afei, bebehu yɛ sɛ yɛyɛ Nyankopɔn adansekunumufoɔ, efiri sɛ yedi Nyankopɔn ho adanseɛ sɛ ɔnyanee Kristo— sɛ awufoɔ anyane a, hedeɛ na wanyane no.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Na sɛ awufoɔ nnyane a, hedeɛ Kristo nso annyane.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Sɛ bɛannyane Kristo a, ho gyidie he yɛ kwa na hoda so te ho bɔne mu.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Na sɛ ɔte saa a, na bɛ a bɛadeda Kristo mu he nso he ayera.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Sɛ wiase yi abrabɔ mu nkoaa ne yɛwɔ Kristo mu anidasoɔ a, hedeɛ na yɛne nnipa nyinaa mu mmɔborɔfoɔ.

english_verse: But Christ has been raised to life! And he makes us certain that others will also be raised to life.
translation_verse: Nso nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, bɛanyane Kristo afiri awufoɔ mu, waayɛ bɛ a bɛawu nyinaa aba a odi kane.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ wuo nam nipa so ne baeɛ nti, saa nso ne awufoɔ sɔreeɛ nam nipa so baeɛ;

english_verse: Adam brought death to all of us, and Christ will bring life to all of us.
translation_verse: Na sɛnea nnipa nyinaa wu Adam mu he, saa nso ne bɛ nyinaa benya nkwa Kristo mu.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Na biaa wɔ ne diberɛ: Kristo ne aba a odi kane, na ɔno akyi he bɛ a bɛyɛ Kristo deɛ he nso adi hɔ, sɛ ɔba bio a,

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: ansa na awieeɛ he ɔde ahennie he ahyɛ Agya Nyankopɔn nsa, na watu ahennie ne ahoɔdene ne tumidie nyinaa agu.

english_verse: Christ will rule until he puts all his enemies under his power,
translation_verse: Na ɔsɛ sɛ odi hene kosi sɛ ɔde n’atamfoɔ nyinaa bɛhyɛ ne nane ase.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: Tamfoɔ a otwa toɔ a bɛbɛsɛe no ne wuo.

english_verse: When the Scriptures say he will put everything under his power, they don't include God. It was God who put everything under the power of Christ.
translation_verse: Na “Nyankopɔn de nnoɔma nyinaa ahyɛ ne nane ase.” Na sɛ ɔka sɛ, “Nnoɔma nyinaa hyɛ ne nane ase a,” ɔda hɔ pefee sɛ, deɛ ɔde nnoɔma he guu ne nane ase he nka nnoɔma a ɔhyɛ n’ase he ho.

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Na sɛ nnoɔma nyinaa hyɛ n’ase a, hedeɛ na ba he ankasa de ne ho bɛhyɛ deɛ ɔde nnoɔma hyɛ n’ase he, na Nyankopɔn ayɛ nnoɔma nyinaa so tumfoɔ.

english_verse: If the dead are not going to be raised to life, what will people do who are being baptized for them? Why are they being baptized for those dead people?
translation_verse: Sɛ ɔnte saa a, nka bɛ a bɛma bɛbɔɔ bɛ asu maa awufoɔ he yɔɔ saa de gyee mmɛ? Sɛ benyane awufoɔ a, mmɛ nti ne binom gyina bɛanane mu bɔ asu?

english_verse: And why do we always risk our lives
translation_verse: Ɛɛne nti ne yɛde yɛho to amaneɛ mu bere biaa yi?

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: Mewu da biaa! Anuanom, sɛ mehoahoa meho ho mu a mehoahoa me ho ya yɛ wura Kristo Yesu mu.

english_verse: What do you think I gained by fighting wild animals in Ephesus? If the dead are not raised to life, “Let's eat and drink. Tomorrow we die.”
translation_verse: Na sɛ nnipa anidasoɔ nti ne me ne bɛ a bɛ ani ɔdene sɛ wuram mmoa kõõ Efeso dea, abɛ mfasoɔ ne menya? Sɛ awufoɔ nsɔre a, “Homma yennidi na yɛnom, na kyena na yɛawu.”

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves. Bad friends will destroy you.
translation_verse: Hommma bɛnnnaadaa ho: “Afeku bɔne sɛe bra pa.”

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Homma ho ani nna hɔ, na honnyɔ bɔne; na binom nnim Nyankopɔn. Meka yei de hyɛ ho aniwuo. Soro nipadua ne fam nipadua

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Nso bi bebisa sɛ, Sɛ ne bebesi anyane awufoɔ? Mmɛ nipadua ne bɛde bɛba?

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Wo a wonni adwene! Deɛ wodua he nnya nkwa gye sɛ owu ansa.

english_verse: Wheat seeds and all other seeds look different from the sprouts that come up.
translation_verse: Na deɛ wodua he deɛ, ɔnyɛ deɛ ɔbɛba he ne wodua, na mmom ɔyɛ aba kɛkɛ, ayuo anaa aburo.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn ma yɛ dua a ɔpɛ, na ɔma aba he mu biaa nya ɔnoaa ne dua.

english_verse: People, animals, birds, and fish are each made of flesh, but none of them are alike.
translation_verse: Honam nyinaa nyɛ pɛ, ɔsono nnipa honam, ɔsono ntɔteboa honam, ɔsono nnomaa honam, na ɔsono adwene nso deɛ.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Soro abɔdeɛ ya hɔ ne fam abɔdeɛ nso ya hɔ, ɔsono soro deɛ he animuonyam ne ɔsono fam deɛ he nso.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: Awia animuonyam nko, na bosome nso deɛ nko, nsoromma animuonyam nko, ampa, ɔsono nsoromma biaa animuonyam.

english_verse: These ugly and weak bodies will become beautiful and strong.
translation_verse: Bedua no deɛ onni anidie mu, benyane no animuonyam mu. Bedua no mmerɛyɛ mu, benyane no tumi mu.

english_verse: As surely as there are physical bodies, there are spiritual bodies. And our physical bodies will be changed into spiritual bodies.
translation_verse: Bedua no kra nipadua mu, benyane no honhom nipadua mu. Sɛ honam nipadua ya hɔ a, saa ne honhom nipadua nso ya hɔ.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Bɛatwerɛ sɛ, “Nnipa a odi kane, Adam, bɛyɛɛ kra teasefoɔ”; na Adam a otwa toɔ deɛ, ɔbɛyɛɛ honhom a ma nkwa.

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: Nso ɔnyɛ honhom mu deɛ he ne di kane, na mmom honam he, ansa na honhom.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: Nipa a odi kane he firi fam, ɔyɛ famni, nipa a ɔtɔ so mmienu he firi soro

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ nipa a ofiri fam teɛ he, saa ara ne famfoɔ teɛ; na sɛdeɛ soro nipa he teɛ he, saa ara ne sorofoɔ he nso teɛ.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ yɛ subane te sɛ famni he, saa nso ne yɛbɛfa soroni he nso subane.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: Anuanom, deɛ meeka ne sɛ: honam ne mogyaa ntumi nya Nyankopɔn ahennie, saa ne deɛ ɔporɔ ntumi nya deɛ ɔmporɔ.

english_verse: I will explain a mystery to you. Not every one of us will die, but we will all be changed.
translation_verse: Tie na mɛka wo ahintasɛm! Yɛ nyinaa yenwu, nso yɛ nyinaa bɛsesa,

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: ntɛm so, mpofirem, totorobɛnto a odi akyire he hyɛne mu. Totorobɛnto he bebom, na awufoɔ benyane a bɛmprɔ da, na yɛbɛsesa.

english_verse: Our dead and decaying bodies will be changed into bodies that won't die or decay.
translation_verse: Na deɛ ɔporɔ he bɛhyɛ deɛ ɔmporɔ, na deɛ owu he ahyɛ deɛ onwu.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: Na sɛ deɛ ɔporɔ he hyɛ deɛ ɔmporɔ, na deɛ owu he hyɛ deɛ onwu a, ɔno ne deɛ bɛaka he bɛba mu sɛ: “Waamene wuo nkunim mu.”

english_verse: Where is its victory? Where is its sting?”
translation_verse: Oo! Wuo, wo nkunim ya he? Oo! Wo nwowɔeɛ ya he?

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: Wuo nwowɔeɛ yɛ bɔne, na bɔne tumi ne mmara.

english_verse: But thank God for letting our Lord Jesus Christ give us the victory!
translation_verse: Nso aseda nka Nyankopɔn a ɔnam Awurade Yesu Kristo so ama yɛ adi nkunim.

english_verse: My dear friends, stand firm and don't be shaken. Always keep busy working for the Lord. You know that everything you do for him is worthwhile.
translation_verse: Nti anuanom adɔfoɔ, hontintim, honnhinhim, honkɔ so Awurade adwuma mu daa, efiri sɛ, honim sɛ, ho brɛ ɔnyɛ kwa Awurade mu.

english_verse: When you collect money for God's people, I want you to do exactly what I told the churches in Galatia to do.
translation_verse: Na afei ɔfa toɔ a bɛgye ma ahoteefoɔ he ho deɛ, honni nhyehyɛeɛ a mede maa Galatia asafo ahodoɔ he.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: Nnawɔtwe he mu da a odi kane biaa he, ho mu biaa nhwɛ deɛ wanya na onyi bibi nsie na ho mmoaboa ano, na amma sɛ berɛ a hobehu me hɔ he afei ne hoobɛgyegye ntoboa he.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: Na sɛ meba a, mɛma bɛ a hode nwoma bɛma bɛ de akyerɛ sɛ bɛ ne bɛfata sɛ bɛde ho ntoboa he kɔ Yerusalem he de akɔ.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Na sɛ ohia sɛ me nso mekɔ bi a, mene bɛ bɛkɔ.

english_verse: After I have gone through Macedonia, I hope to see you
translation_verse: Mɛba honkyɛne berɛ a makɔfa Makedonia efiri sɛ mɛfa Makedonia.

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: Na ebia na matena ho nkyɛne kakraa bi anaa mpo medi awɔberɛ he nyinaa ya ho nkyɛne, na hoagya me kwane ama makɔ baabi a mɛkɔ.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: Na mempɛ sɛ meetwa mu nkoaa ne mehu ho, na m’ani da so sɛ, sɛ Awurade ma ho kwane a medi ho nkyɛne nna kakra.

english_verse: I will stay in Ephesus until Pentecost,
translation_verse: Na mɛtena Efeso akosi Pentekoste afahyɛ he,

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ bɛabie pono kɛseɛ a mu adwuma bɛsõ aba ama me, nso bɛ a bɛasɔre atia dɔɔso.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Sɛ Timoteo ba a, honhwɛ na wammɔ hu berɛ a ɔya ho nkyɛne, efiri sɛ ɔɔyɛ Awurade adwuma te sɛ meaa,

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: nti mma biaa mmu no animtia. Honya no kwane asomdwie mu, na ɔmmra me nkyɛne, na meehwɛ ɔne anuanom binom anim.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: Afei, yɛ nua Apolo deɛ, metuu no fo dendenndene sɛ ɔne anuanom mmra ho nkyɛne, nso na ɔmpɛ sɛ ɔbɛba koraa seesei, na sɛ ɔnya kwane a ɔbɛba.

english_verse: Keep alert. Be firm in your faith. Stay brave and strong.
translation_verse: Honwɛne, honyina pintinn ho gyidie mu, honya akokoɔduro, honyɛ dene.

english_verse: Show love in everything you do.
translation_verse: Nea hobɛyɔ nyinaa, honyɔ no dɔ mu.

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Afei anuanom, honim sɛ Stefano fiefoɔ ne nnipa a bedii kane de bɛ ho maa asɛmpa he ya Akaia, na bɛde bɛ ho ama ahoteefoɔ som he.

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: Metu ho fo sɛ hommrɛ ho ho ase mma nnipa a bɛte saa ne biaa a ɔde ne ho hyɛ som adwuma he mu, na ɔne bɛ brɛ bom.

english_verse: I was glad to see Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus. Having them here was like having you.
translation_verse: Na m’ani gye Stefano ne Fortunato ne Akaiko mmaeɛ he ho, efiri sɛ honni menkyɛne he, bɛne bebesii ho anamu;

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Na bɛmaa me honhom ne ho honhom ho dwodwoo bɛ. Nti honnye saa nnipa he ntom.

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Asafo a ɔya Asia he kyeakyea ho. Akwila ne Priska, ne asafo a ɔya bɛ fie he kyea ho bebree, Awurade mu.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Anuanom nyinaa kyea ho. Homfa dɔ nkyea nkyea ho ho.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL.
translation_verse: Me Paulo me nsa ano nkyea di.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi mpɛ Awurade Yesu asɛm a, onnue! Yɛ Awurade bra!

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Yɛ Awurade Yesu adom nka ho ho.

english_verse: I love everyone who belongs to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Me dɔ nka ho nyinaa Kristo Yesu mu. Amen!

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Paulo a ɔnam Nyankopɔn pɛ so ne bɛayi no sɛ Kristo Yesu somafoɔ, ɔne yɛ nua Timoteo, twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Nyankopɔn asafo a bɛya Korinto ɔne ahoteefoɔ nyinaa a bɛya Akaia mane nyinaa mu.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Adom ne asomdwie a ofiri yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Yesu Kristo nka ho. Awerɛkyekyerɛ nsɛm

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Ayeyie nka yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo Nyankopɔn ne n’Agya a ɔyɛ mmɔborɔhunu Agya ne awerɛkyekyefoɔ nyinaa Nyankopɔn,

english_verse: He comforts us when we are in trouble, so that we can share this same comfort with others in trouble.
translation_verse: a ɔkyekyere yɛ werɛ yɛ ahohia nyinaa mu, na yɛatumi afa awerɛkyekyerɛ a Nyankopɔn de kyekyere yɛ werɛ he so akyekyere bɛ a bɛya ahohia biaa mu werɛ.

english_verse: We share in the terrible sufferings of Christ, but also in the wonderful comfort he gives.
translation_verse: Na sɛdeɛ Kristo amaneɛ a Kristo nti yehuiɛ dɔɔso he, saa ara nso ne yɛ awerɛkyekyerɛ dɔɔso Kristo mu.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Na sɛ yɛya ahohiahia mu a, ɔyɛ ho awerɛkyekyerɛ ne ho nkwagyeɛ ntia; na sɛ bɛkyekyere yɛ werɛ a, ɔyɛ awerɛkyekyerɛ a ɔma hotumi gyina amanehunu a yɛ nso yɛhyia bi he mu.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Anidasoɔ yɛwɔ no ho mu he nhinhim; efiri sɛ, yenim sɛ sɛdeɛ ho ne yɛ huu amane he, saa ara nso ne ho ne yɛ kyɛ yɛ awerɛkyekyerɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: Anuanom, yɛmpɛ sɛ yɛde ahohia a ɔbaa yɛ so Asia he sie ho; ahohiahia he mu yɛɛ dene paa maa afei deɛ, yesuroo sɛ yɛ nkwa mpo befiri yɛ nsa.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, yɛtee nka yɛ mu sɛ yebewuwu, saa nti yɛamfa yɛ ho anto yɛ ho so, na mmom Nyankopɔn a onyane awufoɔ he ne yɛ de ho too no so.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: Deɛ ɔgyee yɛ firii wuo amena mu he bɛkɔ so agye yɛ; ne so ne yɛ ani da sɛ ɔbɛkɔ so agye yɛ.

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: Deɛ ho nso hobetumi ayɔ aboa ne sɛ hobɛsrɛ ama yɛ, na ama nnipa pii ada ase ama yɛ ya deɛ nnipa pii mpaebɔ nti bɛde adom yɛ he ho. Paulo ahohoahoa

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Yei ne deɛ yɛde hoahoa yɛ ho a ahonim di ho adanseɛ, sɛ kronkronyɛ ne nɔkorɛdie a ofiri Nyankopɔn mu, a ɔnyɛ nipa nyansa, na mmom Nyankopɔn adom, na yɛde abɔ yɛ bra wiase, ne titire he kwane a yɛfaa so ne ho diiɛ he mu.

english_verse: I am not writing anything you cannot read and understand. I hope you will understand it completely,
translation_verse: Na yɛntwerɛ bibiaa mma ho gye dea hobetumi akenkane na hoate aseɛ nso; mewɔ anidasoɔ sɛ hobɛte aseɛ akosi awieeɛ.

english_verse: just as you already partly understand us. Then when our Lord Jesus returns, you can be as proud of us as we are of you.
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ hoate yɛ aseɛ kwane bi so he, sɛ Awurade Yesu da he, yɛyɛ ho ahohoahoa sɛdeɛ ho nso hoyɛ yɛ ahohoahoa.

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: Menim yei nti ne mepɛɛ sɛ medi kane aba ho nkyɛne, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a hobenya adom mmɔho ne mprenu so;

english_verse: once on my way to Macedonia and again on my return from there. Then you could send me on to Judea.
translation_verse: Mepɛɛ sɛ, sɛ meekɔ Makedonia a, medi kane aba ho nkyɛne, na meesane aba nso a, mafa ho nkyɛne bio na hoagya me kwane ama makɔ Yudea.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: Nti meyɔɔ m’adwene sɛ mɛyɔ saa he, medii adwenharesɛm anaa? Anaa nea mesusuu sɛ mɛyɔ he, mesusuu no sɛ wiaseni a otumi ka sɛ “Ɛɛ” ɔne “Daabi” berɛ korɔ heaa mu?

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Sɛ Nyankopɔn yɛ nɔkwafoɔ yi, yɛ nso yɛ ano nyɛ ntanta da ya nsɛm a yɛka kyerɛ ho he ho.

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn ba he, Yesu Kristo a me ne Silwano ne Timoteo ka n’asɛm he, wanyɛ ano ntanta bibiaa ho, efiri sɛ ɔyɛ nɔkwafoɔ.

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn bɔhyɛ nyinaa yɛ nɔkorɛ. Ne saa nti ɔnam Kristo so ne yɛka “Amen” de hyɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam.

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn ne si so dua sɛ yɛ ne ho yɛ Kristo dea, na waayi yɛ Nyankopɔn mu.

english_verse: and put his Spirit in our hearts to show that we belong only to him.
translation_verse: Afei nso waahyɛ yɛ nsõ, na waama yɛ ne ba he ho nsɛnkyerɛnne a ɔno ne Honhom Kronkron he yɛ akoma mu.

english_verse: God is my witness that I stayed away from Corinth, just to keep from being hard on you.
translation_verse: Sɛ nea meeka yi meboa a, Nyankopɔn mmu me fɔ: na mempɛ sɛ meha ho nti ne mamma Korinto bio he.

english_verse: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ ebia yɛɛhyɛ ho sɛ honye bibi nni, na mmom yɛ ne ho yɔ adwuma bom na ama ho ani agye.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: Nti meyɛɛ m’adwene sɛ me nsrahwɛ a mɛsra ho bio he, ɔnyɛ deɛ ɔde awerɛhoɔ bɛba.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Na sɛ mema hofa yeyaa mu a, hwane bio ne bɛma m’ani agye ka nea mehyɛɛ no yeyaa he?

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: Na metwerɛɛ asɛm yiaa braa ho, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a sɛ meba a, bɛ a ɔsɛ sɛ bɛma m’ani gye he mma me werɛ ɔnho; efiri sɛ mewɔ ho nyinaa mu awerɛhyɛmu, sɛ m’anigyeɛ bɛyɛ ho nyinaa anigyeɛ.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Na mede akoma a ahohia ne ahometeɛ ahyɛ no mma ne nisuo ne meetwerɛ ho, menhyɛ ho yeyaa, na mmom sɛ hobehu dɔ mmorosoɔ deɛ mewɔ ma ho. Betumi gye debɔnyɛni a onu ne ho

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi ahyɛ bi yeyaa a, ɔnyɛ me ne ɔde ahyɛ me, na kwane bi so he, ɔyɛ ho nyinaa— meeka yei akyerɛ ho nyinaa nnɛ ɔnyɛ sɛ anihããhãã so.

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: Animka a nnipa dodoɔ de aka saa nipa he dɔɔso ma no;

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: na afei deɛ, homfa nkyɛ no na honkyekyere ne werɛ na awerɛhoɔ ammene no.

english_verse: You should make them sure of your love for them.
translation_verse: Nti mehyɛ ho nkurane sɛ honyi dɔ adi nkyerɛ no.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne metwerɛɛ saa krataa yi, sɛ meesɔ ho ahwɛ na mahu sɛ hoyɔ setie nnoɔma nyinaa mu anaa.

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Na deɛ hode ne mfomsoɔ bɛkyɛ no he, me nso mede akyɛ no. Na sɛ mede bibi akyɛ a, deɛ mede akyɛ he, ho nti ne mede kyɛeɛ Kristo anim;

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: na Satan annya yɛ, efiri sɛ, yenim n’akwane. Adwumadene ne ne nkɔsoɔ

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: Mebaa Troa bɛkaa Kristo asɛmpa he, kwane bi bie maa me Awurade mu;

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: Nso m’aso mu annwo me, efiri sɛ, manhu me nua Tito hɔ. Nti mekraa bɛ; na mefirii hɔ kɔɔ Makedonia.

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Nso aseda nka Nyankopɔn a odi yɛ asɛm daa ya yɛ ne Kristo nkunimdie santene he mu; ɔma yɛ so ma bɛte ne nimdeɛ hwa ya baabiaa.

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: Na yɛnte sɛ nnipa bebree a bɛnam ɔɔtɔno Nyankopɔn asɛm he, na mmom sɛ bɛ a beyi bɛ yam kasa, Nyankopɔn mu; na yɛkasa Kristo mu ya Nyankopɔn anim.

english_verse: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
translation_verse: Yeefiri aseɛ asane ayi yɛ ho ayɛ? Anaa ohia ma yɛ sɛ yɛde ayeyie krataa bra ho anaa yenya bi firi honkyɛne sɛnea binom yɔ no he?

english_verse: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
translation_verse: Ho ankasa hote sɛ krataa a bɛatwerɛ no yɛ akoma mu, na nnipa nyinaa hu kenkane;

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: na hoda no adi sɛ, hoyɛ Kristo krataa a bɛnam yɛ so atwerɛ, krataa a bɛamfa adubire na mmom Nyankopɔn honhom ne bɛde atwerɛ, ɔnyɛ aboɔ pono so na mmom nnipa akoma pono so.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: Yei ne ahotɔsoɔ a yɛanya no Kristo mu Nyankopɔn fam.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ yɛfata sɛ yebesusu ahu bibi sɛ ofiri yɛ mu; na mmom fata a yɛfata he firi Nyankopɔn mu.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne wama yɛafata sɛ apam foforɔ mu asomfo, ɔnyɛ atwerɛeɛ mu na mmom Honhom mu; efiri sɛ, mmara atwerɛeɛ he bu fɔ kɔ wuom, na honhom he deɛ, ɔma nkwa.

english_verse: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
translation_verse: Na afei sɛ wuo som a bɛde atwerɛdeɛ kurukyire guu aboɔ so nyaa animuonyam a Israelfoɔ antumi annyene bɛ ani anhwɛ Mose anim, ɔnam n’animuonyam a otwam he nti a,

english_verse: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
translation_verse: ɔbɛyɛ dɛ ne Honhom som he mmom onnya animuonyam?

english_verse: If something that brings the death sentence is glorious, won't something that makes us acceptable to God be even more glorious?
translation_verse: Na sɛ afobuo som he yɛ animuonyam a, hedeɛ na tenenee som he boro so bebree animuonyam mu!

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Na mpo deɛ na kane he ɔwɔ animuonyam he nni animuonyam bio ɔnam animuonyam a ɔboro saa he nti.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Na sɛ deɛ beyi sii nkyɛne he nam animuonyam mu ne baeɛ a, hedeɛ na deɛ ɔtena hɔ daa he wɔ animuonyam bebree.

english_verse: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ yɛwɔ saa anidasoɔ yi nti, yɛde akokoɔduro kasa,

english_verse: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
translation_verse: ɔnyɛ sɛ Mose a ɔde nkatanimu kataa n’anim na Israel mma antumi annyene bɛ ani anhwɛ deɛ ootwa mu he awieeɛ.

english_verse: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
translation_verse: Nso na bɛ akoma ɔdene; nɔkorɛ, ɔde besi nnɛ, sɛ bɛkenkane apam dadaa he a, nkatanimu heaa da so ya hɔ osiane sɛ Kristo nkoaa mu ne otwa mu.

english_verse: When the Law of Moses is read, they have their minds covered over
translation_verse: Nɔkorɛ, ɔde besi nnɛ, sɛ bɛkenkane Mose nwoma he a, nkatanimu he da so kata bɛ adwene so;

english_verse: with a covering that is removed only for those who turn to the Lord.
translation_verse: nso sɛ bi dane ne ho hwɛ Awurade a, nkatanimu he firi hɔ.

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Na Awurade ne Honhom he, na baabi a Awurade Honhom ya he, faahodie ya hɔ.

english_verse: So our faces are not covered. They show the bright glory of the Lord, as the Lord's Spirit makes us more and more like our glorious Lord.
translation_verse: Na yɛ nyinaa yɛayi nkatanimu he afiri yɛ anim ne yɛɛhwɛ Awurade animuonyam te sɛ yɛɛhwɛ ahwehwem, wasesa yɛ afiri adom mu kɔ adom mu, na yei firi Awurade, honhom he.

english_verse: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
translation_verse: Saa nti yɛmpa aba, osiane sɛ Nyankopɔn nam ne mmɔborɔhunu so ne de saa som adwuma yi ama yɛ.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: Yɛatwe yɛ ho afiri sum ase nnoɔma a ɔyɛ aniwuo he ho; yɛmma nnaadaa mma yɛ akwane mu; saa ara nso ne yɛmfra Nyankopɔn asɛm mu; na mmom yɛda nɔkorɛ he adi de di yɛ ho adanseɛ kyerɛ nnipa nyinaa ahonim ya Nyankopɔn anim.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: Na sɛ yɛ asɛmpa he so akata ampa a, so akata ama bɛ a bɛɛyera.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: Bɛ mu ne wiase nyame afira bɛ a bɛnnye nni he adwene ani, sɛ benhu asɛmpa he ho hann a ɔyɛ Kristo a ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn subane he animuonyam.

english_verse: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ yɛ ho asɛm ne yɛka na mmom yɛpae mu ka sɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ Awurade na yɛ deɛ yɛyɛ ho nkoa Yesu nti;

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn kaa sɛ, “Hann mfiri sum mu nhyerɛn,” ɔnoaa ne ahyerɛn yɛ akoma mu, sɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam a ɔya Yesu Kristo anim he nimdeɛ nhyerɛn.

english_verse: We are like clay jars in which this treasure is stored. The real power comes from God and not from us.
translation_verse: Nso yɛwɔ saa agyapadeɛ yi ya nɛteɛ anwenneɛ mu, na aada adi pefee sɛ, saa tumi a ɔboro so he yɛ Nyankopɔn deɛ, na mmom omfiri yɛ.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Yɛ ho ahiahia yɛ akwane nyinaa mu, nso yɛ homee nteeɛ; yɛ ho akyere yɛ, nso yɛ ani ntaneeɛ;

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: bɛtaa yɛ, nso Nyankopɔn nyii yɛ mmaeɛ; bɛbɔ yɛ hwe hɔ, nso yɛnsɛe;

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Na yɛte ase yi, beyi yɛ ma wuo dabiaa ɔnam Kristo nti, na ama Kristo wuo he ada adi yɛ honam a obewu he mu.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Nti wuo di dwuma yɛ mu, na nkwa di dwuma ho mu.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: Na sɛdeɛ yɛwɔ honhom mu gyidie korɔ sɛdeɛ atwerɛ he teɛ he, “Megye diiɛ, na ɔma mekasaeɛ,” yɛ nso yɛgye di na ɔma yɛkasa,

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ yenim sɛ deɛ ɔnyanee Awurade Yesu he benyane yɛ ne no nso, na ɔde yɛ ne ho aba n’anim.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, ho nti ne bibiaa ya hɔ, na sɛdeɛ adom trɛ ka nnipa bebree he, aseda nso adɔɔso ahyɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam.

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Nti yɛ akoma ntu, ɔyam sɛ yɛ nipadua he ɔɔsɛe deɛ, nso yɛ honhom he yɛ foforɔ da biaa.

english_verse: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
translation_verse: Na saa amanehunu kakra yi a yɛɛfam yi, oosiesie yɛ ama daa animuonyam a ɔboro adeɛ nyinaa so a yentumi mfa seesei amanehunu yi ntoto ho koraa,

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ yɛmfa yɛ ani nsi nnoɔma a yehu so, na mmom nea yenhu so; efiri sɛ nea yehu he twam frɛdɛ, na nea yenhu he ya hɔ afebɔɔ.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Na yenim sɛ, sɛ bɛsɛe yɛ asaase yi so ntomadane a yɛte mu yi a, yɛwɔ ntomadane a ofiri Nyankopɔn hɔ, ntomadane a bɛamfa nsa ne siiɛ, a ɔya soro hɔ daa,

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ ntomadane yei mu deɛ yesi apinie, na yɛɛhwɛ kwane sɛ yɛbɛhyɛ yɛ soro ntomadane

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: ɔno ne sɛ yɛhyɛ a, benhu yɛ sɛ yɛdeda adagya.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: Na mmerɛ a yɛda so ya saa ntomadane yi mu yi, yɛ ahokyerɛ mu ne yesi apinie, efiri sɛ yɛmpɛ sɛ yeyi gu hɔ, na mmom yɛpɛ sɛ yɛhyɛ baako he ka ho sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a nkwa bɛmene wuo he.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Deɛ wasiesiee saa nnoɔma yi ama yɛ ne Nyankopɔn, ɔno ne de Honhom he ama yɛ sɛ nea ɔbɛba he ho nsɛnkyerɛnne.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: Ne saa nti, yɛwɔ awerɛhyɛmu daa; mpo yenim sɛ mmerɛ a yɛda so te saa nnipadua yi mu yi, yenni Awurade nkyɛne—

english_verse: But we live by faith, not by what we see.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ yɛnam gyidie so ne nante, na ɔnyɛ nea yehu so.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: Ampa, yɛwɔ akokoɔduro, na yɛ ani gye ho mmom sɛ yebefiri nnipadua mu na yɛ ne Awurade akɔtena.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Ne saa nti sɛ yɛya ne nkyɛne oo, sɛ yenni ne nkyɛne oo, yɛ botae ne sɛ yɛbɛsɔ n’ani.

english_verse: After all, Christ will judge each of us for the good or the bad that we do while living in these bodies. Bringing People to God
translation_verse: Na ɔsɛ sɛ yɛ nyinaa yɛkogyina Kristo atemmuo adwa he anim, na biaa anya n’akatua nea ɔde ne nnipadua yɔɔeɛ ho, sɛ ɔyɛ papa anaa bɔne. Nkabom adwuma

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: Saa nti, yɛbɔ mmɔdene sɛ yebetu afoforɔ fo osiane sɛ yenim Awurade suro nti; na yɛ deɛ Nyankopɔn nim yɛ, na mewɔ anidasoɔ sɛ honim yɛ yie ho ahonim mu.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Yenni yɛ ho adanseɛ nkyerɛ ho bio, nso yɛama ho akwannya a hode yɛ bɛhoahoa ho ho, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a hobenya mmuaeɛ ama bɛ a bɛhoahoa bɛ ho honam fam nso ɔnnyɛ akoma mu he;

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, sɛ yɛbɔ dam a, yɛbɔ ma Nyankopɔn; na sɛ yɛ adwene mu da hɔ a, ɔda hɔ ma ho.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Na yeinom nyinaa mu he, Kristo dɔ he ne hyɛ yɛ, efiri sɛ, yenim pefee sɛ baako wu maa yɛ nyinaa; saa deɛ a ɔte sɛ yɛ nyinaa yɛawu.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: Na owu maa yɛ nyinaa, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a bɛ a bɛte ase he ntena ase mma bɛ ho bio, na mmom bɛbɛtena ase ama deɛ owuiɛ na ɔsɔre maa bɛ he.

english_verse: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
translation_verse: Nti, ofiri nnɛ ɔɔkɔ yi, yennim biaa honam fam; ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ sɛ na yenim Kristo honam fam deɛ, nso yenhu no saa bio.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: Nti sɛ bi ya Kristo mu a, ɔyɛ abɔdeɛ foforɔ: nnoɔma dadaa he nyinaa atwam; hwɛ, nnoɔma nyinaa ayɛ foforɔ!

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: Yei nyinaa firi Nyankopɔn, ɔno ne nam Kristo so atwe yɛ abata ne ho, na ɔde mpata adwuma he ahyɛ yɛ nsa;

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: ɔne sɛ, na Nyankopɔn nam Kristo so ɔɔpata atwe wiase aba ne nkyɛne a, ommu bɛ bɔne ntia bɛ, na ɔde mpata asɛm ama yɛ.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: Nti yɛyɛ Kristo anamusifoɔ, ɔne sɛ Nyankopɔn nam yɛ so ootu fo; nti yegyina Kristo anamu tu ho fo sɛ, homma bɛmpata ntwe ho mfam Nyankopɔn ho.

english_verse: Christ never sinned! But God treated him as a sinner, so Christ could make us acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Na yɛ nti nea onnim bɔne he, Nyankopɔn de yɛ bɔne ho afobuo to ne so, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a yɛnam ne so bɛyɛ tenenee ama Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Na yɛ a yɛne no bom yɔ adwuma he tu ho nso fo sɛ hommma Nyankopɔn adom a hoanya he nyɛ kwa;

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “When the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.” That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, ɔka sɛ, “Berɛ a ɔsɛ mu ne matie wo, na nkwagyeɛ da he mu ne maboa wo.” Hwɛ nnɛ ne adom berɛ; hwɛ, nnɛ ne nkwagyeɛ da! Asomafoɔ he adansedie

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: Na yɛnto biaa sintidua na bɛannya asɛmmɔne biaa anka amfa yɛ som adwuma ho,

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: na adeɛ nyinaa mu yɛda yɛ ho adi sɛ Nyankopɔn asomfoɔ. Yɛafa Boasetɔ pii mu, ahohia mu, ahokyerɛ mu, atowerɛnkyɛm mu,

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: hweɛ mu, afiase nna mu, sakasaka mu, adwumadene mu, kɔdaanna mu, kɔm mu.

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: Nea ɔboaa yɛ maa yɛyɔɔ ne nyinaa ne ahoteɛ, Nyankopɔn nimdeɛ, abotrɛ, ayamyɛ, honhom mu kronkronyɛ, dɔ mapa,

english_verse: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
translation_verse: nɔkorɛ asɛnka ne Nyankopɔn tumi a tenenee akodeɛ a ɔya yɛ nsa nifa ne benkum ka ho;

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: yɛ sane animuonyam ne animguaseɛ mu, atenka bɔne ne atenka pa mu. Bebuu yɛ sɛ asisifoɔ nso yɛyɛ nɔkwafoɔ;

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: sɛ nnipa a bennim bɛ, nso benim yɛ paa; sɛ nnipa a beewu, nso hwɛ—yɛte ase; sɛ nnipa a bɛtwe bɛ aso, nso benku yɛ;

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: sɛ nnipa a beedi awerɛhoɔ, nso yɛ ani gye daa; sɛ ahiafoɔ, nso yɛma nnipa bebree nya bɛ ho; sɛ nnipa a benni hwee nso yɛwɔ nnoɔma nyinaa.

english_verse: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
translation_verse: O! Korintofoɔ; yɛakasa akyerɛ ho nɔkorɛ kwane so, yɛabie yɛ akoma mu ama ho.

english_verse: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
translation_verse: Yɛmfaa yɛ dɔ nkamee ho, na mmom ho ne hotwetwe ho nane ase yɛ ho.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: Na meeka yei akyerɛ ho sɛ mma—nea hobɛyɔ ahyɛ yɛ anamu ne sɛ ho nso hobebie ho akoma mu ama yɛ. Bɛbraa bɛ ne abosonsomfoɔ ntam ayɔnkofa

english_verse: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
translation_verse: Ho ne bɛ a bɛnnye nni nnya twaka biaa. Na mmɛ ayɔnkofa ne da tenenee ne amumuyɔ ntam? Anaa ayɔnkofa bɛneɛ ne da hann ne sum ntam?

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Na abɛ koroyɛ ne da Kristo ne Bilia ntam? Anaa abɛ twaka ne da gyidini ne deɛ ɔnnye nni ntam?

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Mmɛ ne abosom wɔ yɔ ne Nyankopɔn asɔrefie? Na yɛyɛ Nyankopɔn Teasefoɔ he asɔredane; sɛnea Nyankopɔn kaeɛ he, Mɛtena bɛ mu na mɛnante bɛ mu, na mɛyɛ bɛ Nyankopɔn, na bɛbɛyɛ me nkurofoɔ.

english_verse: The Lord also says, “Leave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
translation_verse: Nti homfiri bɛ mu, na honte ho ho mfiri bɛ ho, Awurade ne aka na hommfa ho nsa nka adeɛ a ho nte biaa; na mɛgye ho,

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: na mɛyɛ ho agya, na hobɛyɛ me mma, Awurade Tumfoɔ ne aka.

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ yɛwɔ saa bɔhyɛ yi nti, adɔfoɔ, homma yɛnhohoro yɛ ho mfiri honam ne honhom fi nyinaa ho, na yɛ kronkronyɛ awie mu die Nyankopɔn suro mu. Paulo ne agyidifoɔ ntam dɔ

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Hommie ho akoma mu mma yɛ; yɛnyɔɔ biaa bɔne, yɛnsɛe biaa, yɛnsisii biaa.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: Menka yei afobuo kwane so, efiri sɛ maaka dada sɛ, yɛ ne ho ntam ɔntete da, sɛ wuo mu oo, sɛ nkwa mu oo, hoya yɛ akoma mu.

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: Mede ho hoahoa me ho, mewɔ ahotɔsoɔ pii ya ho mu; awerɛkyekyerɛ ahyɛ me ma; na m’ani gye boro so yɛ ahohia nyinaa mu mpo.

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Na yɛbaa Makedonia he, yɛannya homee biaa, nso yɛ ho hiahiaa yɛ kwane nyinaa mu—akasakasaa atwa yɛ ho ahyia na hu ahyɛ yɛ ma.

english_verse: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
translation_verse: Nso Nyankopɔn nam ba a ɔma Tito baa yɛ nkyɛne he so maa yɛ awerɛkyekyerɛ,

english_verse: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
translation_verse: na ɔnyɛ ne mmaeɛ he nko, na mmom awerɛkyekyerɛ nso a onyaa no ho ho na ɔsane ka kaa ho sɛ ho ani agyina yɛ, na ho werɛ aho, na hoku ho ho ma me; na ɔmaa m’ani gyee pii.

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: Medi ahurusie seesei, na ɔnyɛ sɛ ho werɛ hoeɛ he ntia, na mmom sɛ ho awerɛhodie he de adwensakra baeɛ ntia; efiri sɛ ho werɛ hoo Nyankopɔn kwane so, na yɛ mu bi anha ho kwane biaa so.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn mu awerɛhodie de adwensakra a ɔde nkwagyeɛ ba a nnuho biaa nni akyire ne ba, nso wiase awerɛhodie de wuo ne ba.

english_verse: Just look what God has done by making you feel sorry! You sincerely want to prove you are innocent. You are angry. You are shocked. You are eager to see that justice is done. You have proved that you were completely right in this matter.
translation_verse: Na honhwɛ ahokeka a mmɔdene a hobɔ yi ho ho ano, ɔne ahi ne hu ne anigyina ne mmɔdenmmɔ ne asotwe a saa Nyankopɔn kwane so awerɛhodie yi de abra ho. Na bibiaa mu he hoyii ho ho kyerɛɛ sɛnea ho ho teɛ, asɛm he mu.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: Nti sɛ metwerɛ ho a, na ɔnyɛ deɛ wafom he ntia, saa nso ne ɔnyɛ deɛ ɔyɛ bɔne he ntia, na mmom sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a nsiyɛ a howɔ no yɛ ho he bɛda adi ama ho Nyankopɔn anim.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
translation_verse: Yei mu ne yenya awerɛkyekyerɛ. Na yɛ awerɛkyekyerɛ he maa yɛ ani gye boroo so, ɔnam Tito anigyeɛ he nti, efiri sɛ ho nyinaa homaa n’akoma tɔɔ ne yam.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: Na sɛ mede ho hoahoa me ho kyerɛ no a, m’ani nwu, na mmom sɛnea yɛkaa ho nsɛm nyinaa nɔkorem he, saa ara nso ne yɛ ahohoa a yɛhoahoa yɛ ho Tito anim he nso ada adi sɛ ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ.

english_verse: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
translation_verse: Na hoda n’akoma so paa, na ɔkae ho nyinaa setie ɔne sɛnea hode suro ne ahopopoɔ gyee no he.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: M’ani agye sɛ bibiaa mu mewɔ ho mu awerɛhyɛmu.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Nti anuanom yɛpɛ sɛ hohu Nyankopɔn adom a ɔde adom Makedonia asafo ahodoɔ he;

english_verse: Although they were going through hard times and were very poor, they were glad to give generously.
translation_verse: ɔne sɛ bɛ ahohia sɔhwɛ kɛseɛ mu he, berɛ a na bɛya hia bebree mu mpo he, bɛ anigyeɛ buu so maa beyii ayamyɛ kɛseɛ kyerɛeɛ.

english_verse: They gave as much as they could afford and even more, simply because they wanted to.
translation_verse: Na metumi adi adanseɛ sɛ, befiri bɛ ankasa bɛ pɛ mu maa sɛdeɛ bebetumi, na bɛma maa no boroo bɛ ahoɔdene so mpo.

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: Na bɛkoto srɛɛ yɛ anibereɛ so sɛ yɛmma bɛ ho kwane na bɛ nso bɛmfa nea bɛwɔ nsom ahoteefoɔ he bi—

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: nea bɛyɔeɛ he boroo sɛnea yɛsusuiɛ he, na bedii kane de bɛ ho maa Awurade, ɔne yɛ nso, sɛnea Nyankopɔn pɛ, ansa na bɛɛyɔ saa ayamyɛ yi,

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: na ama yɛasrɛ Tito sɛ, sɛnea na wahyɛ aseɛ sɛ ɔyɔɔ he, onwie saa adom adwuma he ho mu.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: Afei sɛnea hoda nsõ adeɛ nyinaa mu he—gyidie mu, kasa mu, nimdeɛ mu, ahokeka mu, ɔne ho dɔ a hode dɔ yɛ he mu— saa ne yɛ pɛ sɛ hoda nsõ saa adom adwuma yi nso mu.

english_verse: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
translation_verse: Menka yei nhyɛsoɔ so, na mmom menam binom mmɔdenmmɔ so ɔɔsɔ ho dɔ ahwɛ.

english_verse: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
translation_verse: Na honim yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo adom he, sɛ na ɔde ne ho adeɛ nyinaa mu deɛ, nso ho nti ɔgyaee ne nyinaa too hɔ, na ama ho abɛyɛ adefoɔ nnoɔma nyinaa mu.

english_verse: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
translation_verse: Na m’adwenekyerɛ fa ho ne sɛ, ɔfata sɛ afei howie deɛ afe di hohyɛɛ aseɛ na honyaa pɛ sɛ hobɛyɔ he—

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: nti afei honnwie ne yɔ, na ama sɛnea honyaa pɛ sɛ hobɛyɔ he, hoafiri nea howɔ he mu awie no saa.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi wɔ pɛ sɛ ɔde bibi kyɛ nkoaa deɛ a, hedeɛ Awurade hwehwɛ sɛ ɔde nea ɔwɔ ne bɛkyɛ na mmom, ɔnyɛ nea onni.

english_verse: I am not trying to make life easier for others by making life harder for you. But it is only fair
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ sɛ mepɛ sɛ binom ho dwo bɛ na ho deɛ ho ho hiahia ho, na mmom sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a biaa benya ne so ne ne deɛ.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Na nea hoanya ama no aboro so seesei he, homfa mma bɛ a bɛya ahohiahia mu, na sɛ bɛ nso benya bi ma no boro so a bɛde ama ho, ho ahohiahiaberɛ mu, na ama biaa anya n’ahiadeɛ,

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “Those who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.” Titus and His Friends
translation_verse: sɛnea bɛatwerɛ sɛ: “Deɛ ɔboaboaa bebree ano he annya ammoro so, na deɛ ɔwɔ ketewa bi he anhia no ammoro so.” Tito ne ne nnamfonom

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: Na aseda nka Nyankopɔn a ɔde ho ho mmɔdene a mebɔ heaa bi ahyɛ Tito akoma mu.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ yɛ afutuo nkoaa ne otieeɛ na mmom ɔnam ɔnoaa ne mmɔdemmɔ ne ne pɛ so ne ɔɔba ho nkyɛne.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Na yɛasoma ɔne ne onua bi a asafo he nyinaa agye no atom ɔnam asɛmpa a ɔka he nti,

english_verse: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
translation_verse: na ɔnyɛ yei nko, na ɔno ne asafo he ayi no sɛ ɔne yɛ nnante nkura adom adwuma he mu mma Awurade ankasa animuonyam na ɔnna yɛ pɛ pa he adi.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
translation_verse: Yɛbɔ mmɔdene sɛ yɛmma biaa nnya ntoboa a yɛde yɔ ayɛ he ho asɛm biaa nka;

english_verse: But we want to do what pleases the Lord and what people think is right.
translation_verse: na yɛ botaeɛ ne sɛ yɛbɛyɔ deɛ ɔtene, ɔnyɛ Awurade anim nkoaa, na mmom nnipa anim nso.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Na yɛasoma yɛ nua a yɛasɔ no ahwɛ sɛ ɔyɛ mmɔdemmɔfoɔ nnoɔma bebree mu he aka bɛ ho, na afei awerɛhyɛmu a ɔwɔ no ho mu nti, ɔma ne mmɔdemmɔ a ɔbɔ seesei he boro so.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Na Tito deɛ, ɔyɛ me yɔnko ne me yɔnko dwumayɔni ma ho; yɛ nuanom deɛ, bɛyɛ asafo hodoɔ, Kristo animuonyam he asomafoɔ.

english_verse: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
translation_verse: Nti honna ho dɔ a yɛde hoahoa yɛ ho he nkyerɛ bɛ a bɛya asafo ahodoɔ he anim.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: Na afei, ɔfa som a hode som ahoteefoɔ he ho deɛ, onhia sɛ mɛtwerɛ ho asɛm abra ho,

english_verse: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ menim ho mmɔdene a hobɔ a mede hoahoa me ho kyerɛ Makedoniafoɔ, sɛ Akaiafoɔ asiesie bɛ ho afe di; na ho ahokeka he akanyane bɛ mu bebree.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Na meesoma anuanom yi sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a ahoahoa a yɛde ho hoahoa yɛ ho saa kwane yi so he nyɛ kwa, na hoayɛ ahoboa, sɛdeɛ mekaa sɛ hobɛyɔ he;

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: anyɛ saa na Makedoniafoɔ he bi ne me ba behu sɛ honsiesie ho ho a, yɛ anim begu ase sɛ yɛde yɛ ho too ho so nti.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: Nti medwene sɛ obehia sɛ metu anuanom he fo sɛ benni yɛ anim kane, mmɛgye akyɛdeɛ a hoayi ho yam de ama, na anyɛ bibi a hoagye no hyɛ so.

english_verse: Remember this saying, “A few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.”
translation_verse: Nea ɔteɛ ne sɛ: nea ɔdua kakraa bi he, betwa kakraa bi, na nea odua bebree he betwa bebree, na deɛ odua no bafuu he nso betwa no bafuu.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Biaa mma sɛnea osusu no n’akomam, ɔnyɛ amemenemfe anaa hyɛ so, efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn dɔ nea ɔte n’anim ma.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn betumi ama adom nyinaa aboro so ama ho, na nnoɔma nyinaa mu ne daa nyinaa hoanya deɛ ɔdɔɔso ma ho nyinaa, na ho aboro so adwuma-pa nyinaa mu.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.”
translation_verse: Sɛnea bɛatwerɛ sɛ, “Ɔto pete, ɔde ma ahiafoɔ; ne tenenee ya hɔ daa.”

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: Nea ɔde aba ma gufoɔ na ɔma nipa aduane di he bɛma ho aba a hobegu he adɔɔso na wama ho tenenee aba ayɛ bebree.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Na hobenya ho ho nnoɔma nyinaa mu ɔnam ho ayamyɛ kɛseɛ nti, na ɔnam yɛ so ama Nyankopɔn anya aseda;

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, som yi ho adwuma ma ahoteefoɔ nya nea ohia bɛ, na ɔsane nso de aseda mmorosoɔ bra Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: Esiane som yi ho adanseɛ nti, bɛhyɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam ho setie a hode ka Kristo asɛmpa he nti, na afei ho yi ho yam yi ntoboa de kɔma bɛ ne nnipa nyinaa,

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: na bɛ ani begyina ho na bɛabɔ mpaeɛ ama ho, ɔnam Nyankopɔn adom mmorosoɔ a ɔde ama ho nti.

english_verse: Thank God for his gift that is too wonderful for words!
translation_verse: Aseda nka Nyankopɔn a ɔnam n’akyɛdeɛ a onni kabea he nti.

english_verse: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
translation_verse: Afei m’ankasa Paulo a sɛ meya honkyɛne a, meyɛ hufoɔ, nso sɛ menni honkyɛne a meyɛ kokoɔdurufoɔ ma ho he, menam Kristo dwoɔ ne n’ayamyɛ so srɛ ho,

english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: na sɛ meba honkyɛne a mamfa ahotɔsoɔ anyɔ m’adeɛ akokoɔduro so sɛnea mede nnamyɛ yɔ adeɛ tia bɛ a bɛhwɛ yɛ sɛnea yɛteɛ honam mu he.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ yɛte ase honam mu deɛ, nso yenni akõ honam fam,

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: efiri sɛ akodeɛ a yɛde kɔ kõ he nyɛ honam fa mu deɛ, nso Nyankopɔn tumi ya mu sɛ yetumi de tutu nnoɔma a agye nhini gu. Yɛsɛe nsusuiɛ

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: ne bibiaa a ɔsõ a bɛama so atia Nyankopɔn nimdeɛ, na yɛafa adwene nyinaa nommum de ahyɛ Kristo asoɔmmerɛ ase.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Na yɛasiesie yɛ ho sɛ, sɛ hoyɔ setie adeɛ nyinaa mu a, yɛde asoɔdene nyinaa asotwe bɛma.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Honhwɛ deɛ ɔda hɔ pefee. Sɛ bi wɔ gyidie sɛ ɔyɛ Kristo deɛ a, ɔnkae sɛ, sɛdeɛ ɔyɛ Kristo deɛ he, saa ara ne yɛ nso yɛyɛ ne deɛ.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Na afei sɛ me hoahoa me ho boro so kakra ya tumidie a Awurade de ama yɛ sɛ yɛmfa nhyɛ ho dene, na ɔnyɛ sɛ yɛde bebu ho aba mu he ho mpo a, m’ani nwu.

english_verse: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
translation_verse: Mempɛ sɛ ɔbɛyɛ ho sɛ mede nkrataa yi ɔɔbɔ ho hu;

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, bɛka sɛ, “Ne krataa he mu oduru na tumi yam, nso ɔya yɛ ntam a, ɔmmerɛ, na ɔkasa nso a, bɛmfa n’asɛm nyɔ hwee.”

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ saa nipa he te aseɛ sɛ, nea yɛ krataa da no adi fa yɛ ho he, ne nea yɛya hɔ a yɛbɛyɔ he mmɔ abira.

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Na yɛdeɛ yɛnhoahoa yɛ ho mma no ntra so, na mmom nea yɛhoahoa yɛ ho ya ho nyinaa yɛ dwumadie a Nyankopɔn de ahyɛ yɛ nsa nkoaa, na ho nso ho ka saa adwuma he ho.

english_verse: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
translation_verse: Na yɛanyɔ antra adwuma a Nyankopɔn de maa yɛ sɛ yɛnyɔ berɛ a yɛbaa ho nkyɛne he; efiri sɛ yɛde Kristo asɛmpa he abeduru ho nkyɛne nso.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Na yɛnhoahoa yɛ ho mma ɔntra so nkoduru binom adwuma ho, na yɛ ani da so sɛ, ho gyidie nyini a, yɛbɛyɔ ho mu kɛseɛ aboro so, sɛdeɛ adwuma a ɔde hyɛɛ yɛ nsa he teɛ

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: na ama yɛapae mu aka asɛmpa he ya nsaase a ɔya akyi nohoaa, na yɛamfa binom adwuma a bɛayɔ dada he anhoahoa yɛ ho.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “If you want to brag, then brag about the Lord.”
translation_verse: “Na ma deɛ ɔhoahoa ne ho he nhoahoa ne ho Awurade mu.”

english_verse: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ deɛ oyi ne ho ayɛ ne fata, na mmom deɛ Awurade yi no ayɛ he ne fata.

english_verse: I am as concerned about you as God is. You were like a virgin bride I had chosen only for Christ.
translation_verse: Na ninkunu a metwe ya ho ho he, metwe no Nyankopɔn mu. Efiri sɛ maahyɛ bɔ sɛ mede ho bɛma agye beema baako awadeɛ, na mede ho ama Kristo sɛ babunu bi a fi nka no da.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Nso mesuro sɛ, ebia, sɛdeɛ wɔ he de n’aniteɛ bɛdaadaa Hawa he, saa ara nso ne bɛbɛdane ho adwene afiri Kristo mu ahofama mapa a owie pɛyɛ he.

english_verse: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi bɛpae mu ka Yesu foforɔ a ɔnyɛ nea yɛkaa ne ho asɛm he ho asɛm kyerɛ ho a, anaa sɛ hogye honhom foforɔ bi a ɔnyɛ nea hogyeeɛ he a, anaa sɛ hogye asɛmpa foforɔ a ɔnyɛ nea hoagye he a, hedeɛ na hoagye no ntɛm dodo.

english_verse: I think I am as good as any of those super apostles.
translation_verse: Nso mehu sɛ asomafoɔ a hobu bɛ atitire he nkyɛne me bibiaa mu.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Na sɛ m’ano nteeɛ kasa mu mpo a, ɔnyɛ nimdeɛ mu; nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, yɛama bibiaa ada adi ama ho, nnipa nyinaa anim.

english_verse: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
translation_verse: Anaa mayɔ bɔne sɛ mekaa Nyankopɔn asɛmpa he kyerɛɛ ho kwa na mebrɛɛ me ho ase sɛ ɔbɛyɔ a bɛbɛma ho so?

english_verse: I robbed other churches by taking money from them to serve you.
translation_verse: Mefom asafo binom adeɛ faeɛ sɛ akatua sɛ mede bɛsom ho.

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Na meya ho nkyɛne he a bibi hia me he, manyɛ adesoa amma biaa, efiri sɛ, anuanom a bɛya Makedonia de m’ahiadeɛ nyinaa maa me. Nɔkorem, manyɛ ho so adesoa bibiaa mu na mɛhwɛ sɛ menyɛ saa nso.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: Sɛ Kristo nɔkorɛ da so ya me mu he, m’ahohoahoa yi bɛkɔ so ada adi ya Akaia fam hɔ.

english_verse: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛne ntia meyɔ saa? Mennɔ ho nti anaa? Nyankopɔn koraa nim sɛ medɔ ho!

english_verse: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
translation_verse: Na deɛ meyɔ he mɛkɔ so ayɔ, na bɛ a bɛɛpɛ bibi agyina so ahoahoa bɛ ho sɛ bɛne yɛ yɛ pɛ he annya bibiaa.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Na saa nnipa yinom yɛ asomafoɔ atorɔfoɔ, adwumayɔfoɔ nnaadaafoɔ, bɛyɛ bɛ ho sɛ Kristo asomafoɔ.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ nwanwa! Satan mpo tumi yɛ ne ho sɛ hann bɔfoɔ.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: Nti ɔnyɛ nwanwa sɛ n’asomafoɔ nso bɛyɛ bɛ ho sɛ nɔkorɛ asomafoɔ. Bɛ nnwuma ne bɛkyerɛ bɛ awieeɛ. Paulo Amanehunu sɛ Somafoɔ

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: Meka bio sɛ, biaa mmmu me sɛ meyɛ kwasea, na sɛ ɔnte saa a, honnye me sɛ kwasea, na me nso mahoahoa me ho kakra.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: Deɛ meeka he, menka no Awurade tumi mu, na mmom meka no sɛ bi a ɔyɛ adwenmuhareni ɔnam ahotɔsoɔ ntrasoɔ a wanya no ahohoahoa mu nti.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Esiane sɛ nnipa bebree hoahoa bɛ ho honam fam nti, me nso mɛhoahoa me ho bi

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Na hode anigyeɛ nya tema ma nkwaseafoɔ, efiri sɛ hoyɛ mmadwemma.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi di ho nya, sɛ bi didi ho ho, sɛ bi fa ho nommum, sɛ bi ma ne ho so, sɛ bi bɔ ho ani so a, hobehu ama no. Paulo asiane ne ne brɛ

english_verse: I am ashamed to say we are too weak to behave in such a way. If they can brag, so can I, but it is a foolish thing to do.
translation_verse: Meka no aniwuo mu sɛ, yɛ deɛ yɛayɛ mmerɛ sɛ yebetumi ayɔ saa; nso deɛ bi yɛ nnam ya mu he, me nso meyɛ nnam ho mu bi.

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Bɛyɛ Hebrifoɔ? Me nso meyɛ bi. Bɛyɛ Israelfoɔ? Me nso meyɛ bi. Bɛyɛ Abraham asefoɔ? Me nso meyɛ bi.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Bɛyɛ Kristo asomfoɔ? Meyi ano te sɛ bɔdamni, meyɛ Kristo somafoɔ kyɛne bɛ: Brɛ adwuma a ɔboro so mu, afiaseda a ɔboro so mu, hweɛ a ɔtra so mu, wuo amaneɛ a manya no nhunuiɛ mu.

english_verse: Five times my own people gave me
translation_verse: Yudafoɔ nsam, bɛabɔ me mmaa aduasankron, saa mprenum.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Bɛaka me mpire mprɛnsa, bɛasi me aboɔ prɛko, maatɔ nsuo mu mprɛnsa, maadi po bunu mu adekyeeɛ ne adesaeɛ.

english_verse: During my many travels, I have been in danger from rivers, robbers, my own people, and foreigners. My life has been in danger in cities, in deserts, at sea, and with people who only pretended to be the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Akwantuo pii mu, asubɔntene so asiane mu, adwotwafoɔ asiane mu, amannifoɔ mu asiane mu, amanamane mu asiane mu, kuro mu asiane mu, serɛ so asiane mu, po so asiane mu, anuanom atorɔfoɔ mu asiane mu;

english_verse: Besides everything else, each day I am burdened down, worrying about all the churches.
translation_verse: Deɛ ɔkeka ho he nyinaa nna nkyɛne, deɛ ɔhyɛ me so ne asafo he nyinaa ho dadwene.

english_verse: When others are weak, I am weak too. When others are tricked into sin, I get angry.
translation_verse: Hwane ne ɔɔmmerɛ, na menyɛ mmerɛ bi? Hwane ne bɛato no sintidua, na me yam nhyehye me?

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Sɛ ɔsɛ sɛ mehoahoa me ho a, mɛhoahoa me ho me mmerɛyɛ ho.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Awurade Yesu Nyankopɔn ne n’Agya a nhyira nka no daa he nim sɛ menni torɔ.

english_verse: The governor of Damascus at the time of King Aretas had the city gates guarded, so he could capture me.
translation_verse: Damasko hɔ ne Hene Areta amrado wɛnee Damaskofoɔ kuro he sɛ ɔɔpɛ me akye me;

english_verse: But I escaped by being let down in a basket through a window in the city wall.
translation_verse: na bɛde me too kentene mu de me wuraa mpomaa mu faa fasuo so gyaagyaa me maa mefirii ne nsa dwaneeɛ.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ mehoahoa me ho, nso mfasoɔ biaa nni so, nti mɛka Awurade anisoadehunu ne adiyie ho asɛm.

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Hwɛ, masiesie me ho sɛ meeba honkyɛne ne mprɛnsa so. Na menyɛ ho so adesoa, efiri sɛ menhwehwɛ ho hɔ bibiaa ka ho kra ho; na ɔnsɛ sɛ mma ne pɛ adeɛ ma awofoɔ na mmom awofoɔ ne pɛ ma mma.

english_verse: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
translation_verse: Na menim sɛ saa nipa he—sɛ ɔyɛ honam mu oo, sɛ ɔnyɛ honam mu oo, mennim; na Nyankopɔn nkoaa ne nim—

english_verse: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
translation_verse: behwimm no kɔɔ Paradise na ɔtee nsɛm a ɔnsɛ sɛ bɛbɔ so, na nipa nni ho kwane sɛ ɔka mpo.

english_verse: I will brag about that man, but not about myself, except to say how weak I am.
translation_verse: Saa nipa yi ho ne mehoahoa me ho, na me a me fam deɛ menhoahoa me ho, gye sɛ me mmerɛyɛ ho.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Na sɛ mepɛ sɛ mehoahoa me ho mpo a, nka ɔnyɛ adeɛ a nteaseɛ nni mu, efiri sɛ mɛka nɔkorɛ, nso menkɔ so nhoahoa me ho, na ho mu bi ammu me ankyɛne sɛdeɛ waate anaa waahu afa me ho,

english_verse: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
translation_verse: adiyie a ɔboro so he nti. Nso sɛ ɔbɛyɔ a memma mabati so mma no mmoro so nti bɛama me Satan bɔfoɔ bi a ɔte sɛ kasɛe a ɔhyɛ me honam mu sɛ ɔmma me tim ɔnyɛ me dɛ mmoro.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: Mesrɛɛ Awurade mprɛnsa fa yei ho, sɛ ɔma no mfiri me so,

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: nso ɔka kyerɛɛ me sɛ, “M’adom dɔɔso ma wo, na metumi wie pɛyɛ ya mmerɛyɛ mu.” Nti mede anigyeɛ bebree bɛhoahoa me ho mmom, na Kristo ahoɔdene abɛtena me so.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Nti m’ani gye mmerɛyɛ mu, atennie mu, ahokyerɛ mu, taa mu, ɔne amaneɛ mu Kristo nti; efiri sɛ meyɛ mmerɛ honam mu a meyɛ dene honhom mu. Somafoɔ bi adansedie nwoma

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: Maayɛ sɛ kwasea! Ho ne hohyɛɛ me ma meyɔɔ saa. Nɔkorɛ di ɔsɛ sɛ nka hoyi me ayɛ, efiri sɛ asomafoɔ a hobu bɛ atitire he nkyɛne me bibiaa mu, nso menyɛ hwee mpo.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: Somafoɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne mapa he deɛ, bɛayɔ no ho mu boasetɔ nyinaa mu, nsɛnkyerɛnne ne anwanwadeɛ ne tumideɛ mu.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Sɛ ɔnyɛ adesoa a mayɛ ama ho a, mmɛ bio nti ne honto asafo a aka he? Mesrɛ ho, homfa mfomsoɔ yi nkyɛ me.

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: Na me deɛ mede anigyeɛ bɛhwere m’adeɛ, na mama bɛahwere me ama ho kra. Na sɛ medɔ ho maa no boroo so a, ɔsɛ sɛ ho dɔ he sua sene me deɛ?

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ manyɛ ho so adesoa. Nso sɛ meyɛ nitefoɔ nti, menam kwane foforɔ so anya ho ho mfasoɔ.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: Menam bɛ a mesomaa bɛ ho nkyɛne he mu bi so asisi ho anaa?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: Mesrɛɛ Tito, na memaa ɔne onua baako baa ho nkyɛne. Tito ba besisii ho anaa? Ɔnyɛ Honhom baako heaa mu ne yɛnanteeɛ? Ɔnyɛ anammɔno baako mu ne yetiaeɛ?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Saa berɛ yi nyinaa hosusu sɛ yeyi yɛ ho ano kyerɛ ho anaa? Nyankopɔn anim ne yɛkasa Kristo mu. Nea yɛyɛ biaa, adɔfoɔ, yɛyɛ ma ho nkɔsoɔ.
