english_verse: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
translation_verse: na anuanom he mu fa kɛseɛ he nam me mpokyerɛ he so anya Awurade mu awerɛhyemu ma bɛde akokoɔduro kɛseɛ ka Nyankopɔn asɛm a bensuro koraa.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ binom firi aniberebereɛ ne nitane mu ne pae mu ka Kristo ho asɛm he deɛ, nso afoforɔ ya hɔ a bɛde pɛpa ne ka.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Na bɛ a bɛde pɛpa ne ka he de dɔ ne di Kristo ho adanseɛ, a benim sɛ asɛmpa he nti ne bɛde me ato afiase ha;

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: na binom nso de pɛsɛmenkomenya ne bɔ Kristo dini, omfiri akoma pa mu, na bɛ adwene ne sɛ bɛbɛma ahohia aba me so, me mpokyerɛ yi mu.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Yei biaa nhia! Na nea ohia ne sɛ bɛbɛka Kristo ho asɛm akwane nyinaa mu, sɛ ɔyɛ mpatuyɛ mu oo, sɛ ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ mu oo, me mmom deɛ asɛmpa a bɛaka he ne ma m’ani gye.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, m’ani bɛkɔ so agye, efiri sɛ, menim sɛ ɔnam ho mpaebɔ ne Yesu Kristo Honhom mmoa so ne yei bɛyɛ me gyeɛ.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: M’ani da so paa sɛ, m’anim ongu ase kwane biaa so, na mmom sɛ mede akokoɔduro nyinaa ɔɔkasa yi, bɛbɛma Kristo so seesei sɛnea bɛama ne so daa me nipadua mu, sɛ ɔnam nkwa so anaa ɔnam wuo so.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Na me deɛ, mete ase a ɔyɛ Kristo, na wuo nso yɛ mfasoɔ ma me.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Sɛ mewɔ nkwa na mennwuiɛ a, yei bɛma m’adwuma aso aba. Nso mennim mu nea meyi.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Na menhu mmienu yi mu nea memfa: nea mepɛ ne sɛ nka mefiri wiase yi mu ne Kristo akɔtena efiri sɛ, saa mmom yɛ paa;

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Ɔnam saa ahotɔsoɔ a mewɔ yi nti, menim sɛ mɛkɔ so ne ho nyinaa atena ase, na ama ho nkɔsoɔ ne gyidie mu anigyeɛ,

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: na ho ahohoahoa aboro so Kristo Yesu mu me ho, osiane ba a meeba ho nkyɛne bio nti.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Deɛ ɔsɛ ho ne sɛ, hobɛbɔ ho bra ama no afata Kristo asɛmpa he, na sɛ meba behu ho oo, sɛ mamma oo, mate sɛ hogyina pintinn honhom korɔ mu, a hode adwene korɔ, na biaa ɔɔyɔ ne fam deɛ ama asɛmpa gyidie he,

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: na ho atamfoɔ antumi anhunahuna ho bibiaa mu. Na bɛ deɛ, yei yɛ bɛ sɛeɛ ho nsɛnkyerɛnne pefee, na ho deɛ, ɔyɛ ho nkwagyeɛ ho nsɛnkyerɛnne. Na yei deɛ ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn nsa ano adwuma,

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, ɔnam adom so ama ho akwannya sɛ Kristo nti, ɔnyɛ ne mu gyidie nko ne hobenya, na mmom sɛ hobehu amane ama no nso.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Na howɔ ahohiahia korɔ a hohu sɛ meyam he, na hoate sɛ meda so yam heaa mu bi.

english_verse: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ Kristo mu nkuranhyɛ, Kristo dɔ awerɛkyekyerɛ, Kristo Honhom mu ayɔnkofa, Kristo mmɔborɔhunu ne tema ya ho mu nti,

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: homma m’anigyeɛ nwie pɛyɛ: honnya adwene korɔ ne dɔ korɔ, hontena koroyɛ mu na honya botae korɔ.

english_verse: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
translation_verse: Honnnyɔ bibiaa pɛsɛmenkomenya ne animuonyamhunupɛ mu, na mmom homfiri ahobrɛaseɛ mu mmu afoforɔ te sɛ bɛkyɛne ho.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Honnya adwene a ɔya Kristo Yesu mu heaa bi;

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: “ɔno ne na ɔya Nyankopɔn tebea mu deɛ, nso wannyina so ketee sɛ ɔne Nyankopɔn yɛ pɛ,

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: na mmom ɔtoo ne ho mpan, faa akoa tebea too ne ho so, bɛyɛɛ nipa, na sɛ deɛ ɔyɔɔ n’adeɛ faeɛ he, behuu no sɛ nipa,

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: ɔbrɛɛ ne ho ase yɛɛ setie de kosii wuo mu, ɛɛ! asennua so wuo mu mpo.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne Nyankopɔn ama ne so kɛse, na wama no dini a ɔkyɛne dini nyinaa,

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: sɛ Yesu dini mu ne nkotodwe, a ɔya soro, asaase so anaa asaase ase nyinaa nkoto,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: na kɛtrɛma nyinaa mpae mu nka sɛ Yesu Kristo ne Awurade, ahyɛ Agya Nyankopɔn animuonyam.” Nkwagyeɛ ho mmɔdemmɔ

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Saa nti, m’adɔfoɔ, sɛnea hoyɔ setie ma me daa he, ɔnyɛ sɛ berɛ a meya ho nkyɛne nkoaa mu, na mmom seesei a menni ho nkyɛne titire he, homfa suro ne ahopopoɔ nyɔ hoaa ho nkwagyeɛ ho adwuma;

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, Nyankopɔn ne yɔ ho mu adwuma, na ɔma ho pɛ a hode yɔ n’adwuma ama asɔ n’ani.

english_verse: Do everything without grumbling or arguing.
translation_verse: Hommfa anwiinwii ne nyiyiano nyɔ bibiaa,

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: na ho ho amma asɛm biaa, na hoadi bem, sɛ Nyankopɔn mma a nkekaeɛ nni bɛ ho, nnɛ abusua a bɔne ahyɛ bɛ ma na bɛamane afiri wiase a hohyerɛn mu sɛ nsoromma,

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: berɛ a hokita nkwa nsɛm he mu dene na ama matumi ahoahoa me ho Kristo da he sɛ mantu mirika hunu anaa manyɔ adwuma hunu.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Na mpo, sɛ ɔsɛ sɛ behwie me mogyaa gu sɛ beegu nsa ɔnam ho gyidie ne ho afɔrebɔ nti a, ɔma m’ani gye, na me ne ho nyinaa di ahurusie,

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: na saa ne ɔsɛ sɛ ho nso ho ani gye na ho ne me di ahurusie.

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Mewɔ anidasoɔ Awurade Yesu mu sɛ ɔnkyɛre biaa mɛsoma Timoteo aba ho nkyɛne, na mete ho ho asɛm a ama me anigyeɛ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Menni biaa a ho yiedie hia no nɔkorem sɛ ɔno,

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: efiri nnipa a bɛaka he deɛ, bɛhwehwɛ nea ohia bɛ nkoaa, na mmom ɔnyɛ Yesu Kristo deɛ.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Na Timoteo mudie deɛ, honim, sɛdeɛ ɔne me asom asɛmpa adwuma he mu sɛ agya ne ne ba.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Saa nti m’ani da so sɛ, sɛ mehu sɛnea nnoɔma ɔɔkɔ ma me pɛ a, mɛsoma no.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Na mewɔ ahotɔsoɔ Awurade mu sɛ me ankasa nso ɔnkyɛre, mɛba.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Ne nyinaa akyi, mesusuu sɛ, ohia sɛ mesoma Epafrodito, me nua ne me yɔnko dwumayɔni ne me yɔnko sraani a ɔyɛ ho somafoɔ ne somfo ma me he ma no ba ho nkyɛne,

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, n’ani agyina ho nyinaa na ɔha no sɛ hotee sɛ ɔyare.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Ampa, ɔyare paa sɛ nka oowu. Nso Nyankopɔn huu no mmɔbɔ, na nyɛ ɔno nkoaa me nso waahu me mmɔbɔ bi, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a menhu awerɛhoɔ ntoa awerɛhoɔ so.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Nti ne me ho pre me kɛse sɛ mɛsoma no ho nkyɛne, na sɛ hohu no bio a hoadi ahurusie, na m’adwendwene so ate.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Nti homfa anigyeɛ nnye no fɛ so Awurade mu, honni nnipa a bɛte saa he ni,

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, oduru wuo ne nkwa nkwanta, Kristo adwuma nti, ɔde ne nkwa bɔɔ afɔdeɛ sɛ obesi ho anane mu asom me.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Afei deɛ otwa toɔ, me nuanom, honni ahurusie Awurade mu. Ɔnha me sɛ mɛtwerɛ asɛnkorɔ heaa abrɛ ho, sɛ me yɔ saa a, ɔyɛ ahobanbɔ me ho mmom.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Honhwɛ ho ho yie nnipa a bɛte sɛ nkramane he ho, honhwɛ yie adwumayɔfoɔ bɔne he ho, honhwɛ yie twetiatwafoɔ he ho!

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Na yɛ ne bɛatwa yɛ twetia ankasa, a yɛsom Nyankopɔn honhom mu, na yɛhoahoa yɛ ho Kristo Yesu mu na yenni ahotɔsoɔ honam mu he.

english_verse: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ mankasa nso mewɔ bibi a metumi de me ho ato so honam mu. Sɛ nipa foforɔ bi wɔ bibi de ne ho to so honam mu a, mewɔ bi kyɛne no:

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: betwaa me twetia da ɔtɔ so nwɔtwe, meyɛ Israelni a mefiri Benyamin abusua mu, Hebrifoɔ mu Hebrini; na mmara fam he meyɛ Farisini;

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: mmɔdenmmɔ fam he, metaa asafo he; mmara he mu tenenee fam he, me ho nni asɛm biaa.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Nso adenya biaa a menyaeɛ he Kristo nti, mebuu yeinom adehunu.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, mebu nnoɔma nyinaa adehweredeɛ, ɔnam m’Awurade Kristo Yesu ho nimdeɛ he boɔ a ɔkyɛne so he nti. Ɔno nti mahwere nnoɔma nyinaa, na mebu adeɛ nyinaa sumina so adeɛ, na manya Kristo,

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: na bɛahu me ya ne mu, a menni meaa me tenenee a ofiri mmara he mu na deɛ ofiri Kristo mu gyidie mu, Nyankopɔn tenenee a ogyina gyidie so.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Mepɛ sɛ mehu Kristo, ɔne ne wusɔreɛ tumi, na manya ne brɛ he mu kyɛfa de me ho ama wuo a ɔte sɛ ne deɛ he,

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ me nsa anya aka yei, anaa sɛ ebia maanya awie pɛyɛ dada, na mmom mepem kɔ m’anim, na me nsa aka deɛ ntia Kristo Yesu nsa aka me heaa.

english_verse: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
translation_verse: Anuanom, me deɛ mensusu sɛ me nsa anya aka bibi, na mmom adeɛ baako ne meyɔ; mema me werɛ firi deɛ atwam he na metwe me mu pɛ deɛ ɔya m’anim he,

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: memia m’ani kɔ botae he ho sɛ menya soro frɛ a Nyankopɔn afrɛ me ya Kristo Yesu mu nkunimboɔ he.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Nti homma yɛ a yɛanyini honhom mu he nya saa adwene korɔ heaa bi; na sɛ hokura adwene foforɔ bi a, yei nso Nyankopɔn beyi no adi akyerɛ ho.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Deɛ ohia ne sɛ yebekura deɛ yɛanya he mu dene. Asɛnnua he ho atamfoɔ

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Anuanom, homma me nyɛ nhwɛsoɔ mma ho, na homma bɛ a bɛabrabɔ te sɛ yɛ he nyɛ nhwɛsoɔ mma ho.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Na nnipa bebree bɔ bɛ bra sɛ Kristo asennua he ho atamfoɔ; maaka bɛ ho asɛm akyerɛ ho mprɛ pii, na seesei nso mede nisuo ɔɔka no bio.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Bɛ awieeɛ yɛ sɛeɛ; bɛ nyame ne bɛ yafunu; na bɛ animuonyam ya bɛ animguaseɛ mu; bɛ adwene si asaase so nnoɔma so.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Na yɛ deɛ yɛ mane a yefiri mu ankasa ne soro, na hɔ ne yɛɛhwɛ Agyenkwa, Awurade Yesu Kristo anim afiri.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Saa nti, me nuanom a medɔ ho na m’ani agyina ho, m’anigyeɛ ne m’abotire, honnyina pintinn Awurade mu saa, m’adɔfoɔ.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Metu Euodia ne Sintike fo sɛ benya adwene korɔ Awurade mu.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Afei nso, mesrɛ wo, me yɔnko dwumayɔni, sɛ boa saa mmaa yi, na bɛaberɛ me ho asɛmpa adwuma he mu, bɛ ne Klemens ne me yɔnkonom adwumayɔfoɔ dodoɔ a bɛ dini ya nkwa nwoma mu he.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Homma ho ani nnye Awurade mu daa; meka bio sɛ, homma ho ani nnye.

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Homma nnipa nyinaa nhu ho dwoɔ. Awurade abɛne.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Honnnwene hwee nha ho ho, na mmom homfa mpaebɔ ne nkotosrɛ mma ho adesrɛ nnuru Nyankopɔn hɔ bibiaa mu.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn asomdwie a ɔboro nteaseɛ nyinaa so he bɛbɔ ho akoma ne ho adwene ho bane, Kristo Yesu mu.

english_verse: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
translation_verse: Adɔfonom, deɛ otwa toɔ koraa ne sɛ, deɛ ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ, deɛ anidie ya mu, deɛ ɔtene, deɛ ho te, deɛ ɔsɔ ani, deɛ ɔwɔ dini pa, sɛ bra pa bi ya hɔ a, sɛ bibi fata ayeyie a, honnwene yeinom ho.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Homfa deɛ hoasua, na hoanya, na hoate, na hoahu no me mu he nyɔ adwuma, na asomdwie Nyankopɔn he ne ho bɛtena.

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Medi ahurusie pii Awurade mu sɛ afei deɛ hoafiri aseɛ ɔɔdwene me ho bio, na hoodwene me ho, nso hoanya ho kwane anna no adi.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ bibi hia me nti ne meeka saa, efiri sɛ, masua sɛ deɛ mewɔ biaa mɛma no asom bo ama me.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Metumi fa tebea biaa mu, deɛ ɔhyɛ me dene he nti.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Yei nyinaa mu he hokyerɛɛ ayamyɛ, sɛ hoboa me m’ahohia berɛ mu.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Ho Filipifoɔ, ho a honim sɛ mefirii asɛmpaka adwuma ase he, berɛ a mefirii Makedonia he, asafo biaa ne me anya ma ne gyeɛ mu kyɛfa ho asɛm.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Na meya Tesalonika mpo he, hode nea mehia braa me prɛko ne ne mprenu so.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ na mehia akyɛdeɛ he, na mmom mehwehwɛ aba deɛ ɔbɛma ho nkonta adɔɔso.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Maanya m’akatua nyinaa, na maanya ama no aboro so; m’ani asɔ paa, sɛ maanya akyɛdeɛ a hode manee Epafrodito he, afɔdeɛ a oohwam, afɔdeɛ a ɔfata na ɔsɔ Nyankopɔn ani.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Na me Nyankopɔn de ho ahiadeɛ nyinaa bɛma ho sɛdeɛ n’ahonya teɛ, animuonyam mu, Kristo Yesu mu.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Animuonyam nka yɛ Nyankopɔn ne yɛ Agya daa daa. Amen.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Honkyea ahoteefoɔ he nyinaa mma me Kristo Yesu mu. Anuanom a bɛka me ho he kyea ho.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Ahoteefoɔ he nyinaa kyeakyea ho, ne titire bɛ a befiri amrado fie he.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Paulo a ɔnam Nyankopɔn pɛ so yɛ Kristo Yesu somafoɔ ɔne yɛ nua Timoteo,

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma ahoteefoɔ ne anuanom a bɛyɛ Kristo mu agyidifoɔ a bɛya Kolose. Adom ne asomdwie a ofiri yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn hɔ nka ho. Nkyea

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Da biaa a yɛbɔ mpaeɛ ma ho he, yɛda Nyankopɔn a ɔyɛ yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo Agya he ase;

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, yɛate ho gyidie a ɔya Kristo Yesu mu ho asɛm, ɔne dɔ a howɔ ma ahoteefoɔ he nyinaa,

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: ɔnam anidasoɔ a bɛahyehyɛ ama ho soro he nti. Saa anidasoɔ yi ne hoate ho asɛm dada, nɔkwasɛm a ɔyɛ asɛmpa

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: a aba ho nkyɛne na agye nhini ho mu he. Sɛnea ɔɔso aba na oonyini wiase nyinaa mu he, saa ne ɔɔso aba hoaa ho mu firi da a hoteeɛ na hotee Nyankopɔn adom he ase nɔkorɛ mu.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Hosuaa yei firii Epafra, yɛ nua dɔfoɔ a yɛ ne no yɛ Kristo mu nkoa he nkyɛne. Ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ somfo ma Kristo, a ogyina yɛ anane mu,

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: ɔno ne ama yɛ ahu ho dɔ a honam Honhom he so ada no adi he.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Saa nti, ofiri da a yɛteeɛ he, yennyaeɛ mpaebɔ ne nkotosrɛ sɛ Nyankopɔn pɛ ho nimdeɛ nhyɛ ho ma honhom mu nyansa ne nteaseɛ nyinaa mu,

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: na hoabɔ bra a ɔfata Awurade, a ɔsɔ n’ani koraa, berɛ a hooso aba nnwuma pa nyinaa mu, na ho akɔ so anya Nyankopɔn ho nimdeɛ pii nso.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Na ahoɔdene a ofiri n’animuonyam tumi nyinaa mu mma honyɛ dene, na ama hoanya boasetɔ ne abodwokyɛre nnoɔma nyinaa mu, ya anigyeɛ mu,

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: berɛ a hode aseda ɔɔma Agya a waama hoafata sɛ honya ahoteefoɔ a bɛya hann he mu agyapadeɛ mu kyɛfa.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Ɔno ne agye yɛ afiri sum tumi mu, na ɔde yɛ akotim ne dɔ Ba he ahennie mu,

english_verse: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
translation_verse: ne mu ne yɛanya gyeɛ mapa ɔkyerɛ sɛ yɛanya bɔne fakyɛ nso.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne yɛ Nyankopɔn a benhu no he nsɛso ne abɔdeɛ nyinaa farebae;

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ ɔnam ne so ne bɛbɔɔ nnoɔma nyinaa, deɛ ɔya soro ne deɛ ɔya asaase so, nnoɔma a yehu ne nnoɔma a yenhu, sɛ nhennwa oo, wuradie oo mpanyinnie oo, tumidie oo, bɛnam ne so ne bɔɔ ne nyinaa, na bɛbɔɔ ne nyinaa maa no.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Na ɔya hɔ ansa na nnoɔma nyinaa ɔɔba, na ne mu ne nnoɔma nyinaa atim.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Kristo yɛ ne nipadua he ti; ɔno ne mfitiaseɛ, awufoɔ sɔreeɛ mu farebae, na ama no abɛyɛ adeɛ nyinaa mu kannifoɔ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Efiri sɛ ɔsɔɔ Nyankopɔn ani sɛ Nyamesu nyinaa ntena Kristo mu,

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: na Nyankopɔn nam Kristo so apata ɔno Nyankopɔn ne nnoɔma nyinaa ntam koraa. Ɔne sɛ, ɔnam Kristo asennua ho mogyaa so asiesie Nyankopɔn ne nnoɔma a ɔya asaase so ne soro nyinaa ntam; na ɔnam nkabom yi so ama asomdwie aba.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Na ho a kane he na hoyɛ atuatefoɔ ne atamfoɔ adwene fam ne nwuma bɔne mu he,

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: afei deɛ Kristo nam ne honam mu wuo so apata ho ne no ntam, na ama ɔde ho akɔ Nyankopɔn anim sɛ nnipa kronkron a dɛm ne asɛm biaa nni ho ho;

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: nso gye sɛ hokɔ soaa tena gyidie he mu, na hogyina ho fapem he so pintinn a homma bɛntwe ho mfiri asɛmpa he anidasoɔ a hoteeɛ a bɛaka no wiase abɔdeɛ nyinaa mu, a me Paulo mayɛ ho somfoɔ he ho. Somafoɔ he amanehunu

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Afei ho nti, m’ani gye m’ahohiahia mu, efiri sɛ, me honam mu amanehunu he da Kristo amanehunu he adi, ɔnam ne nipadua ne asafo he nti.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Mabɛyɛ asafo he somfo sɛnea Nyankopɔn adwuma a ɔde ahyɛ me nsa ho fam he teɛ, sɛ memma nnipa nhu Nyankopɔn asɛm he yie,

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: ahintasɛm a mmeresantene ne awoɔntoatoasoɔ mu ohintaeɛ, ne bɛayi no adi akyerɛ yɛ a yɛyɛ n’ahoteefoɔ yi.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Bɛne Nyankopɔn ayi bɛ sɛ benhu sɛnea n’ahintasɛm yi animuonyam kɛseɛ he bɛda adi amanamane mufoɔ mu, ɔno ne Kristo a ɔya ho mu a ɔyɛ animuonyam anidasoɔ he.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne yɛpae mu ka n’asɛm, na yɛbɔ kɔkɔ de nyansa kyerɛkyerɛ biaa, na yɛde ankorankorɛ biaa akɔ Nyankopɔn anim sɛ nipa a wawie pɛyɛ Kristo mu.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne mepre de m’ahoɔdene nyinaa yɔ adwuma sɛnea n’ahoɔdene kanyane me he.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Na mepɛ sɛ hohu apereapereɛ dendene a medi no ho ho ne bɛ a bɛya Laodikea ne bɛ a benhuu m’anim honam mu nyinaa nso ho.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Mepɛ sɛ benya nkuranhyɛ bɛ akoma mu na bɛka bom dɔ mu, na bɛanya nteaseɛ pa nyinaa, na bɛanya Nyankopɔn ahintasɛm ho nimdeɛ a ɔne Kristo he ankasa.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Ɔyɛ Kristo mu ne nyansa ne nimdeɛ ho nnepa nyinaa ahinta.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Meeka yei na biaa amfa mmradɛtoɔ annaadaa ho.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Na ɔyam sɛ menni ho nkyɛne nipadua mu deɛ, nso meka ho, honhom fam, na m’ani gye kwane a hofa so yɔ adeɛ nyinaa pɛpɛɛpɛ ne tintim a ho gyidie atintim Kristo mu he ho.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ hoagye Awurade Kristo Yesu he, saa ne hommɔ ho bra sɛ Kristo mu agyidifoɔ

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: a bɛagye ahini, na bɛde bɛ ani asi Kristo so, na bɛayɛ dene gyidie mu, sɛdeɛ bɛkyerɛɛ ho heaa, na ho aseda adɔɔso. Kristo nyameyɛ

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Honhwɛ yie na biaa amfa nipa nyansa ne nnaadaa hunu a ɔnam nnipa nhyehyɛeɛ so, ne wiase ahonhom so ammɛfa ho nommum, efiri sɛ saa nnoɔma yi nyinaa mfiri Kristo,

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: na hoayɛ ma ya ne mu: Ɔno ne yɛ mpanyinnie ne tumidie nyinaa ti.

english_verse: Christ has also taken away your selfish desires, just as circumcision removes flesh from the body.
translation_verse: Ne mu ne bɛatwa ho twetia a bɛamfa nsa ne twaeɛ, na deɛ ɔya honam nipadua mu a beyi gu hɔ he, bɛayi no Kristo twetiatwa mu.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Besiee ho ne no asubɔ mu he, ho ne no nso sɔreeɛ gyidie mu, Nyankopɔn a ɔnyanee Kristo firii awufoɔ mu he tumi mu. Kristo mpatadwuma

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Na berɛ a na hoawu ya ho mfomsoɔ ne honam ne twetiatwa mu he, Nyankopɔn maa ho ne no baa nkwa mu bio. Nyankopɔn nam adom so de yɛ mfomsoɔ nyinaa kyɛɛ yɛ,

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: na ɔpepaa nsa ano atwerɛeɛ a ɔya ahyɛdeɛ he mu a otia yɛ he, na oyi firii hɔ de ne nyinaa bɔɔ asennua he mu.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Na watutu mpanyinnie ne tumidie nyinaa agu, ayi bɛ adi akyerɛ pefee ya badwam, nam asennua he so adi bɛ so nkunim. Ntamgyinafoɔ foforɔ biaa nni hɔ

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Nti hommma bi mmu ho atɛne aduane anaa anonneɛ anaa nnapɔnna anaa bosome foforɔ afahyɛ anaa home nna fam.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Yeinom yɛ nea ɔbɛba he ho mfonyini kɛkɛ, na deɛ odi mu he ankasa ne Kristo.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Hommma bi mfa kramane ahobrɛaseɛ ne abɔfosom so mma nkunimboɔ he mmɔ ho, nea ɔnam anisoadehunu kwa ne honam nsusuiɛ hunu so yɛ ahomasoɔ.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Saa nipa he nkita asafo he Ti a ɔma nipadua he nyinaa aduane, na ɔnam ntoatoamu ne ahoma so ma no ka bom gyina, na onyini nyini a ofiri Nyankopɔn mu he.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Nti sɛ ho ne Kristo anya awu afiri wiase honhom mu nsɛm nkyerɛkyerɛ ho a, mmɛ nti ne hode ahyɛdeɛ to ho ho so sɛdeɛ hoda so yɛ wiasefoɔ,

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: na ho ka sɛ, “Nsɔ mu, nka nhwɛ, mfa wo nsa nka?”

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Saa nnoɔma yei nyinaa yɛ nnoɔma hunu, nnipa ahyɛdeɛ ne nkyerɛkyerɛ kwa.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Saa nnoɔma he nyinaa yɛ bɛ ankasa bɛ som mu adeɛ a nnipa anim he, ayɛ sɛ nea nyansa yam nso ɔyɛ kramane ahobrɛaseɛ a ɔma bɛ ankasa bɛ nipadua mpo, bedi no nya; nso tumi biaa nnim a obetumi ako atia honam akɔnnɔ.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Nti sɛ bɛanyane ho ne Kristo a, honhwehwɛ soro nnoɔma, faako a Kristo ya a ɔte Nyankopɔn nsa nifa so.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Homfa ho adwene nsi soro nnoɔma so, ɔnyɛ asaase so nnoɔma,

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ hoawu, na bɛde ho nkwa ahinta Nyankopɔn mu sɛnea bɛde Kristo nso ahinta ne mu he.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Sɛ Kristo a ɔyɛ yɛ nkwa he yi ne ho adi a, bebeyi ho ne no nso adi animuonyam mu.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Na saa kwane yeinom so ne hofa bɔɔ ho bra mmerɛ bi a atwam. Su foforɔ

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Na seesei deɛ, honnyi saa nnoɔma yeinom: abufuo, kokobɔne, bɔnepɛ, nantitwitwa ne kasafi mfiri ho anum koraa.

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: na hoahyɛ nipasu foforɔ a bɛnam nɔkorɛ nimdeɛ so a ɔɔyɔ no foforɔ sɛnea nea ɔbɔɔ no he subane teɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Yei nti Helani ne Yudani, nea bɛatwa no twetia ne nea bentwaa no twetia, pɔtɔni, Skiteni, akoa anaa dehyeɛ nni saa foforɔyɛ he mu, na Kristo ne ade nyinaa, na ɔya bɛ nyinaa bɛ mu. Ɔsɛ sɛ besua Kristo abrabɔ

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Ɔnam sɛ, hoyɛ nnipa a Nyankopɔn ayi ho a hoyɛ kronkron na ɔdɔ ho nti, homfa mmɔborɔhunu, ayamyɛ, ahobrɛaseɛ, dwoɔ ne ntoboaseɛ mmɔ ho bra.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Ne titire koraa he, homfa dɔ a ɔka nnoɔma nyinaa bom he mmɔ ho bra.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Na homma Kristo asomdwie nni hene ho akoma mu, na ɔno mu ne bɛafrɛ ho aba nipadua baako mu. Na honnyɛ boniayɛfoɔ. Abrabɔ nnyinasoɔ

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Homma Kristo asɛm ntena ho mu yie. Honkyerɛkyerɛ na hontu ho ho fo nyansasɛm nyinaa mu, na homfa akoma mu aseda nto sankunnwom ne ayeyie nnwom ne honhom mu nnwom mma Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Na nea hobɛyɔ biaa, kasa mu oo, nneyɔeɛ mu oo, honyɔ bibiaa Awurade Yesu dini mu, na homfa ne so mfa aseda mma Agya Nyankopɔn. Yerenom, kununom, mma, awofoɔ, nkoa ne awuranom (Efesofoɔ

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ayerenom, hommrɛ ho ho ase mma ho kununom, Awurade mu; na saa ne Awurade ɔɔhwehwɛ.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Kununom, honnɔ ho yerɛnom, na honteetee bɛ.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Mmɔfra, honyɔ setie mma ho awofoɔ ade nyinaa mu, na yei ne sɔ Awurade ani.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Agyanom, honhyɛ ho mma abufuo na amma bɛ abam ammu.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Nkoa, honyɔ setie mma ho asaase so wuranom adeɛ nyinaa mu, ɔnyɛ anisoɔ som mu sɛ bɛ a bɛpɛ sɛ bɛsɔ nnipa ani, na mmom akoma pa mu a ɔkyerɛ sɛ hosuro Awurade.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Sɛnea ho adwuma teɛ biaa, homfiri ho akoma mu nyɔ no sɛ hoyɔ ma Awurade, na mmom nyɛ nnipa.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Na honim sɛ Awurade nkyɛne ne hobenya agyapadeɛ sɛ ho akatua; na honhu sɛ Awurade Kristo ne ho som no.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Na debɔnyɛni benya ne bɔne so akatua, na Nyankopɔn anim deɛ, ntɛnkyea biaa nni hɔ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Awuranom, ho ne ho nkoa nni no yie sɛnea ɔsɛ, efiri sɛ honim sɛ ho nso howɔ Wura bi ya soro. Mpaebɔ ho mmɔdemmɔ

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Honkura mpaebɔ mu, na homfa aseda nwɛne mpaebɔ mu.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Na hommɔ mpaebɔ mma yɛ nso, sɛ Nyankopɔn bebie pono ama n’asɛm, sɛ yɛbɛka Kristo ho ahintasɛm a ɔno nti meda afiase he,

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: na maayi no adi pefee akyerɛ sɛdeɛ ɔsɛ sɛ meyɔ.

english_verse: When you are with unbelievers, always make good use of the time.
translation_verse: Na akwannya biaa hobenya he hommɔ ho bra nyansa mu mma wiasefoɔ nhu.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Homma ho kasa ho mmara nyam daa a nkyene ya mu, na hoahu sɛdeɛ ɔsɛ sɛ hobua biaa. Nkyea a otwa toɔ

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tihiko bɛka me ho nsɛm nyinaa akyerɛ ho; ɔyɛ nua dɔfoɔ, somfo nɔkwafoɔ ne yɔnko akoa Awurade mu.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne maasoma no ho nkyɛne na hoahu sɛdeɛ yɛ ho teɛ, na wahyɛ ho akoma dene;

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: ɔne Onesimo, nɔkwafoɔ ne nua dɔfoɔ a ɔyɛ ho honam-nipa, ne ɔɔba. Bɛbɛka ha asɛm nyinaa akyerɛ ho.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Aristarko, me yɔnko deduani kyea ho, saa nso ne Marko a ɔyɛ Barnaba nua nso kyea ho, nea mekaa ne ho asɛm kyerɛɛ ho sɛ, sɛ ɔba ho nkyɛne a, wonnye no fɛ so he.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Na Yesu a bɛfrɛ no Yusto he nso kyea ho. Bɛne befiri bɛ a bɛatwa bɛ twetia he mu. Yeinom nkoaa ne me mfɛfoɔ ya Nyankopɔn ahennie he fam, na bɛabɛyɛ aboafoɔ a bɛahyɛ me dene. Epafra, Luka ne Dema

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Kristo Yesu somfo Epafra a ofiri ho mu he kyea ho. Daa odima ma ho dendenndene ya mpaebɔ mu, sɛ hobegyina hɔ pɛpɛɛpɛ, na hoayɛ ma Nyankopɔn apɛdeɛ nyinaa mu.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Na medi ne ho adanseɛ sɛ waayɔ adwuma dene ama ho ne bɛ a bɛya Laodikea ne Hierapoli.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Luka, duyɛfoɔ dɔfoɔ he ne Dema kyea ho. Laodikea asafo

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Honkyea anuanom a bɛya Laodikea ne Nimfa ne asafo a behyia ne fie he.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Na sɛ hokenkane krataa yi kyerɛ ho ho wie a, homma bɛnkenkane no Laodikeafoɔ asafo he nso mu; na honhwɛ sɛ ho nso hobɛkenkane me krataa a ɔya Laodikea asafo he mu nso.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Na honnka nkyerɛ Arkipo sɛ, “Hwɛ sɛ wobewie som adwuma a wo nsa aka ya Awurade mu he.” Awieeɛ

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Me Paulo, mede meaa me nsa ne ɔɔtwerɛ nkyea yi. Honnkae me nkɔnsɔnkɔnsɔn. Adom nka ho.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Paulo, Silwano ɔne Timoteo twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Tesalonikafoɔ asafo a ɔya Agya Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Yesu Kristo mu he. Adom ne asomdwie nka ho.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Yɛde aseda ma Nyankopɔn da biaa ma ho na yɛkae ho mpaebɔ mu, yɛkɔ so

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: kae ho gyidie ne ho dɔ nnwuma ne ho anidasoɔ ho nsiyɛ a ɔya yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo mu, ya yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn anim.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Na anuanom, Nyankopɔn dɔ ho, yenim sɛ waayi ho,

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, yɛ asɛmpa he amma ho nkyɛne kwa, na mmom ɔbaa ahoɔdene ne Honhom Kronkron ne nteaseɛ bebree mu nso, sɛnea honim sɛ, ho nti, yɛbɔɔ yɛ bra faeɛ ho mu he.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Na hosuasuaa yɛ ne Awurade, efiri sɛ, ahohiahia pii mu mpo, hode Honhom Kronkron anigyeɛ gyee asɛm he,

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: saa nti, hobɛyɛɛ nhwɛsoɔ maa agyidifoɔ a bɛya Makedonia ne Akaia nyinaa,

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, Awurade asɛm he firi ho mu ne trɛeɛ, ɔnyɛ Makedonia ne Akaia nkoaa, na mmom ho gyeɛ a hogyee Nyankopɔn diiɛ he atrɛ aduru mmaa nyinaa, nti ɔmma no nhia yɛ sɛ yɛka ho asɛm biaa,

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, mantam he mufoɔ kaa gye a hogyee yɛ baa ho nkyɛne, ɔne sɛnea hodane firii abosonsom mu baa Nyankopɔn nkyɛne, bɛsomm nɔkorɛ Nyankopɔn a ɔte ase,

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: sɛ hootwɛne ne Ba he afiri soro, deɛ onyane no firii awufoɔ mu he, mekyerɛ Yesu a ɔgye yɛ firi abufuo a ɔɔba mu he.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Na anuanom, hoaa honim, yɛba a yɛbaa ho nkyɛne he anyɛ kwa,

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: na ɔyam sɛ yedii kane huu amane na beguu yɛ anim ase ya Filipi deɛ, nso sɛdeɛ honim he, yenyaa akokoɔduro ya yɛ Nyankopɔn mu paee mu kaa Nyankopɔn asɛmpa, ɔmfa ho ne sɔretia kɛseɛ a ɔbaa yɛ so he mpo.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Na yɛ afutusɛm he mfiri nnaadaa anaa adwenfi mu, saa nso ne ɔnnam asisie so,

english_verse: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
translation_verse: na sɛdeɛ Nyankopɔn abu no sɛ yɛfata sɛ ɔde asɛmpa he hyɛ yɛ nsa he, saa ara nso ne yɛkasa, ɔnyɛ sɛ bɛ a bɛpɛ sɛ bɛsɔ nnipa ani, na mmom Nyankopɔn a ɔsɔ yɛ akoma hwɛ he ani.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Sɛnea honim na Nyankopɔn yɛ danseni he, yɛamfa nnaadaasɛm ne baeɛ, ne asɛm biaa a yɛka kyerɛɛ ho he, yɛanka sɛ ɔbɛyɔ a yebenya mfasoɔ ya ho so nti;

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: saa ara nso ne yɛanhwehwɛ nnipa anim animuonyam amfiri ho nkyɛne anaa afoforɔ hɔ, mpo nka yebetumi ayɛ adesoa sɛ Kristo asomafoɔ

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Na ɔnam sɛ yɛpɛ ho asɛm yie nti, yɛpɛɛ sɛ anka ɔnyɛ Nyankopɔn asɛmpa he nkoaa ne yɛne ho bɛkyɛ, na mmom yɛne ho bɛkyɛ bibiaa a yɛwɔ mpo, efiri sɛ hoyɛ nnipa a hosom bo ma yɛ paa.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Anuanom, hokae yɛ adwumadene ne brɛ sɛ yɛyɔɔ adwuma anadwo ne awia sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a yɛnyɛ adesoa mma ho berɛ a yɛɛpae mu aka Nyankopɔn asɛmpa he akyerɛ ho he.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Hoyɛ adansefoɔ, na ne Nyankopɔn nso di adanseɛ sɛ, yɛyɛɛ yɛ ho kronkron ne ateneneefoɔ ne nnipa a bɛ ho nni asɛm maa ho agyidifoɔ.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Afei nso honim, sɛnea yetuu ho nyinaa fo mmaako mmaako, sɛnea agya bi yɔ ne mma, na yɛhyɛɛ ho den, na yɛmaa ho asodie

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: sɛ honnante sɛnea ɔsɛ Nyankopɔn a wafrɛ ho akɔ n’ahenie ne n’animuonyam mu he. Tesalonikafoɔ boasetɔ ya taa mu

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Yei nti yɛda Nyankopɔn ase daa, sɛ hogyee Nyankopɔn asɛmpa a hote firi yɛ hɔ he, hoannye no sɛ nipa asɛm, na mmom hogyee no sɛdeɛ ɔteɛ ankasa, Nyankopɔn asɛm mapa a ɔɔyɔ adwuma ho agyidifoɔ ho mu.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Na anuanom, hosuasuaa Nyankopɔn asafo a ɔya Yudea he ya Kristo Yesu mu, efiri sɛ hohu amane korɔ heaa ho nkurofoɔ nsam sɛnea behuiɛ ya Yudafoɔ nsam he,

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: bɛ a bekuu Awurade Yesu ne adiyifoɔ he, na bɛpamoo yɛ; bɛansɔ Nyankopɔn ani na bɛko tia biaa

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: berɛ a besii yɛ kwane a yɛantumi ankasa ankyerɛ amanamane mufoɔ he na bɛanya nkwa. Nti ɔma bɛhyɛ bɛ bɔne ma berɛ nyinaa. Na afei deɛ n’abufuo aba bɛ so. Paulo dɔ

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Na yɛ deɛ, anuanom, beyii yɛ firii ho nkyɛne berɛ kakraa bi ya honam mu na ɔnyɛ akoma mu he, yɛbɔɔ mmɔdene bebree anigyina pii mu sɛ yebehu ho anim.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: Efiri sɛ na yɛpɛ sɛ yɛba ho nkyɛne, ampaa sɛ, me Paulo, mepɛɛ mprɛ pii sɛ mɛba, nso Satan sii yɛ kwane.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Na hwane ne yɛ anidasoɔ anaa anigyeɛ anaa ahohoahoa abotire yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo anim ya ne ba he mu, ho nso, honni mu bi anaa?

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Ampa, ho ne yɛ animuonyam ne anigyeɛ!

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Nti ɔbaa sɛ yentumi nyina ano bio he, yɛyɛɛ sɛ bennya yɛ hɔ ya Atene;

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: na yɛsomaa Timoteo a ɔyɛ yɛ nua ne Nyankopɔn mu somfo ya Kristo asɛmpa mu, sɛ ɔmmɛhyɛ ho dene, na ontu ho fo ho gyidie ho,

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a ahohiahia yi ɔmma bi nhinhim. Na ho a honim sɛ nea ɔsɛ sɛ ɔto yɛ a ne he.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, na yɛne ho ya hɔ he, yedii kane ka kyerɛɛ ho sɛ bɛbɛteetee yɛ, na yɛkaeɛ he ɔbaa mu saa sɛnea honim he.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Yei nti me nso, mesɔ mu a na ɔnsɔ bio he, mesomaeɛ, na mahu ho gyidie mu, na amma sɛ ebia sɔhwɛfoɔ he asɔ ho ahwɛ, ama yɛ mmɔdenmmɔ adwuma he ayɛ kwa. Timoteo amanebɔ

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Nso seesei Timoteo firii ho nkyɛne baeɛ yi, ɔde ho gyidie ne ho dɔ ho asɛmpa abra yɛ. Ɔsane ka kyerɛɛ yɛ sɛ hokae yɛ daa na ho pɛ sɛ hohu yɛ—sɛnea yɛ pɛ sɛ yehu ho he.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Yei nti anuanom, yɛ amaneɛ ne ahohiahia mu he ho gyidie ama yɛ were akyekyere.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Yenya yɛ asetena yi mu nkuranhyɛ firi gyina a hobegyina Awurade mu pintinn he mu. Paulo daa Nyankopɔn ase

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Mmɛ aseda ne yɛde bɛma Nyankopɔn ya anigyeɛ deɛ ho nti yɛanya no ne mu he?

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Yɛkɔ so bɔ mpaeɛ awia ne anadwo sɛ yebehu ho anim na yɛama ho gyidie ahyɛ ma.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Afei ɔno ankasa, yɛ Nyankopɔn ne yɛ Agya ne yɛ Awurade Yesu, nnane yɛ kwane mmara ho hɔ.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Na Awurade mmaa dɔ a howɔ ma ho ho ne afoforɔ nyɛ kɛse sɛdeɛ yɛdɔ a yɛwɔ ma ho he teɛ he.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Na ɔnhyɛ ho akoma dene kronkronyɛ mapa mu sɛ ho ho mma asɛm yɛ Nyankopɔn ne Agya he anim ya Awurade Yesu, ne ahoteefoɔ mmaeɛ he mu.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Deɛ otwa toɔ, anuanom, yɛsrɛ ho na yetu ho fo Awurade Yesu mu sɛ, hobesua sɛnea hobesi atena ase asɔ Nyankopɔn ani , honkɔ so nyɔ no saa.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Na honim ahyɛdeɛ a yɛnam Awurade Yesu so de maa ho he.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Na yei ne nea Nyankopɔn pɛ, ho ahoteɛ a ɔne sɛ hobɛtwe ho ho afiri adwamammɔ ho;

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: ɔnyɛ akɔnnɔ anibereɛ mu sɛ Amanamane mufoɔ a bennim Nyankopɔn he;

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: sɛ biaa nyɔ ne nua bɔne anaa onsisi no asɛm yi mu, efiri sɛ Awurade yɛ katuafoɔ nnoɔma yeinom nyinaa mu, sɛnea yɛadi kane aka akyerɛ ho anibereɛ so he.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn amfrɛ yɛ ankɔ fi mu na mmom ahoteɛ mu.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nti nea ɔpo yei he mpo nnipa, na mmom ɔpo Nyankopɔn a ɔde ne Honhom Kronkron ama ho he.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Na nea ɔfa nuadɔ ho deɛ, onhia ho sɛ bɛtwerɛ bra ho, efiri sɛ hoaa ne Nyankopɔn akyerɛkyerɛ ho sɛ honnodɔ ho ho;

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: na ampa, hodɔ anuanom a bɛya Makedonia nyinaa. Nso adɔfoɔ, yɛhyɛ ho nkurane sɛ honkɔ so nyɔ ma no mmoro so.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Honnyɛ gyegyeegye, honni ho fie asɛm, na homfa ho nsa nyɔ adwuma, sɛnea yɛahyɛ ho he,

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: na ama hoanya anidie wiasefoɔ anim na hoamfa ho ho anto biaa so. Awurade mmaeɛ

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Na anuanom, nea ɔfa bɛ a bɛawuwu he ho deɛ, yɛmpɛ sɛ yesi ho so na ho werɛ anho sɛ, nnipa a bɛaka a benni anidasoɔ he.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Na yɛgye di sɛ Yesu wuiɛ na ɔsɔreeɛ bio a, saa ara nso ne Nyankopɔn de bɛ a bɛawu he nam Yesu so bɛka Yesu ho aba.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Na yei deɛ, yɛnam Awurade asɛm mu ne yɛka kyerɛ ho sɛ, yɛ a yɛte ase na yɛbɛtena ase akosi Awurade ba mu he nsane bɛ a bɛadeda he ho,

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Awurade he ankasa de nteamu dendene, bɔfo panyini frɛ ne Nyankopɔn totorobɛnto nne, bɛsiane afiri soro, na Kristo mu awufoɔ anyane kane.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Afei yɛ a yɛte ase a yɛaka he, bɛbɛfa yɛ aka bɛ ho akɔ soro mununkum mu akohyia Awurade ya wiem; na saa ne yɛ ne Awurade bɛtena daa.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Saa nti, homfa nsɛm yi nkyekyere ho ho werɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Na ɔfa nna ne mmerɛ he ho deɛ, anuanom, onhia sɛ bi twerɛ bibiaa bra ho.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Efiri sɛ ho ankasa honim yie sɛ Awurade bɛba berɛ a nnipa ani nni bɛ ho so te sɛnea korɔmfoɔ ba anadwo he.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Na bɛka sɛ, “Yɛwɔ asomdwie ne ahotɔ he,” mpofirem ne sɛeɛ bɛba bɛ so, sɛnea awoko ba baa ɔnyem so, na benya kwane nnwane!

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Na ho deɛ, anuanom, honni sum mu nti da he ɔnyɛ ho nwanwa, sɛnea korɔmfoɔ mmaeɛ yɛ he.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Na ho nyinaa ho yɛ hann mma ne adekyeɛ mma; yɛnyɛ anadwo anaa sum mma.

english_verse: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
translation_verse: Saa nti hommma yɛnneda sɛ binom, na mmom homma yɛnnwɛne na yɛ ani nna hɔ;

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: na bɛ a bɛda he bɛda anadwo, na bɛ a bɛboro he boro anadwo.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Na esiane sɛ yɛyɛ adekyeɛ mma he nti, homma yɛ ani nna hɔ, na yɛnhyɛ gyidie ne dɔ sɛ nkataboɔ, ɔne nkwagyeɛ anidasoɔ sɛ dadeɛ kyɛ;

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn anyi yɛ amma n’abufuo, na oyii yɛ sɛ yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo nti, yemmenya nkwa.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Ɔno Kristo ne wu maa yɛ sɛ ɔbɛyɔ a sɛ yɛte ase oo, sɛ yewu oo, yɛne no bɛtena ase.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Nti nkyekyere ho ho ho ho werɛ na honhyehyɛ ho ho ho ho dene, sɛnea hogu so ɔɔyɔ yi. Afotuo ahodoɔ

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Na anuanom, yɛsrɛ ho, sɛ homfa anidie mma bɛ a bɛbrɛ ma ho na bedi ho so panyini Awurade mu, na betu ho fo he.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Homfa anidie paa mma bɛ dɔ mu, ɔnam bɛ nnwuma nti. Ho ne biaa ntena asomdwie mu.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Nti anuanom yɛhyɛ ho nkurane sɛ, honkasa nkyerɛ bɛ a bɛnante basabasa, honhyɛ bɛ a bɛ akoma abubu nkurane, ho mmoa bɛ a bɛayɛ mmerɛ, honya abotrɛ mma bɛ nyinaa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Honhwɛ sɛ ho mu biaa ɔmfa bɔne ntua bɔne ka, na honhwɛ sɛ hobɛhwɛ afoforɔ yiedie berɛ biaa.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Homma ho ani nye bere biaa,

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: honnnyae mpaebɔ da,

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: honna ase tebea nyinaa mu; na yei ne Nyankopɔn pɛ ya ho fa mu, Kristo Yesu mu.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Honnnum Honhom he gya he.

english_verse: or ignore prophecies.
translation_verse: Hommu adiyisɛm sɛ adehunu,

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: honsɔ bibiaa nhwɛ, na honsɔ deɛ ɔyɛ he mu yie;

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: hontwe ho ho mfiri nnoɔma bɔne biaa ho.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Asomdwie Nyankopɔn he ankasa nte ho ho koraa, ɔmfa ho honhom ne ho kra ne ho nipadua nsie yie ma onni mu, berɛ a ho ho ɔmma asɛm biaa wɔ Awurade Yesu Kristo mmaeɛ he mu.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Nea wafrɛ ho he yɛ nɔkwafoɔ, na ɔbɛyɔ. Nkradie

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Adɔfoɔ, hommɔ mpaeɛ mma yɛ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Homfa dɔ nkyeakyea anuanom nyinaa.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Mehyɛ ho Awurade mu sɛ, homma bɛnkenkane nwoma yi nkyerɛ anuanom nyinaa.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo Adom ne ho ntena.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Paulo, Silwano ne Timoteo, twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Tesalonikafoɔ asafo a ɔya yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn ɔne Awurade Yesu Kristo mu.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Adom ne asomdwie a ofiri yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Yesu Kristo nka ho. Afotuo ahodoɔ

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Anuanom, ɔsɛ sɛ yɛda Nyankopɔn ase ma ho da biaa, sɛnea ɔfata, efiri sɛ ho gyidie oonyini mmorosoɔ, na dɔ a hode dɔ ho ho ho ho he nso oonyini.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Esiane boasetɔ ne gyidie a hoda no adi taa ne ahohia a hohyia nyinaa mu nti, ɔma yɛ ankasa yɛhoahoa yɛ ho ma ho Nyankopɔn asafo mu.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Yei ne di Nyankopɔn atemmuo a ɔtene ho adanseɛ sɛ, bebebu ho sɛ Nyankopɔn ahennie a hohu ho amaneɛ he fata ho;

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, ɔtene Nyankopɔn anim sɛ ɔde ahohia tua bɛ a bɛde ahohiahia ba ho so he ka,

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: na wama ho a ahohiahia ba ho so he ahome, da a bebeyi Awurade Yesu ne n’abɔfoɔ a bɛwɔ tumi adi afiri soro ya gyaframa mu,

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: na bɛatɔ bɛ a bennim Nyankopɔn na bɛantie yɛ Awurade Yesu ho asɛmpa he so werɛ.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Yeinom benya daa sɛeɛ ho asotwe, na bɛayi bɛ afiri Awurade anim ne ne tumi animuonyam ho,

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: berɛ a ɔbɛba ama bɛahyɛ no animuonyam n’ahoteefoɔ mu, na bɛahwɛ n’anwanwadeɛ a ada adi bɛ a bɛagye adi nyinaa mu, efiri sɛ bɛagye yɛ adanseɛ a yedii no ho ho he adi, da heaa mu.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Yei nti yɛbɔ mpaeɛ ma ho daa, sɛ yɛ Nyankopɔn bɛma hoafata ne frɛ he, na wafa tumi so ama n’ayamyɛ anidasoɔ ne gyidie adwuma aba mu,

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: na bɛahyɛ yɛ Awurade Yesu dini animuonyam ho mu, na bɛahyɛ ho nso animuonyam ne mu, sɛnea yɛ Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Yesu Kristo adom he teɛ.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Afei anuanom ɔfa yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo mmaeɛ ɔne yɛ ano a bɛbɛboa akɔ ne nkyɛne he ho he, yɛsrɛ ho sɛ,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: hommma bɛmfa honhom anaa asɛm anaa nwoma a bɛka sɛ ofiri yɛ nkyɛne, sɛ ebia Awurade da he anya aduru, nnaadaa ho anaa mmɔ ho hu, berɛ a honyɔɔ nhwehwɛmu.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Hommma biaa nnaadaa ho bibiaa fam, efiri sɛ, da he ɔmma gye sɛ deɛ ɔte atua he aba ansa na bɛada nea onni mmara so he adi, nea ɔyɛ sɛeɛ ba he.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne ma ne ho so tia nea besusu sɛ ɔyɛ nyame anaa bosom a bɛsom biaa, na ama no akɔtena Nyankopɔn asɔredane mu de ne ho akyerɛ sɛ ɔno ne Nyankopɔn. Sɛeɛ a bɛbɛsɛe mmaratofoɔ

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Honkae sɛ mekaa nsɛm yeinom kyerɛɛ ho berɛ a na meya honkyɛne he?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Na afei, deɛ osi kwane he, honim sɛ bebeyi no adi ne berɛ mu.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Nea onni mmara so he ahintasɛm bɛkɔ so akosi sɛ nea seesei osi kwane he befiri kwane mu

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: ansa na bɛayi nea onni mmara so he adi, nea Awurade Yesu de ne honhom beku no na ɔde n’ahoyie ne ne mmaeɛ he beyi no hɔ koraa.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Nso kwane a nea onni mmara so he nam so ba ne Satan nnwuma a ahoɔdenneɛ ne atorɔ nsɛnkyerɛnne ne anwanwadeɛ nyinaa ka ho,

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: ɔne nnaadaa nsɛm ahodoɔ bebree a ɔya hɔ ma bɛ a bɛayera, efiri sɛ bɛammu nɔkorɛ dɔ he sɛ adeɛ a ɔsom bo na bɛanya nkwa.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Yei nti Nyankopɔn ɔɔsoma nnaadaa a mu ɔɔdene aba bemu na ama bɛagye torɔ adi,

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: na bɛabu bɛ a bɛannye nɔkorɛ dɔ he anni na mmom bɛanni gyee nea ɔntene ho he atɛne. Aseda

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Na yɛ deɛ, ho nti ɔsɛ sɛ yɛda Nyankopɔn ase daa, anuanom a Nyankopɔn dɔ ho, efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn firi mfitiaseɛ ayi ho kɔ nkwagyeɛ mu, efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn firi mfitiaseɛ yii ho kɔɔ nkwagyeɛ mu; ɔnam te a ɔde honhom he tee ho ho ne nɔkorɛ he mu gyidie ne gyee ho nkwa.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne ɔnam yɛ asɛmpa he so afrɛ ho aba, na hoanya yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo animuonyam.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Nti afei anuanom, honnyina pintinn, na honkura nkyerɛkyerɛ a yɛde gyaa o he mu, sɛ ɔnam yɛ anom asɛm anaa yɛ krataa bi so he.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Nti afei yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo he ankasa ne yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn a ɔdɔ yɛ na wama yɛ daa awerɛkyekyerɛ ne anidasoɔ pa adom mu he,

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: ɔnkyekyere ho werɛ, na ɔnhyɛ ho dene asɛm ne adwuma pa nyinaa mu.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Anuanom, deɛ otwa toɔ ne sɛ, hommɔ mpaeɛ mma yɛ, na Awurade asɛm nya kwane nkɔ so, na bɛnhyɛ no animuonyam sɛnea ɔteɛ ho fam he nso,

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: na benyi yɛ mfiri nnipa amumuyɔfoɔ ne abɔnefoɔ nsa mu, efiri sɛ, ɔnyɛ nnipa nyinaa ne wɔ gyidie.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Nso nɔkwafoɔ ne Awurade; ɔbɛhyɛ ho dene na wabɔ ho ho bane afiri sɛefoɔ he ho.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Na yɛwɔ Awurade mu ahotɔsoɔ ho ho sɛ hoyɔ nea yɛhyɛ ho he, na hobɛkɔ so ayɔ saa.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Awurade ntwe ho akoma nkɔ Nyankopɔn dɔ ne Kristo boasetɔ he mu.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Afei anuanom, yɛhyɛ ho Awurade Yesu Kristo dini mu sɛ, hontwe ho ho mfiri nipa biaa a ɔnam basabasa, na onni nkyerɛkyerɛ a honyaa no yɛ nkyɛne he so.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Na hoaa honim sɛ, ɔsɛ sɛ hosua yɛ, berɛ a na yɛya ho nkyɛne he, yɛannante basabasa,

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: na yɛanni biaa aduane berɛ a yɛantua ka; na mmom yɛyɔɔ adwuma, mmɔdemmɔ ne brɛ mu awia ne anadwo, na yɛanyɛ adesoa amma ho mu biaa.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ yenni ho kwane, na mmom sɛnea yɛbɛyɔ nhwɛsoɔ ama ho asua nti ne yɛyɔɔ saa.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Na yɛya ho nkyɛne he nso, yɛhyɛɛ ho sɛ: sɛ bi mpɛ sɛ ɔyɔ adwuma a, mma no nnidi.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Na yɛate sɛ binom ya hɔ a bɛnenam basabasa ho mu, bɛnam frɛdɛfrɛdɛ a bɛnyɔ adwuma biaa.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Afei bɛ a bɛte saa he ne yɛhyɛ bɛ na yetu bɛ fo yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo mu, sɛ bɛmfa bɛ nsa nyɔ komm mfa mpɛ bɛ ano aduane.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi antie yɛ asɛm a ɔya krataa yi mu a, honhyɛ no nso, ho ne no mmɔ fekuo, na ama n’ani awu.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Nso hommmu saa nipa he sɛ ho tamfoɔ, na mmom honkasa nkyerɛ no sɛ nua.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Na ɔno asomdwie Awurade he mma ho asomdwie adeɛ nyinaa mu daa. Awurade nka ho nyinaa ho. Nkradie ne nhyira

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
