translation_verse: Yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo adom nka ho nyinaa.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Paulo, Kristo Yesu somafoɔ, sɛnea yɛ Agyenkwa Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Kristo Yesu a ɔyɛ yɛ anidasoɔ he ahyɛ he,

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Timoteo, me gyidie mu ba kann: Adom, mmɔborɔhunu ne asomdwie a ofiri Agya Nyankopɔn ne Kristo Yesu, yɛ Awurade nkyɛne nka wo. Timoteo adwuma titire ya Efeso

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ meekɔ Makedonia a mesrɛɛ wo sɛ tena Efeso na woatu nnipa bi fo, sɛ bɛnkyerɛ nkyerɛkyerɛ foforɔ he, saa ara nso ne,

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: kyerɛkyerɛ bɛ sɛ ɔnsɛ sɛ bɛsɛe bɛ mmerɛ anansesɛm ne anatoɔ a onni awieeɛ a ɔde tekakyerɛ ba he ho; na saa nnoɔma yi mfa honhom mu nteteɛ a ofiri gyidie mu mma.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Na afutusɛm he botae ne dɔ a ofiri akoma pa, ahonim pa ne nɔkorɛ gyidie mu ba.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Nnipa bi amane afiri yeinom ho kɔ nsɛm huhuo ho,

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: na pɛ sɛ bɛyɛ mmarakyerɛfoɔ, nso bɛnnte nsɛm a bɛka he ne nea bɛgye gyinam dendene he ase.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Afei, yenim sɛ mmara he, sɛ bi de di dwuma ne kwane so a, ɔyɛ.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Yei kyerɛ sɛ mmara he nna hɔ mma teneneeni, na mmom ɔda hɔ mmaratofoɔ ne asoɔdenfoɔ, nea onsuro Nyankopɔn ne debɔnyɛni, nea ne ho nte ne kasafi-kafoɔ, bɛ a beku bɛ na anaa bɛ agya, awudifoɔ,

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: nnwamamfoɔ, mmeema a bɛ ne mmeema da, nnipatɔnfoɔ, atorɔfoɔ, ntantofoɔ ɔne bibiaa a ɔne nkyerɛkyerɛ pa bɔ abira biaa.

english_verse: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
translation_verse: Sɛnea ɔne nhyira Nyankopɔn he animuonyam asɛmpa a ɔde hyɛɛ me nsa he teɛ he. Adom a beyi kyerɛ Paulo

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Meda Kristo Yesu yɛ Awurade a waahyɛ me dene he ase, sɛ waabu me nɔkwafoɔ na waayi me ama ne som adwuma,

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: ɔyam sɛ akane he, na meyɛ abususɛnkafoɔ, taafoɔ ne bi a ommu hwee, nso menyaa adom, efiri sɛ, na mennim deɛ meeyɔ, ɔnam gyidie a na menni nti.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Na yɛ Awurade adom boroo so maa me gyidie ne dɔ Kristo Yesu mu.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Asɛm he yɛ nɔkorɛ, na ɔsɛ sɛ bɛgye tom sɛ Kristo Yesu baa wiase bɛgyee nnebɔnyɛfoɔ a medi mu kane.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Na ɔno nso nti ne menyaa mmɔborɔhunu, sɛnea Yesu Kristo bɛfa me a medi kane nnebɔnyɛfoɔ mu ada abodwokyɛre adi, ayɛ nhwɛsoɔ ama bɛ a bɛbɛgye no adi anya daa nkwa.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Anidie ne animuonyam nka Nyankopɔn daa daa, mekyerɛ daa mmeresantene Hene a onnwu da, na bennhu no a ɔno nkoaa ne Nyankopɔn trodoo he. Amen! Paulo tuu Timoteo fo

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Me ba Timoteo, mede saa ahyɛdeɛ yeinom ɔɔhyɛ wo nsa, sɛnea nkɔmhyɛ a ɔfa wo ho pɛɛ he kyerɛ he, na woadi akyire atumi ako ko pa he,

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: berɛ a wokura gyidie ne ahonim pa a binom apia ato nkyɛne nti, nnipa binom ahwe ase gyidie mu he;

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: bi ne Hemeneo ne Aleksandro a maagya bɛ ama Satan, na bɛasua sɛ bɛbɛtwe bɛ ho afiri abususɛnka ho.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Afei, nea odi kane, metu fo sɛ homfa adesrɛ, mpaebɔ, dima ne aseda mma nnipa nyinaa,

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: ahemfo ne nnipa a bɛwɔ diberɛ akɛseɛ nyinaa, na ama yɛabɔ ahobrɛaseɛ ne asomdwie bra, nyamesuro ne mudie nyinaa mu.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Yei yɛ, na ɔsɔ yɛ Agyenkwa Nyankopɔn ani,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: nea ɔpɛ sɛ biaa nya nkwa na ɔnya nɔkorɛ ho nimdeɛ he.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn baako ne ya hɔ; na ntamgyinafoɔ nso baako ne ya Nyankopɔn ne nnipa ntam, ɔno ne Kristo Yesu a ɔyɛ nipa,

english_verse: God showed us this at the right time.
translation_verse: a ɔde ne ho yɛɛ agyedeɛ maa nnipa nyinaa; bedii yei ho adanseɛ berɛ pa mu.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Nti mepɛ sɛ, berɛ biaa a hobehyia asom he, mmeema mmɔ mpaeɛ, mma nsa kronkron so a abufuo ne akyinnye nnim;

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: afei nso, mmaa mfa ntaadeɛ a ɔsɛ nsiesie bɛ ho anidahɔ ne kwane pa so, ɔnyɛ tire a bɛayɔ no kyɛnkyerɛnn a ne boɔ ɔdene anaa sika, ahweneɛ anaa ntaadeɛ a ne boɔ ɔdene mu,

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: na mmom nnwuma pa mu, sɛnea ɔfata mmaa a bɛde anidie ma Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Mmaa mfa kommyɛ nsua adeɛ ahobrɛaseɛ mu.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Memma baa biaa kwane sɛ ɔnkyerɛkyerɛ anaa ɔnnya beema so tumi; ɔsɛ sɛ ɔyɛ komm.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Na Adam ne bedii kane bɔ no ansa na bɛɛbɔ Hawa;

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ Adam ne bɛdaada no, na mmom baa he ne bɛdaadaa no maa no too mmara.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Nso sɛ baa he tena gyidie ne dɔ ne ahoteɛ ne adwenemteɛ mu a, bɛbɛgye no nkwa n’abawoɔ mu.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, sɛ bi pɛ sɛ ɔyɛ asafo so hwɛfoɔ, na adwuma pa paa ne ɔɔhwehwɛ he.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ asafo so hwɛfoɔ yɛ bi a onni dimmɔne biaa, ne yerɛ baako, n’ani da hɔ, ɔyɛ nyansafoɔ, ɔyɛ bi a biaa ma anidie, ɔpɛ ahɔhoyɛ, onim nkyerɛkyerɛ,

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: na ɔnyɛ nsadweam, ɔnyɛ pupopupo na mmom ɔdwo, na afei ɔnyɛ ntɔkwapɛfoɔ anaa sikaniberɛ.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ, otumi hwɛ ɔnoaa ne fie so yie, ma ne mma hyɛ n’ase na bɛbrɛ bɛ ho ase akwane nyinaa so,

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: na sɛ bi nnim sɛdeɛ ɔbɛhwɛ ɔnoaa ne fie so a, ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na wahwɛ Nyankopɔn asafo so?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Ɔnsɛ sɛ ɔyɛ bi a ɔsakraeɛ nkyɛreɛ, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a ɔmma ne ho so nhwe afobuo a bronsam ahwe mu he bi.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Afei, ɔsɛ sɛ ɔwɔ dini pa amanfoɔ anim na wanhwe animguaseɛ ne bronsam nnɛɛdɛɛ mu. Su a ɔfata asomfoɔ ne bɛ yerenom

english_verse: Church officers should be serious. They must not be liars, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
translation_verse: Saa ne asafo mu asomfoɔ nso ɔsɛ bɛ sɛ bɛ anim yɛ duru, na bɛnyɛ ano ntanta, nsadweam, adufudepɛfoɔ;

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: na mmom ɔsɛ sɛ bɛde ahonim pa kura gyidie he ho ahintasɛm he mu dene.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Na bɛnsɔ bɛ nhwɛ na sɛ bɛannya bɛ ho asɛm biaa anka a, ma bɛnsom sɛ asafo mu asomfoɔ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Saa ara nso ne ɔsɛ sɛ mmaa nso anim nyɛ duru, bɛnyɛ nsekuro, na mmom anidahɔ, bɛnyɛ nɔkwafoɔ adeɛ nyinaa mu.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ asafo mu asomfoɔ nya yerɛnom mmaako mmaako, na bɛhwɛ bɛ mma ne bɛ fie so yie;

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, bɛ a bɛsom yie sɛ asomfoɔ he, nya gyinaberɛ pa ma bɛ ho, ɔne nnamyɛ pii Kristo Yesu mu gyidie mu.

english_verse: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
translation_verse: M’ani da so sɛ ɔnkyɛre biaa mɛba wo nkyɛne deɛ, nso meetwerɛ yei abra wo na

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: sɛ bibi ma mekyɛre a, woahu sɛdeɛ ɔsɛ sɛ bi bɔ ne bra Nyankopɔn fie a ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn teasefoɔ he asafo, nɔkorɛ dum ne nyinasoɔ he mu.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Akyinnye nni ho sɛ yɛ som yi mu ahintasɛm he so: Beyii no kyerɛ honam mu, bebuu no bem honhom mu, abɔfoɔ huu no, bɛpaee mu ka ne ho asɛm amanamane mu, bɛgyee no diiɛ wiase, bɛfaa no kɔ soro animuonyam mu.

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Afei, Honhom he ka no pefee sɛ, awieeɛ berɛ he mu, nnipa binom bɛfam nnaadaa ahonhom ne ahonhommɔne nkyerɛkyerɛ ho apa gyidie he,

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: ɔnam nyaatwom a ofiri atorɔfoɔ nkontompo nti. Yeinom yɛ nnipa a bɛ ahonim awu;

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: besi awadeɛ ho kwane ka sɛ, nnipa ntua bɛ ho nnuane a Nyankopɔn bɔɔ sɛ agyidifoɔ ne bɛ a bɛahu nɔkorɛ mfa aseda nni bi he;

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: na deɛ Nyankopɔn abɔ nyinaa yɛ, na yɛde aseda gye a, ɔnsɛ sɛ yɛpo bibiaa,

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn asɛm ne mpaebɔ ne yɛde te ho.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Sɛ wode saa nkyerɛkyerɛ yi to anuanom anim a, wobɛyɛ Kristo Yesu somfo pa a bɛatete wo gyidie nsɛm ne nkyerɛkyerɛ pa a woadi akyire he mu. Abrabɔ pa ho afotuo

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Twe wo ho firi anansesɛm ne nsɛm hunu a ɔntɔ asum ho. Bɔ nyamesom-pa ho mmɔdene;

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Yei nti ne yɛyere yɛ ho na yɛpre, na yɛ anidasoɔ ne Nyankopɔn teasefoɔ a ɔyɛ nnipa nyinaa, ne titire bɛ a bɛgye di he Agyenkwa.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Saa nnoɔma yi ne si so dua, na kyerɛkyerɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Mma biaa mmu wo babunuyɛ animtia, na mmom yɛ nhwɛsopa kasaa, nneyɔeɛ, dɔ, gyidie ne ahoteɛ mu.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Nya mmerɛ ma twerɛsɛm kenkane, kasakyerɛ ne nkyerɛkyerɛ kosi sɛ mɛba.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Mmu w’ani ngu akyɛdeɛ a ɔya wo mu he so, meekyerɛ akyɛdeɛ a ɔnam nkɔmhyɛ so baa wo so, berɛ a asafo mpanyimfoɔ badwa he de bɛ nsa guu wo so he.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Saa nnoɔma yi ne yɔ, na nya ho mmerɛ nso, na biaa ahu wo nkɔsoɔ.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Ma w’ani mmara wo ho so ɔne wo nkyerɛkyerɛ so paa; toa so yeinom mu na wonam saa yɔ so bɛgye wo ne w’atiefoɔ nkwa.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Nkasa ntia panyini, na mmom tu no fo sɛ ɔyɛ w’agya, kasa kyerɛ mmaranteɛ sɛ wo nuanom,

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: kasa kyerɛ mmaa mpanyimfoɔ sɛ wo nanom, kasa kyerɛ mmabaa sɛ wo nuammaanom ya ahoteɛ nyinaa mu.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Di akunafoɔ a benni aboafoɔ he ni, na ma bɛ ahiadeɛ nhia wo.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Sɛ kunani baa bi wɔ mma anaa nanaanom a, benni kane nsua nyamesom pa bɛ fie mu na bentua bibi mma bɛ awofoɔ; na yei ne sɔ Nyankopɔn ani.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Kunafoɔ baa a onni boafoɔ he de n’ani to Nyankopɔn so na okura nkotosrɛ ne mpaebɔ mu anadwo ne awia;

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: na kunani baa a odi honam akɔnnɔ akyi he yɛ teaseawuo.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Yeinom ho ne hyɛ bɛ, na bɛannya dimmɔne biaa.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi anhwɛ ɔnoaa ankasa n’abusuafoɔ, ne titire ne fiefoɔ a, waapa gyidie he, na deɛ ɔnnye nni mpo yɛ kyɛne no.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Ansa na bɛde kunafoɔ bi dini bɛka ho he, ɔsɛ sɛ waadi firi mfie aduosia ɔɔkɔ na ɔwɔ ɔno ankasa ne kunu;

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: ɔsɛ sɛ bedi ne ho adanse-pa, sɛ ɔyɛ bi a watete mmɔfra, ayɔ ahɔhoyɛ, asom agyidifoɔ he ahobrɛaseɛ mu , aboa bɛ a bɛwɔ amaneɛ mu, na ɔde ne ho ama papayɔ adeɛ nyinaa mu.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Na akunafoɔ mmaa a benyiniiɛ deɛ, mfa bɛ nhyɛ mu bi; efiri sɛ bɛ akɔnnɔ twe bɛ firi Kristo ho a bɛbɛpɛ sɛ bɛbɛware,

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: na bɛyɔ saa a, bebenya afobuo sɛ bɛabu bɛ bɔhyɛ so.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Ɔno akyi he, besua aniha, kyinkyini afie mu, na bɛnyɛ aniha nkoaa, na mmom bedi nsekuro a bɛnenam terɛterɛ keka nsɛm a ɔnsɛ sɛ bɛka.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Nti mepɛ sɛ akunafoɔ a benyiniiɛ he wareware, wowo mma, na bɛhwɛ bɛ fie, na yɛamma tamfoɔ he kwane amma wanka yɛ ho asɛm bɔne.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Sɛ gyidini baa bi wɔ abusuafoɔ a bɛyɛ akunafoɔ a, ma ɔmmoa bɛ; mma ɔmfa nto asafo he so, na asafo he atumi aboa akunafoɔ a benni mmoa he.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Ma bɛmfa anidie a odi mu mma asafo mpanyimfoɔ a bedi asafo he so yie he, titire ne bɛ a bɛka asɛmpa na bɛkyerɛkyerɛ;

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: na atwerɛ he ka sɛ, “Nkata nantwie a ɔɔpore aburo ano,” na “Paani akatua sɛ no.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Nnye kwaadu a otia panyini biaa ntom gye sɛ ogyina adansefoɔ mmienu anaa mmeɛnsa anum asɛm so. Adesrɛ ne afotuo

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Na bɛ a bɛkɔ so tena bɔne mu he deɛ, yi bɛ atene nnipa nyinaa anim na ama bɛ a bɛaka he nso bɛasuro.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Nyankopɔn ne Kristo Yesu ne abɔfoɔ a bɛayi bɛ he anim ne meebɔ wo kɔkɔ sɛ di saa nkyerɛkyerɛ yi so a wonhwɛ nnipa anim, na womfa ntɛnkyea nni dwuma biaa.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Mpre wo ho mfa wo nsa ngu biaa so, na nyɔ afoforɔ bɔne bi; ma wo ho nte.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Nnom nsuo nkoaa bio, na wo yafunu ne mmerɛ a wotaa yɛ he nti, nom nsa kakraa bi nso!

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Nnipa binom bɔne da adi pefee de bɛ ɔɔkɔ atemmuo mu binom nso bɔne di bɛ akyi.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Saa nso ne nnwuma pa nso da adi pefee; na sɛ anyɛ saa mpo a onhinta afebɔɔ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Ma bɛ a bɛhyɛ nkoasom ase nhu bɛ wuranom sɛ bɛ sɛ anidie mapa, na amma bi ankasa antia Nyankopɔn dini ne nkyerɛkyerɛ he.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Na mma bɛ a bɛwɔ awuranom gyidifoɔ mmmu bɛ animtia sɛ bɛyɛ anuanom nti, na mmom bɛnsom bɛ yie, efiri sɛ bɛ a bɛsom bɛ he yɛ agyidifoɔ ne adɔfoɔ. Yeinom ne kyerɛkyerɛ, na tu ho fo. Nkontompo nkyerɛkyerɛ

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Biaa a ɔkyerɛkyerɛ bibi foforɔ a ɔne Awurade Yesu Kristo nsɛmpa ne ne nkyerɛkyerɛ a ɔyɛ nyamesompa he bɔ abira he,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: ɔyɛ nipa a ahomasoɔ ahyɛ no ma, onnim hwee, n’asɛm yɛ twintwann, na ɔgye asɛm biaa ho akyinnye ma no de ahoɔyeya, mpaepaemu, nantitwitwa, nnipa ho adwemmɔne,

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: ne ntɔkwapɛ ba bɛ a porɔeɛ asɛe bɛ adwene a nɔkorɛ asapare bɛ na bɛdwene sɛ nyamesom pa yɛ adeɛ a bɛde pɛ mfasoɔ he mu. Adufudepɛ

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, nyamesompa, ɔne sɔ a bi ɔɔma n’ani asɔ nea ɔwɔ he, yɛ adenya kɛseɛ,

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ yɛamfa hwee amma wiase, na yentumi mfa hwee mfiri mu nkɔ;

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: na sɛ yɛwɔ nea yebedi ne nea yɛbɛhyɛ a, yɛmma ɔnsom bo mma yɛ.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Na bɛ a bɛɛpɛ bɛ ho anya he hwe sɔhwɛ, fidie ne nkwasea akɔnnɔ mu a ɔde yawdie ba, a ɔnyɛ mma nnipa na ɔtwe bɛ kɔ sɛeɛ ne yera mu.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Na bɔne ahodoɔ nyinaa bi farebae ne sikaniberɛ a, binom adi akyire ayera kwane na bɛde yea pii awowɔ bɛ ho. Adesrɛ bi

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Na wo, Nyankopɔn nnipa deɛ, po yeinom nyinaa; hwehwɛ tenenee, nyamesom-pa, gyidie, dɔ, yokoduru ne dwoɔ akyi kwane.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Ko gyidie ko pa he, sɔ daa nkwa a bɛfrɛ wo baa mu, berɛ a wogye too mu kwane pa so adansefoɔ bebree anim, he mu dene.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Meetu wo fo Nyankopɔn a ɔma nnoɔma nyinaa nkwa ne Kristo Yesu a ɔpaee mu kaa no yie, dii ho adanseɛ Pontio Pilato anim he,

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: sɛ: hwɛ ahyɛdeɛ he so, mma dɛm anaa asɛm bi mmma ho kosi Awurade Yesu Kristo ahoyie so.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Ɔno Nyankopɔn ne bɛkyerɛ berɛ a ɔsɛ mu ne ahotɔ tumfoɔ korɔ he, ahene mu Hene ne awuranom mu Awurade.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Ɔno nkoaa ne wɔ anwuda tebea na ɔte hann a bi ntumi nkɔ ho, nea biaa nhu no da na biaa ntumi nhu no; ɔno ne anidie ne daa tumidie wɔ no. Amen. Otu adefoɔ fo

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Nnipa a bɛanya bɛ ho wiase yi mu he, hyɛ bɛ sɛ mma bɛnnwene akokurokosɛm, saa nso ne bɛmmfa bɛ ho nto ahonyadeɛ a onni hɔ daa so, na mmom bɛmfa bɛ ho nto Nyankopɔn a ɔma yɛ nea yɛpɛ nyinaa ma ɔdɔɔso he so.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ bɛyɔ papa, na bennya bɛ ho nnwuma pa fam; bɛ nsɛm ngo na bɛnkyɛ adeɛ fɛ so,

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: na saa yɔ mu ne bɛhyehyɛ fapem pa ama bɛ ho daakye, na bɛanya nkwa a ɔyɛ nkwa mapa. Awieeɛ ne nhyira

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoteo, bɔ nea bɛde ahyɛ wo nsa he ho bane. Kwati nsɛmhuhuo ɔne nea bɛfrɛ no nimdeɛ nso ɔnte saa;

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: binom akeka yei amane afiri gyidie botae he ho. Adom nka wo!

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Me, Paulo a ɔnam Nyankopɔn pɛ so yɛ Kristo Yesu somafoɔ, sɛdeɛ nkwa a ɔya Kristo Yesu mu bɔhyɛ he teɛ he,

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Timoteo, me dɔba: Adom, mmɔborɔhunu ne asomdwie a ofiri Agya Nyankopɔn ne yɛ Awurade Kristo Yesu nkyɛne nka wo.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Meda Nyankopɔn a mede ahonim pa som no sɛdeɛ me nananom someeɛ he ase, berɛ a mekae wo me mpaebɔ mu, anadwo ne awia.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Mekae nisuo a woteeɛ berɛ a na yeedi mpaepaemu he a, m’ani gyina awia ne anadwo sɛ mehu wo, sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a anigyeɛ bɛhyɛ me ma.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Mekae wo nɔkorɛ gyidie he, gyidie a wo nana Lois nyaeɛ, na wo maame Eunike nso nyaa bi a megye di sɛ agye nhini ya wo nso wo mu he. Afotuo ahodoɔ

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Yei nti, meekae wo sɛ kanyane Nyankopɔn akyɛdeɛ a ɔnam me nsa a mede guu wo so ba wo mu he;

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ Nyankopɔn amma yɛ hu honhom, na mmom ahoɔdene ne dɔ ne adwenemteɛ honhom ne ɔde mmaa yɛ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Nti mma w’ani nwu yɛ Awurade ho adansedie ne me, a meyɛ deduani he ho, na mmom hu asɛmpa he ho amaneɛ bi sɛdeɛ Nyankopɔn tumi teɛ he,

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: nea ɔgyee yɛ na ɔde frɛ kronkron frɛɛ yɛ, ɔnyɛ yɛ nnwuma nti, na mmom ɔnam ɔnoaa ne tirimpɔ ne n’adom a ɔde mmaeɛ Kristo Yesu mu firi mmeresantene.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Na afei ɔnam yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo ahoyie he so ada no adi. Ɔno ne wasɛe wuo tumi, na ɔnam asɛmpa he so ayi nkwa ne adeɛ a ɔmporɔ adi pefee.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Saa asɛmpa yi nti ne bɛayi me sɛ sɛnkafoɔ ne somafoɔ ne kyerɛkyerɛfoɔ,

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: ɔno nti ne mehu saa amaneɛ yi nso. Nso m’ani nwu ho, efiri sɛ menim nea maagye no adi, na menim sɛ obetumi akora nea mede ahyɛ ne nsa akosi Da he.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Sɔ asɛmpa a wotee no me nkyɛne, gyidie ne dɔ a ɔya Yesu Kristo mu, he mu yie.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Adepa a ɔde ahyɛ wo nsa he, fa Honhom Kronkron a ɔte yɛ mu he sɔ mu yie. Figelo, Hermogene, Onesiforo

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Wonim sɛ bɛ a bɛya Asia nyinaa adane afiri me nkyɛne, bɛ mu bi ne Figelo ne Hermogene.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Awurade nhu Onesiforo fie mmɔbɔ, efiri sɛ na ɔtaa ma me ho tɔ me, na n’ani nwu me nkɔnsɔnkɔnsɔn ho;

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: ɔbaa Roma he, ɔbɔɔ mmɔdene hwehwɛɛ me, na ohuu me.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Awurade Yesu Kristo mma honya Nyankopɔn hɔ mmɔborɔhunu Da he! Na som a ɔsom Efeso he woaa wonim.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Afei wo, me ba, ɔnam adom a bɛde adom wo Yesu Kristo mu nti, yɛ nam.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Na deɛ wote firii m’anum adansefoɔ bebree anim he, ɔnoaa ne fa hyɛ nnipa anokwafoɔ a bebetumi akyerɛkyerɛ binom nso nsa.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Wo nso mia w’ani hu amane sɛ Yesu Kristo sraani pa.

english_verse: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
translation_verse: Sraani biaa nni hɔ a ɔkɔ sa de asetena mu nsɛm bebare ne ho, sraani he botaeɛ ne sɛ ɔbɛsɔ ne panyini ani.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ kuani a wɔayɔ adwuma dene he ne di kane di nnɔbae he bi.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Dwene nea meka yi ho, na Awurade bɛma wo nnoɔma nyinaa ho nteaseɛ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Kae Yesu Kristo a ɔsɔre firii awufoɔ mu a ɔyɛ Dawid aseni he, sɛdeɛ m’asɛmpa a meka he teɛ;

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: ɔno nti mu ne meehu amane, na meda mpokyerem sɛ debɔnyɛni. Nso Nyankopɔn asɛm deɛ bɛnkyekyeree no.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Yei nti meto me bo nnoɔma nyinaa mu, sɛnea ɔbɛyɔ a bɛ a bɛayi bɛ he nso bebenya Kristo Yesu mu nkwagyeɛ, daa animuonyam mu. Asɛnnua ne abotire

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm di: sɛ yɛne no awu a, yɛne no bɛsɔre nso;

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: sɛ yegyina pintinn a, yɛ ne no bedi hene nso; sɛ yɛpo no a ɔno nso bɛpo yɛ;

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: sɛ yɛnyɛ nɔkwafoɔ a, ɔno deɛ ɔyɛ nɔkwafoɔ efiri sɛ ontumi mpa ne ho akyi. Dwumayɔni a ɔsɔ Nyankopɔn ani

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Kɔ so kae bɛ saa nsɛm yi, na di bɛ adanseɛ Nyankopɔn anim, na bɛannye nsɛm ho akyinnye hunu a mfasoɔ nni so a ɔsɛe atiefoɔ adwene.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Bɔ mmɔdene sɛ wobɛ sɔ Nyankopɔn ani na obehu wo sɛ dwumayɔni a n’ani nwu bibiaa ho, na ɔkyerɛ nɔkwasɛm mu pɛpɛɛpɛ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Yi wo ho firi nsɛmhuhuo a ho nte ho, efiri sɛ, ɔbɛma nipa akɔ n’anim amumuyɔ mu,

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: na bɛ asɛm bɛterɛ sɛ yare bɔne. Bemu bi ne Himeneo ne Fileto,

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: a bɛamane afiri nɔkorɛ he ho ka sɛ wusɔreɛ he aba dada, na bɛnam so ɔɔdane binom gyidie abutu,

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: sɛ yei nyina mu he Nyankopɔn fapem da soaa gyina hɔ pintinn a ho ntwerɛeɛ ne sɛ: “Awurade nim ne deɛ,” ɔne, “ma nea ɔbɔ Awurade dini biaa ntwe ne ho mfiri amumuyɔ ho.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Na fikɛseɛ biaa mu he ɔnyɛ sika ne dwetɛ nnoɔma nkoaa ne ya hɔ, na mmom nnua ne nnɛteɛ deɛ nso ya hɔ bi, na bebu bi, bi nso bemmu no.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Na sɛ bi te ne ho firi yeinom ho a, ɔbɛyɛ nea bebu, na bɛate ho a, owura he de yɛ bibi a, ɔbɛyɛ yie, na bɛasiesie de ayɔ adwuma pa biaa.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Nti dwane firi mmabunu berɛ mu akɔnnɔ ho na hwehwɛ tenenee, gyidie, dɔ ne asomdwie, wo ne bɛ a befiri akoma a mu te mu frɛ Awurade he.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Na nkwasea-akyinnye a bɛmfa nsua hwee deɛ, nkɔ ho koraa, efiri sɛ, sɛnea wonim he, ɔde ntɔkwa ba.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Na ɔnsɛ Awurade akoa bi sɛ ɔyɛ ntɔkwapɛfoɔ, na mmom, ɔsɛ sɛ ɔdwo ma nnipa nyinaa, ohu nkyerɛkyerɛ, ɔhyɛ ne ho so bɔne ho,

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: na ɔde dwoɔ tenetene bɛ a bɛ ne no nyɛ adwene asɛm mu, sɛ ebia Nyankopɔn bɛma bɛ adwensakra ahu nɔkorɛ he,

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: na ama bɛanni aba bɛ ho so ya bronsam fidie a ɔde akye bɛ sɛ bɛnyɛ n’apɛdeɛ he mu.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Nso hu yei sɛ, nna a odi akyire he, mmerɛ a mu ɔdene bɛba;

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: efiri sɛ nnipa bɛyɛ ahopɛfoɔ, sikapɛfoɔ, ahohoahoafoɔ, ahantanfoɔ, abususɛnkafoɔ, awofoɔ ho asoɔdenfoɔ, boniayɛfoɔ, bɛ a benni nyamesuro,

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: nnipa a benni tema, apamsɛefoɔ, nsekubɔfoɔ, nnipa a bɛnhyɛ bɛ akɔnnɔ so, nnipa a bɛyɛ werɛmfoɔ, nnipa a bɛmpɛ papa,

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: afatwafoɔ, akakabenfoɔ, nnipa a bɛyɛ ahomasoɔ kɛseɛ, nnipa a bɛdɔ anigyedeɛ sene Nyankopɔn;

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: bɛde nyamesompa adura bɛ anim nso bɛamfa tumi a ɔyam he nni dwuma. Twe wo ho mfiri saa nnipa yi ho.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Na yeinom mu bi ne bɛ a bɛkɔ afie mu na bɛfa mmaa adwenemharefoɔ na bɔne ahyɛ bɛ ma, na akɔnnɔ ahodoɔ afa bɛ nommum,

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: bɛ a betie nkyerɛkyerɛ daa nso benhu nɔkorɛ he da.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Sɛnea Yane ne Yambrɛ ko tiaa Mose he, saa ara ne yeinom nso ne nɔkorɛ he di asie. Bɛyɛ nnipa a bɛ adwene aporɔ na bɛ gyidie nyɛ papa.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Nso bennya nkɔsoɔ, efiri sɛ sɛnea bɛyɔeɛ he, bɛ gyimii bɛda adi nnipa nyinaa anim, sɛnea nnipa mmienu he deɛ daa adi he. Paulo amanehunu

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: taa a bɛtaa me, ne amanehunu a mefaa mu Antiokia, Ikonium ne Listra. Saa taa yi ne megyinaa mu! Nso Awurade gyee me firi ne nyinaa mu.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ampa, bɛ a bɛpɛ sɛ bɛde nyamesom pa tena Kristo Yesu mu nyinaa, bɛbɛtaa bɛ.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Na nnipa bɔne sisifoɔ deɛ bɛkɔ bɛ anim bɔne mu, bɛbɛdaadaa binom na binom adaadaa bɛ nso.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Na wo deɛ kɔ so tena nea woasua na woagye adi he mu, na hu sɛ wosua firii yɛ nkyɛne

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: ne sɛnea wofiri wo mmɔfrase nim atwerɛ kronkron he a, obetumi ama woahu nyansa afa Kristo Yesu mu akɔ nkwagyeɛ mu.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Atwerɛ nyinaa firi Nyankopɔn homee mu na ɔyɛ ma nkyerɛkyerɛ, atenyie, atenetene ne tenenee mu nteteɛ,

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: na Nyankopɔn nipa nam so ayɛ pɛ a bɛasiesie no koraa ama nnwuma pa nyinaa.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Afei mehyɛ wo Nyankopɔn ne Kristo Yesu a obebu ateasefoɔ ne awufoɔ atɛne n’ahoyie ne n’ahennie mu he anim sɛ:

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: pae mu ka asɛmpa he, gyina mu berɛ pa ne berɛ bɔne mu; yi atene, ka anim, tu fo, abodwokyɛre ne nkyerɛkyerɛ nyinaa mu.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Na berɛ bi bɛba a nnipa ontie nkyerɛkyerɛ pa a ɔyɛ he, nso esiane sɛ bɛasom yɛ bɛ hene nti, bɛbɛboaboa akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ ano sɛnea bɛ a bɛ akɔnnɔ teɛ,

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: na bebeyi bɛ aso afiri nɔkorɛ ho, na bɛatie anansesɛm.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Na wo deɛ ma w’ani nna hɔ berɛ biaa, mia w’ani hu amane, yɔ sɛmpakafoɔ adwuma, yɛ wo som adwuma nyinaa.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Na me deɛ, berɛ he anya aduru sɛ behwie me agu sɛ hwiesa, na me ntetemudie berɛ aso.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Maakõ kõ pa he, maawie mmirika he tu, maakura gyidie he mu.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Afei nea aka a ɔsɛ sɛ me nsa ka ne tenenee abotire a Awurade, temufoɔ a ɔtene he de bɛma me Da he, ɔnyɛ me nko na mmom bɛ a bɛdɔ n’ahoyie nyinaa nso. Paulo ani gyina Timoteo

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Bɔ mmɔdene bra me nkyɛne ntɛm.

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Na Dema deɛ, ɔdɔ nnɛ wiase nti, waagya me hɔ kɔ Tesalonika; Kreske kɔ Galatia, Tito nso kɔ Dalmatia.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka nkoaa ne ya me nkyɛne. Fa Marko ka wo ho bra, efiri sɛ ne ho hia me som adwuma mu paa.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Tihiko deɛ, masoma no Efeso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Sɛ wooba a, fa m’ataadeɛ duruduru a megyaa no Karpo nkyɛne ya Troa ne me nwoma he bra me, ne titire he kokwanwoma he. Tomfoɔ Aleksandro

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksandro, kɔɔbere dwumfoɔ he, yɛɛ me bɔne bebree. Awurade betua no ka sɛnea ne nwuma teɛ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Wo nso, hwɛ yie ne ho, efiri sɛ osii yɛ asɛm he ho kwane bebree. Gyeɛ a bɛgye Paulo

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Me nyiano nea odi kane he mu he, biaa annyina m’akyi, biaa põõ me. Mempɛ sɛ bɛde ho asodie bɛto bɛ so.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Nso Awurade gyinaa m’akyi na ɔmaa me ahoɔdene, de kaa asɛmpa he nyinaa sɛ ɔbɛyɛ a amanamane mufoɔ nyinaa bɛte. Nti oyii me firii gyata anum.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ampa, Awurade beyi me afiri bɔne nyinaa mu, na wagye me akɔ ne soro ahennie mu. Ɔno ne animuonyam nka no daadaa. Amen. Gye a bɛgyee Paulo

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Mekyea Priska ne Akwila ne Onesiforo fiefoɔ.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasto deɛ, ɔkaa Korinto, ne megyaa Trofimo ya Mileto a na ɔyare.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Bɔ mmɔdene bra ansa na awɔ berɛ aba. Eubulo ne Pude ne Lino ne Klaudia ne anuanom nyinaa kyeakyea wo.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Awurade ne wo honhom ntena. Adom nka wo!

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Me, Paulo, Nyankopɔn akoa ne Yesu Kristo somafoɔ ma bɛ a Nyankopɔn ayi bɛ gyidie ne nyamesom pa ho nɔkorɛ he nimdeɛ mu,

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: daa nkwa ho anidasoɔ a Nyankopɔn a onni torɔ, hyɛɛ ho bɔ too hɔ ansa na adebɔ ɔɔbɛhyɛ aseɛ—

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: na berɛ a ɔsɛ mu he, oyii n’asɛm adi, asɛnka a bɛnam yɛ Agyenkwa Nyankopɔn hyɛ so de ahyɛ me nsa he mu;

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma Tito a ɔyɛ me ba kann gyidie korɔ heaa mu: Adom ne asomdwie a ofiri Agya Nyankopɔn ne Kristo Yesu a ɔyɛ yɛ Agyenkwa nka wo! Tito ya Kreta

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Yei nti ne megyaa wo Kreta, sɛ wobɛtoto nnoɔma a ohia sɛ bɛyɔ nyinaa yie, na woayi kuro biaa mu asafo mpayimfoɔ sɛdeɛ me kyerɛɛ wo sɛ:

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Yi nipa a ne ho nni asɛm biaa, na ɔyɛ yerɛ baako kunu, na ne mma yɛ agyidifoɔ a bɛmmɔ akohwibra, na bɛnnyɛ asoɔdene nso.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Na ɔsɛ sɛ asafo mu hwɛfoɔ yɛ bi a biaa onnya ne ho asɛm nka sɛ Nyankopɔn fie so hwɛsofoɔ. Ɔnsɛ sɛ ɔyɛ ahomasoɔ, bi a ne bo fu ntɛm, bi a ɔyɛ nsadweam, bi a ɔyɛ pupopupo anaa bi a ɔde adufudeɛ pɛ mfasoɔ;

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: na mmom ɔsɛ sɛ asafo hwɛfoɔ yɛ bi a ɔpɛ ahɔhoyɛ, ɔpɛ papayɔ, n’adwene mu da hɔ, ɔtene, ne ho te, na ɔwɔ ahohyɛsoɔ.

english_verse: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ okura asɛm a ɔyɛ nɔkorɛ a ne nyinasoɔ ne nkyerɛkyerɛ pa he mu yie, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a obetumi de nkyerɛkyerɛ a odi mu atu fo na ɔde ayi bɛ a bɛkasa tia nɔkorɛ he atɛne nso. Kreta asafo mu agyegyefoɔ

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Nnipa bebree nso ya hɔ a bɛte atua, bɛyɛ kasahunufoɔ na bɛyɛ nnaadaafoɔ, ne titire ne bɛ a befiri twetiatwafoɔ mu he;

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: esiane sɛ bɛkyerɛkyerɛ nea onni ho kwane sɛ bɛkyerɛkyerɛ, de ɔɔpɛ mfasoɔ hunu de ɔɔdane anuanom adwene ani afiri nɔkorɛ he ho nti, ɔsɛ sɛ wosi bɛ kwane na bɛankyerɛkyerɛ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Ɔyɛ bɛaa bɛ nipa baako a ofiri bɛ mu, bɛ ankasa bɛ diyifoɔ, ne kaa sɛ, “Kretafoɔ yɛ atorɔfoɔ daa, nkekaboa bɔne, akwadwofoɔ adidifoɔ.” Akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ atorofoɔ

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Saa adansedie yi yɛ nɔkorɛ. Ne saa nti yi bɛ atɛne dendene, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bebekura nɔkorɛ gyidie he mu,

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Nipa ɔtene he nnoɔma nyinaa ho te ma no, nso deɛ ɔntene na ɔnnye nni he deɛ, bibiaa ho nte mma no na mmom n’adwene ne n’ahonim nyinaa ho agu fi.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Nnipa a bɛte saa he ka sɛ benim Nyankopɔn, nso bɛde bɛ nneyɔeɛ po no. Bɛyɛ Nyankopɔn akyiwadeɛ, asoɔdenfoɔ, bɛnyɛ ma adwuma pa biaa.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Nso wo Tito deɛ, ɔsɛ sɛ wokyerɛkyerɛ nkyerɛkyerɛ a odi mu.

english_verse: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
translation_verse: Kasa kyerɛ nkokora sɛ bɛnnyɔ bibi mma ɔntraso, bɛma bɛ anim nyɛ duru, na bɛmfa nyansa, dɔ ne boasetɔ nyɛ dene gyidie he mu.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Saa ara nso ne mmerewafoɔ he nso, kasa kyerɛ bɛ sɛ bɛma buo nna adi bɛ abrabɔ mu, bennni nsekuro na bɛmma nsa nso mfa bɛ nommum; ɔsɛ sɛ bɛkyerɛkyerɛ nea ɔyɛ,

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: na bɛatete mmabaa ama bɛadɔ bɛ kununom ne bɛ mma,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: na bɛadwene adwene pa, ahyɛ bɛ ho so, ayɔ bɛ fie nnwuma yie; benya ayamyɛ, ahoteɛ mu, na bɛmmrɛbrɛ bɛ ho ase mma bɛ kununom, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a nnipa onya asɛmmɔne bi nka mfa Nyankopɔn asɛm he ho.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Saa ara ne tu mmeranteɛ nso fo sɛ, bɛnhyɛ bɛ ho so.

english_verse: Always set a good example for others. Be sincere and serious when you teach.
translation_verse: Na bibiaa mu he, yi wo ho adi sɛ nnwuma pa nhwɛsoɔ, nkyerɛkyerɛ mu yi pɛyɛ, animuduro,

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: asɛmpa a ɔyɛ a bennya ho asɛm bi nka adi, na deɛ ɔne yɛ anya he afɛre, efiri sɛ onni yɛ ho bɔne biaa ka.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Kasakyerɛ nkoa sɛ bɛmmrɛbrɛ bɛ ho ase ma bɛ wuranom na bɛasɔ bɛ wuranom ani adeɛ nyinaa mu; bennyiyi bɛ wuranom nsɛm ano,

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: bennwia adeɛ mfiri bɛ wuranom fotoɔ mu, na mmom benni nɔkorɛ turodoo ade nyinaa mu, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bebeyi Nyankopɔn a ɔyɛ yɛ Agyenkwa he nkyerɛkyerɛ ayɛ.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn adom a ɔde nkwagyeɛ ma nnipa nyinaa he ada adi,

english_verse: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
translation_verse: na ɔkyerɛkyerɛ yɛ sɛ yɛmpo fi nnoɔma nyinaa ne wiase akɔnnɔ, na yɛmfa adwenemteɛ, ahoteɛ ne nyamesom pa mmɔ yɛ bra saa mmerɛ yi mu,

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: mmerɛ a yɛɛtwɛne yɛ Nyankopɔn kɛseɛ ne yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo ahotɔ anidasoɔ ne n’animuonyam ahoyie.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Ɔno ne de ne ho maeɛ ɔnam yɛ nti sɛ ɔbɛgye yɛ afiri amumuyɔ nyinaa mu na wate yɛ ho afa yɛ ayɛ ɔno ankasa ne nkurofoɔ a bɛbɔ mmɔdene nwuma pa mu.

english_verse: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
translation_verse: Pae mu ka saa nsɛm yi; kɔ so tu fo na ka anim sɛdeɛ bɛama wo tumi sɛ yɔ he. Mma biaa mmmu wo animtia.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Kae Kreta asafo he sɛ bɛmmerɛ bɛ ho ase nhyɛ bɛ a bedi bɛ so ne tumidie ahodoɔ ase, bɛnyɛ setie, nsiesie bɛ ho ma nnwuma pa nyinaa,

english_verse: and not say cruel things or argue. They should be gentle and kind to everyone.
translation_verse: bɛnnka biaa ho asɛmmɔne, bɛnnyɛ ntɔkwapɛfoɔ, ɔsɛ sɛ bɛ dwo na bɛde anidie ma nnipa biaa,

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, berɛ bi a atwam a na yɛ nso yennim nyansa, na yɛyɛ asoɔdenfoɔ, na yɛamane afiri kwane pa he so, na yɛyɛ nkoa ma akɔnnɔ ahodoɔ ne anigyedeɛ he, yɛde nitane ne ahoɔyeya ne bɔɔ yɛ bra, a na yɛ ho yɛ ahi, tentanee yɛ ho yɛ ho.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Nso berɛ a yɛ Agyenkwa Nyankopɔn nnepa ne n’ayamyɛ daa adi he,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ɔgyee yɛ, ɔnyɛ tenenee nnwuma bi a yɛayɔ nti, na mmom ɔnam ne mmɔborɔhunu so faa nsuo adwareɛ a ɔnam awofoforɔ ne foforɔyɛ a ofiri Honhom Kronkron so ne gyee yɛ.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Saa Honhom yi ne ɔnam yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo so ahwie agu yɛ so pii,

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a, yɛnam n’adom so benya bembuo na yɛabɛyɛ adedifoɔ daa nkwa anidasoɔ he mu.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Ɔyɛ nɔkwasɛm paa. Na yeinom ne mehwɛ sɛ wohyɛ mu kena, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bɛ a bɛabɛgye Nyankopɔn adi he bɛhwɛ yei sɛ bɛde bɛ ho bɛma nnwuma pa; yeinom ne yɛ paa na ɔyɛ mfasodeɛ ma nnipa.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Twe wo ho firi akyinnye hunu, ananasɛm, akasakasaa ne ntɔkwa a ɔfa mmara he ho, efiri sɛ, mfasoɔ nni so na ɔyɛ nnoɔma hunu.

english_verse: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
translation_verse: Nipa a ɔde mpaepaemu ba a woakasa akyerɛ no baako ne ne mprenu so, na wantie he, wo ne no nya twaka biaa,

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, wonim sɛ, saa nipa he yɛ debɔnyɛni a wayera kwane, na waabu ne ho fɔ. Asɛm a otwa toɔ ne nhyira

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Sɛ mesoma Artema anaa Tihiko ba wo nkyɛne a, bɔ mmɔdene sɛ wobɛba me hɔ Nikopoli, efiri sɛ hɔ ne maabɔ me tim pɔ sɛ medi awɔ mmerɛ he.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Bɔ mmɔdene sɛ wobegya mmaranimfoɔ Sena ɔne Apolo kwane a bibiaa onhia bɛ.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Bɛ a bɛka me ho nyinaa kyea wo. Kyea bɛ a bɛdɔ yɛ gyidie he mu nyinaa. Adom nka ho nyinaa!

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Paulo, Kristo Yesu deduani, ne yɛ nua Timoteo, twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma yɛ dɔfoɔ ne yɛ yɔnko dwumayɔni Filemon,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: ne yɛ nuabaa Afia, ne Arkipus a ɔyɛ yɛ yɔnko sraani, ne asafo a ohyia wo fie he:

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Adom ne asomdwie a ofiri yɛ Agya Nyankopɔn ne Awurade Yesu Kristo nka ho. Filemon dɔ ne ne gyidie

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Berɛ biaa a mɛkae wo me mpaebɔ mu he, meda me Nyankopɔn ase daa,

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ, mete wo dɔ a wode dɔ ahoteefoɔ he nyinaa ne wo gyidie a wo wɔ no Awurade Yesu mu he.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: Na mebɔ mpaeɛ sɛ wo gyidie mu ayɔnkofa he bɛma nnoɔma pa a ɔsɛ sɛ yɛyɔ no Kristo mu nyinaa ho nimdeɛ a mu dɔ ada adi.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm di, me nua, ɔnam wo dɔ so ama manya anigye ne awerɛkyekyerɛ, efiri sɛ, woama ahoteefoɔ he, bɛ akoma atɔ bɛ yam. Paulo di maa Onesimo

english_verse: Christ gives me the courage to tell you what to do.
translation_verse: Yei nti, owom sɛ mewɔ akokoɔduro Kristo mu sɛ metumi ahyɛ wo ama woayɔ nea ɔsɛ sɛ woyɔ deɛ,

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: nso dɔ nti, me Paulo ankasa a meyɛ asafopanyini, na seeseiaa mesane yɛ Kristo Yesu deduani he, srɛ wo—

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Meesoma no ama no asane aba wo nkyɛne bio, ɔyɛ nipa a ɔda m’akoma so paa.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Na nka mepɛ sɛ ɔtena me nkyɛne, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a nka obesi w’anane mu asom me saa berɛ yi a ɔnam asɛmpa he nti, meya mpokyerɛ mu.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Nso mempɛ sɛ mefiri wo akyi yɔ bibiaa na anyɛ sɛ wo papayɔ he firi hyɛ mu, na mmom afiri woankasa wo pɛ mu.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Ebia yei nti ne ɔtwee ne ho firii wo nkyɛne mmerɛ kakra yi, na ɔnam so ama wanya no bio afebɔɔ.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Wonya no sɛ akoa bio na mmom deɛ ɔsene saa; sɛ ɔmmɛyɛ nua dɔfo, titire ya me fam, nso ɔbɛyɔ ne ɔboro so saa ama wo honam fam, na afei Awurade mu nso.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Nti sɛ wobu me sɛ wo yɔnko dwumayɔni deɛ a, gye no fɛ so sɛdeɛ nka wobɛgye me he.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Sɛ waafom wo kwane bi so a, anaa sɛ ɔde wo ka bi a, bu gu me so, na me ankasa metua.

english_verse: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
translation_verse: Meaa Paulo ne mede me nsa ɔɔtwerɛ saa krataa yi sɛ metua ka biaa. Onhia mpo sɛ mɛkae wo sɛ wode me ka, mpo wo nipadua ho ka.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Oo me nua, ampa, ma menya mfasoɔ mfiri wo hɔ Awurade mu! Ma m’akoma ntɔ me yam Kristo mu.

english_verse: I am sure you will do all I have asked, and even more.
translation_verse: Meetwerɛ saa krataa yi abra wo yi, mewɔ ahotɔsoɔ sɛ wobetie, na menim sɛ wobɛyɔ akyɛne nea meesrɛ wo yi mpo.

english_verse: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
translation_verse: Na yei akyi he siesie ahɔhodane ma me, efiri sɛ mewɔ anidasoɔ sɛ ho mpaebɔ nti ho nsa bɛka me bio. Nkradie ne nhyira

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: ɔne Marko, Aristarkus, Demas ne Luka a bɛyɛ me yɔnko adwumayɔfoɔ kyea wo.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Awurade Yesu Kristo adom nka ho honhom ho.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Tete mmerɛ mu he, Nyankopɔn nam mmerɛ ahodoɔ ne akwane ahodoɔ so faa adiyifoɔ he so kasa kyerɛɛ yɛ nananom,

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: na nna a odi akyire yi mu deɛ, ɔnam ne Ba a waayi no asi hɔ sɛ nnoɔma nyinaa so diadeɛ, na ɔnam ne so bɔɔ nnoɔma nyinaa he so, akasa akyerɛ yɛ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Ɔno ankasa ne da Nyankopɔn animuonyam a ɔhyerɛn he adi na ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn su nsɛso pɛpɛɛpɛ, na ɔnam n’asɛm a tumi yam so kita nnoɔma nyinaa mu. Na odwiraa yɛ bɔne wieeɛ he, ɔkɔtenaa deɛ ɔwɔ tumi boro tumi nyinaa so, na ɔya soro soro he nifa.

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Ɔno ne korɔn kyɛne abɔfoɔ he, sɛdeɛ ne dini kunyini a wanya he kyɛne bɛ deɛ koraa he. Ba he di mu kyɛne abɔfoɔ

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Na abɔfoɔ he mu hwane ne Nyankopɔn ka kyerɛɛ no sɛ, “Wone me Ba; nnɛ ne mayi wo sononko’”? Anaa bio, “Mɛyɛ n’Agya, na wayɛ me ba”?

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Afei nso, berɛ a na ɔno ankasa de ne Ba a ɔkyɛne so he ɔɔba wiase he, ɔkaa sɛ, “Ma Nyankopɔn abɔfoɔ nyinaa nsɔre no.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Na abɔfoɔ he deɛ, nea ɔka faa bɛ ho ne sɛ, “Ɔyɔ n’abɔfoɔ sɛ mframa, na n’asomfoɔ he nso sɛ gyaframa.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Na Ba he deɛ, nea ɔka faa ne ho ne sɛ, “O Nyankopɔn, w’ahennie tim hɔ daa, na w’ahennie poma yɛ tenenee poma.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Wodɔ tenenee na wotane amumuyɔ; nti Nyankopɔn, wo Nyankopɔn, asra wo ngo ahosane ngo a ɔboro wo mfɛfoɔ deɛ so.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Na afei nso, “Mfitiaseɛ he, Awurade, wotoo asaase fapem, na soro yɛ wo nsa ano adwuma;

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Yeinom bɛyera, nso wo deɛ wotim hɔ daa; ne nyinaa bɛpa sɛ ataadeɛ;

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: wobɛbobɔ bɛ sɛ ntoma, na bɛbɛsesa. Nso wo deɛ wote sɛ nea woteaa, na wo mfie to ontwa da.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Na abɔfoɔ he mu hwane na waaka akyerɛ no da sɛ, “Tena me nifa so kosi sɛ mede w’atamfoɔ bɛyɛ wo nane ase ntiasoɔ”?

english_verse: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
translation_verse: Nti abɔfoɔ nyinaa nyɛ honhom a bɛsom Nyankopɔn a wasoma bɛ sɛ bɛnsom nkwagyeɛ diadefoɔ anaa?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Yei nti, ɔsɛ sɛ yɛsɔ nnoɔma a yɛate he mu dene paa, na yɛamfiri ho da.

english_verse: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
translation_verse: Na sɛ asɛm a ɔnam abɔfoɔ so baeɛ he dii mu, na mmarato ne asoɔdene biaa nyaa so akatua, sɛnea atɛntenenee teɛ a,

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: sɛ yɛpo nkwagyeɛ kɛseɛ yi a, nti yebetumi adwane afiri atemmuo mu anaa? Saa asɛm yi ne Awurade firii aseɛ kaeɛ he. Na bɛ a bɛteeɛ he hyɛɛ mu kena maa yɛ,

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: berɛ a Nyankopɔn nso de nsɛnkyerɛnne ne anwanwadeɛ ne tumideɛyɔ bebree, ne Honhom Kronkron akyɛdeɛ a ɔkyekyɛeɛ sɛdeɛ ne pɛ teɛ he dii ho adanseɛ bi. Nkwagyeɛ mu dikanfoɔ

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Na ɔnyɛ abɔfoɔ ne Nyankopɔn de wiase a ɔɔba a yɛɛka ho asɛm he hyɛɛ bɛ ase.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Yei nti ne twerɛsɛm he di adanseɛ baabi sɛ, “Nipa ne hwane a wodwene ne ho, anaa dasani ne hwane a w’ani ku ne ho?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Woyɔɔ no sɛ bi a aka kakra bi na ɔne abɔfoɔ ayɛ pɛ; wode animuonyam ne anidie abɔ no abotire,

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: na wode nnoɔma nyinaa nso ahyɛ ne nane ase.” Na afei, ɔde nnoɔma nyinaa ɔɔhyɛ ne nane ase he, Nyankopɔn annyae bibiaa hɔ a wamfa anhyɛ ne tumi ase. Owom sɛ yennya nhuu sɛ ɔde nnoɔma nyinaa ahyɛ ne nane ase deɛ,

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: na mmom, yehu Yesu a, ne tebea baa fam kakra sene abɔfoɔ berɛ tiaa bi mu, na seesei deɛ bɛde animuonyam ne anidie abɔ no abotire he, efiri sɛ ohuu wuo mu amane, na ɔnam Nyankopɔn adom so awu ama nnipa nyinaa.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Na ɔsɔɔ Nyankopɔn a nnoɔma nyinaa yɛ ne dea na ɔnam ne so baeɛ he ani sɛ ɔde mma bebree bɛba animuonyam mu, mmerɛ a bɛ nkwagyeɛ safohene he nam amanehunu mu bewie pɛyɛ.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Na deɛ ɔte bi ho ne bɛ a bɛate bɛ ho he nyinaa wɔ abɔseɛ korɔ. Ne saa nti Yesu amfɛre sɛ ɔbɛfrɛ bɛ sɛ ne nuanom,

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: nti ɔkaa sɛ, “Mɛpae mu abɔ wo dini akyerɛ me nuanom, asafo mu ne meyi wo ayɛ.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Na bio nso, ɔkaa sɛ, “Mede me werɛ bɛhyɛ ne mu.” Na afei nso, Hwɛ me di, na mma a Nyankopɔn de bɛ maa me he nso di.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Nti sɛ mma he anya honam ne mogyaa korɔ he bi he, saa ne ɔno nso faa mu bi, sɛ ɔnam wuo so betu deɛ ɔwɔ wuo tumi a ɔne Bronsam he agu,

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: na wagye bɛ a bɛte ase a wuo ho hu nti bɛyɛ nkoa he nyinaa.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Na ɔyɛ nɔkwasɛm paa sɛ ɔnyɛ abɔfoɔ ne ɔbaa sɛ ɔɔbɛgye bɛ, na mmom Abraham asefoɔ.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Nti na ɔsɛ sɛ ɔsɛ ne nuanom ade nyinaa mu, na wayɛ mmɔborɔhunu ne sɔfo panyini trodoo, Nyankopɔn fam nnoɔma mu, na wayɛ mane he bɔne ho mpatadeɛ.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Esiane sɛ ɔno ankasa huu amane, na bɛsɔɔ no hwɛeɛ nti, otumi boa bɛ a bɛsɔ bɛ hwɛ nyinaa.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Nti, me nuanom ahoteefoɔ a ho nso hoanya soro frɛ he, honhu sɛ Yesu ne yɛ yɛ gyidie he mu Somafoɔ ne Sɔfo panyini.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Odii nɔkorɛ maa deɛ ɔfrɛɛ no he, sɛdeɛ Mose nso “dii nɔkorɛ Nyankopɔn fie nyinaa mu he.”

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Nso Yesu wɔ animuonyam pii sene Mose, sɛdeɛ nipa a osi fie he wɔ anidie bebree sene fie he.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Na Mose deɛ, odii nɔkorɛ Nyankopɔn fie nyinaa so sɛ somfo, na odii adanseɛ faa nsɛm a Nyankopɔn bɛka no akyire he ho.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Nso Kristo deɛ, odii nɔkorɛ Nyankopɔn fie nyinaa so sɛ ba, na sɛ yɛsɔ nnamyɛ a yɛde kasa ne anidasoɔ a yɛde hoahoa yɛ ho he mu pintinn kosi awieeɛ a, ɔno ne ma yɛyɛ ne fiefoɔ. Annyeannie ho kɔkɔbɔ

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Nti sɛnea Honhom Kronkron ka he, “Nnɛ, sɛ hote ne nne a,

english_verse: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
translation_verse: hommpirim ho akoma sɛ atuateɛ mmerɛ he, sɛ nsɔhwɛ mmerɛ he mu serɛ he so,

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: baabi a ho nananom sɔɔ mehwɛeɛ he, na behuu me nnwuma mfie aduannan.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Yei maa me bo fuu saa awoɔntoatoasoɔ he, na mekaa sɛ, ‘Bɛfom bɛ akomam daa, nso bɛ deɛ, na benhuu m’akwane.’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Sɛdeɛ m’abufuo mu mekaa ntam sɛ ‘Bɛnnhyɛne me home mu da.’ ”

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Anuanom, honhwɛ yie, sɛdeɛ ɔbɛyɛ a bɔne ne annyeannie akoma ɔntwe ho mfiri teasefoɔ Nyankopɔn he nkyɛne.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Nso hontutu ho ho fo, da biaa a bɛ bɔ dini sɛ “Nnɛ,” na bɔne a ɔyɛ nnaadaa biaa amma ho mu na amma biaa ampirim n’akoma.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Nso gye sɛ yɛsɔ ahotɔsoɔ a yedii kane nyaeɛ he mu pintinn kosi awieeɛ, ansa na yɛanya kyɛfa Yesu mu ankasa.
