translation_verse: O! nipa hunu, nti wopɛ sɛ bi ne nna no adi nkyerɛ wo sɛ gyidie a nnwuma nka ho he awu anaa?

english_verse: Well, our ancestor Abraham pleased God by putting his son Isaac on the altar to sacrifice him.
translation_verse: Ɔnnyɛ nnwuma mu ne bebuu yɛ nana Abraham bem mmerɛ a ɔde ne ba Isak maeɛ ya afɔrebokyia so he anaa?

english_verse: Now you see how Abraham's faith and deeds worked together. He proved his faith was real by what he did.
translation_verse: Woahu sɛ ne gyidie ne ne nnwuma nyinaa bom yɔɔ adwuma, na gyidie nam nnwuma so wiee pɛyɛ.

english_verse: This is what the Scriptures mean by saying, “Abraham had faith in God, and God accepted him.” That's how Abraham became God's friend.
translation_verse: Na ɔnam so maa twerɛsɛm he baa mu sɛ, “Abraham gyee Nyankopɔn diiɛ, na Nyankopɔn buu ne gyidie he sɛ tenenee maa no,” na bɛfrɛɛ no Nyankopɔn adamfo.

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Woahu sɛ ɔnam nnwuma nso so ma bebu bi bem, na ɔnyɛ gyidie nkoaa so.

english_verse: For example, Rahab had been a prostitute. But she pleased God when she welcomed the spies and sent them home by another way.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ dwamamfoɔ Rahab nnwuma so ne bɛnam buu no bem, berɛ a ɔnam akwansrafoɔ a ɔgyee bɛ na ɔmaa bɛfaa kwane foforɔ so kɔeɛ he anaa?

english_verse: Anyone who doesn't breathe is dead, and faith that doesn't do anything is just as dead!
translation_verse: Na sɛdeɛ nipadua a honhom nni mu he awu he, saa ara ne gyidie a nnwuma nni mu nso awu.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: Anuanom, hommpere ho ho nyɛ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ, efiri sɛ sɛnea honim he, bebebu yɛ a yɛyɛ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ he atɛne a mu ɔdene;

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: na yɛ nyinaa yɔ mfomsoɔ bebree. Nipa biaa a ɔnyɔ mfomsoɔ kasa mu he yɛ pɛ, na otumi to nipadua he nyinaa nnareka.

english_verse: By putting a bit into the mouth of a horse, we can turn the horse in different directions.
translation_verse: Sɛ yɛde nnareka to pɔnkɔ ano ma no yɔ setie ma yɛ a, yetumi ka aboa he kɔ faako a yɛpɛ.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Hwɛ hyɛne nso, ɔnam ne kɛseɛ nti mframa a mu ɔdene ne tumi pia no, nso bɛde bibi ketewa bi ne ka no ma deɛ hyɛnkafoɔ he pɛ sɛ ɔkɔ biaa odi so.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Saa ne kɛtrɛma nso teɛ, ɔyɛ honam akwaa a osua deɛ, nso ɔhoahoa ne ho nnoɔma akɛseɛ ho. Hwɛ kwaeɛ kɛseɛ a gya ketewa bi tumi hye ne nyinaa!

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: Na kɛtrɛma te sɛ gya; ɔyɛ nipadua akwaa a ɔte sɛ kuro a amumuyɔ ahyɛ mu ma, efiri sɛ, ɔde nkekaeɛ ba nipadua he nyinaa ho, na ɔde gya to asetena kwane nyinaa mu, na amanehunu kuro he mu ne ɔsɔ gya he.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Na dasani tumi hyɛ ntɔteboa ne ntakraboa, mmoa a bɛwea ne bɛ a bɛya po mu nyinaa so. Nipa tumi yɔ yei nyinaa

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: nso kɛtrɛma deɛ, ontumi nnya ho ahohyɛsoɔ, kɛtrɛma yɛ ade bɔne a ɔyɛ werɛmfoɔ a awuduro ahyɛ no ma.

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Nti nsuo korɔgyee ne nsuo a ahono betumi afiri nsuo aniwa korɔ mu aba anaa?

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: Me nuanom, sɛnea borɔdoma ntumi nso ngo aba he, na bobe nso ntumi nso borɔdoma aba he, saa ara nso ne asuti a ɔyɛ nkyenenkyene ntumi mma nsu pa. Nyansa ahodoɔ mmienu

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: Ho mu hwane ne yɛ nyansafoɔ ne nimdefoɔ? Ma no mfa n’abrabɔ pa nkyerɛ sɛ ɔdwo, na ofiri nyansa mu ne yɔ ne nnwuma.

english_verse: But if your heart is full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, don't brag or lie to cover up the truth.
translation_verse: Nso sɛ ahoɔyeya dendenndene ne pɛsɛmenkomenya ya ho akoma mu a, honnhoahoa ho ho na honnni torɔ ntia nɔkorɛ he nso.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: Saa nyansa yi mfiri soro, na mmom, ɔyɛ wiase nyansa a mfasoɔ biaa nni mu na ofiri ahonhommɔne.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Na baabi a anibereɛ ne pɛsɛmenkomenya ya he, hɔ nso ne basabasa ne bɔne nyinaa bi ya.

english_verse: But the wisdom that comes from above leads us to be pure, friendly, gentle, sensible, kind, helpful, genuine, and sincere.
translation_verse: Na nyansa a ofiri soro he deɛ, deɛ odi kane ne sɛ, ho te, na afei ɔpɛ asomdwie, ɔdwo, ɔwɔ asoɔmmerɛ, ɔwɔ nteaseɛ; ahummɔborɔ ne aba pa ahyɛ no ma, a ɔnyɛ nyiyimu anaa nyaatwom kwane biaa so.

english_verse: When peacemakers plant seeds of peace, they will harvest justice.
translation_verse: Na begu tenenee aba asomdwie mu ma bɛ a bɛpɛ asomdwie.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Hefa ne kõ ne apereapereɛ a ɔya ho mu yi firi ba? Omfiri ho akɔnnɔ a ɔne honam akwaa di ako ya ho mu he?

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Hopɛ bibi nso honnya; nti ho di awu. Ho anibere bibi nso honnya; nti hodi akõ ne apereapereɛ. Honnya, efiri sɛ hommisa.

english_verse: Yet even when you do pray, your prayers are not answered, because you pray just for selfish reasons.
translation_verse: Hobisa nso ho nsa nka, efiri sɛ hobisa no kwammɔne so, sɛdeɛ hode bedi ho honam akɔnnɔ ho dwuma.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Ei awaresɛefoɔ! Honnim sɛ wiase yi adamfofa yɛ tane a bɛ tane Nyankopɔn anaa? Biaa a ɔpɛ sɛ ɔyɛ wiase adamfo yɛ Nyankopɔn tamfoɔ.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Anaa hosusu sɛ twerɛsɛm he ka no kwa sɛ, “Nyankopɔn twe honhom a ɔde adua yɛ mu he ho ninkunu?”

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Nso adom a ɔde ma he dɔɔso; nti ɔka sɛ, “Nyankopɔn si ahantafoɔ kwane, na ɔdom ahobrɛaseɛfoɔ.”

english_verse: Surrender to God! Resist the devil, and he will run from you.
translation_verse: Ne saa nti hommrɛ ho ho ase nhyɛ Nyankopɔn ase. Honnsi bronsam kwane, na ɔbɛdwane afiri ho nkyɛne.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Hommɛne Nyankopɔn na ɔno nso bɛtwe abɛne ho. Honhohoro ho nsa, na homma ho akoma mu nte, ho nnebɔnyɛfoɔ a ho adwene yɛ ntanta.

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Hontwa adwo na hommɔ bena na honsu. Homma ho anigyeɛ nnane benabɔ na ho ahosɛpɛ nso nane aboobodie.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Hommrɛ ho ho ase Awurade anim, na ɔbɛma ho so. Atenyie ho kɔkɔbɔ

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: Anuanom, honnnka nsɛmmɔne ntia ho ho. Nipa biaa a ɔka asɛmmɔne tia bi he anaa obu bi atɛne he, ɔka asɛmmɔne tia mmara he na obu mmara he atɛne; nso sɛ wobu mmara he atɛne a, wonyɛ mmara he sodifoɔ, na mmom, woyɛ temmufoɔ.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn ne yɛ mmarahyɛfoɔ ne temmufoɔ a obetumi agye nkwa na obetumi asɛe nso. Na wo ne hwane a wobu bi atɛne? Mfa kyena nhoahoa wo ho

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Mhõõ, afei ho nso ɛ! Ho a hoka sɛ, “Nnɛ anaa kyena yɛbɛkɔ kuro yei anaa foforɔ so na yɛadi afe hɔ, adi dwa na yɛapɛ sika,”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: nso honnnim adekyeeɛ mu nsɛm. Honnim nea obesi ho nkwa ho? Hote sɛ huhuo a ɔya hɔ mmerɛ tiaa bi na ɔyera.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Nea ɔsɛ sɛ ho ka mmom ne sɛ, “Sɛ ɔyɛ Awurade pɛ a, yɛbɛtena ase ayɔ yei anaa yei.”

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Nso sɛdeɛ ɔteɛ yi, ho hoahoa ho ho ahantan kwane so; saa ahohoahoa he nyinaa yɛ bɔne.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Nti nipa biaa a onim deɛ ɔyɛ na wannyɔ he, ɔyɛ bɔne mma no.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Afei ho adefoɔ, honnyina yie, ɔnam amanehunu a ɔɔba ho so nti honsu na hommɔ bena.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Ho ahonyadeɛ he aporɔ, na nnwenweboa awe ho ntoma ne ho ntaadeɛ.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: Ho sikakɔkɔɔ ne dwetɛ awe naakyee, na ne naakyee he bedi adanseɛ atia ho, na obɛhye ho honam sɛ gya. Hoahyehyɛ agyapadeɛ ama nna a odi akyire yi.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Hontie! Apaafoɔ a bɛyɔɔ ho afuom adwuma a hosisii bɛ faa bɛ akatua he ɔɔteam gu ho so, na Awurade a ɔya soro he aso ate atwafoɔ a betwaa ho nnɔbae he nteamu.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Hode asetena pa ne ahohwie atena asaase yi so; hoama ho akoma adɔre sradeɛ ama kũ da.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Hoabu teneneeni fɔ na hoaku no a onsi ho kwane. Amanehunu mu aboterɛ

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: Nti adɔfonom, honto ho bo ase nkosi sɛ Awurade bɛba. Kuani a ɔhwɛ ne nnɔbae a ofiri asaase mu ba kwane he nya ntoboaseɛ kosi sɛ obenya sukane ne berempɔnsuo.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Saa na ɔsɛ sɛ ho nso hoto ho bo ase. Honhyɛ ho akoma dene, efiri sɛ Awurade maeɛ he abɛne.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Adɔfonom, honngu ahome ntietia ho ho ho ho, na bɛammu ho atɛne. Honhwɛ, temmufoɔ he gyina aboboɔ he ano!

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Adɔfonom, homma adiyifoɔ a bɛkasaa Awurade dini mu he nyɛ nhwɛsoɔ ma ho ya amanehunu ne boasetɔ ho.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, yebu bɛ a behuu amane, too bɛ bo ase ya amanehunu mu he sɛ bɛwɔ anigyeɛ amapa. Hoate Hiob amanehunu mu boasetɔ ho asɛm, na hoahu Awurade botae, sɛdeɛ ɔyɛ ayamyefoɔ ne mmɔborɔhunufoɔ he.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Ne nyinaa mu he, adɔfonom, honnka soro anaa asaase ntam, anaa ntam foforɔ biaa, na mmom, homma ho ɛɛ, nyɛ ɛɛ, na ho Daabi nso nyɛ daabi, na hoankɔ afobuom. Gyidie mpaebɔ

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Bi ya ho mu a ohu amane anaa? Homma no mmɔ mpaeɛ. Bi ani agye anaa? Homma no nto ayeyie nnwom.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Bi ya ho mmu a ɔyare anaa? Homma no mfrɛ asafo he mu mpayimfoɔ na bɛmmɔ mpaeɛ mma no, na bɛnsra no ngo Awurade dini mu.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Na gyidie mpaebɔ bɛgye yarefoɔ he nkwa, na Awurade bɛmma no so; na sɛ woayɔ bɔne bi a, ɔde bɛkyɛ no.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Ne saa nti honkeka ho mfomsoɔ nkyerɛkyerɛ ho ho ho ho, na hommɔ mpaeɛ ma ho ho ho ho, na hoanya ayaresa. Teneneeni mpaebɔ a mu ɔdene tumi yɔ nnoɔma bebree.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Na Elia yɛ nipa te sɛ yɛaa, nso ɔbɔɔ mpaeɛ dendene sɛ nsuo ntɔ, na mfie mmeɛnsa ne bosome nsia nsuo antɔ asaase yi so.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Na afei, ɔbɔɔ mpaeɛ bio, na soro maa nsuo na asaase nso sõõ n’aba.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Anuanom, sɛ ho mu bi mmane firi nɔkorɛ he ho na foforɔ de no sane ba kwanpa he so a,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: ɔsɛ sɛ hohu sɛ bi a ɔdane debɔnyɛni firi ne kwammɔne so he bɛgye debɔnyɛni he kra afiri wuom na ɔbɛkata bɔne bebree so.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Me Petro, Yesu Kristo somafoɔ, twerɛ saa krataa yi de kɔma Nyankopɔn nnipa a bɛayi bɛ a bɛahwete sɛ ahɔhoɔ kɔ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia ne Bitinia amantam mu he.

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: Ɔnam Agya Nyankopɔn botaeɛ so ne beyii ho, na ɔnam ne Honhom so tee ho ho sɛ honyɔ setie mma Yesu Kristo na ɔnam so ama ne mogyaa he ate ho ho. Adom ne asomdwie mmorosoɔ nka ho. Anidasoɔ a ɔya nkwa mu

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Nhyira nka yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo Nyankopɔn; saa Nyankopon yi ne yɛ n’Agya nso. Esiane n’ahummɔborɔ pii nti, ɔnam nyane a onyanee Yesu Kristo firii wuo mu he so maa yɛ nkwa foforɔ. Yei ama yɛanya anidasoɔ a atim,

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: ne agyapadeɛ a ɔmporɔ a ho nni dɛm, na ɔmpa a bɛde asie soro ama ho.

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn bɛfa ne tumi he so ahwɛ sɛ honam gyidie so benya nkwagyeɛ a bɛasiesie sɛ bebeyi no adi berɛ a odi akyire he mu.

english_verse: On that day you will be glad, even if you have to go through many hard trials for a while.
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ, ebia seesei ɔbɛba sɛ, esiane haw pii a hobɛfa mu he nti, ho werɛ bɛho deɛ, nso homma ho ani nnye saa asɛm yi ho,

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: na ama bɛahu sɛ ho gyidie he yɛ kann, na ɔsombo kyɛne sikakɔkɔɔ mpo. Sikakɔkɔɔ a betumi sɛe no he mpo, bɛde gya sɔ hwɛ, nti ho gyidie a ɔsom bo kyɛne sikakɔkɔɔ he, ɔsɛ sɛ bɛsɔ hwɛ hu sɛ, obetumi agyina anaa. Ɔno akyi ansa na da a Yesu Kristo bɛba he, hoanya animuonyam.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Ɔyam sɛ honhu Yesu seesei yi deɛ, nso hodɔ no. Honhuu no da, nso hogye no di, na ho ho siane ho anigyeɛ a onni kabea a animuonyam yam,

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: sɛ honya ho gyidie akatua a ɔyɛ ho kra nkwagyeɛ he.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Saa nkwagyeɛ yi ne adiyifoɔ a bɛhyɛɛ adom a hobenya he ho nkɔm he de mmɔdemmɔ hwehwɛɛ mu pɛɛpɛɛ mu yie.

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: Bɛhwehwɛɛ berɛ korɔ ne berɛ ahodoɔ a Kristo honhom a ɔya bɛ mu dii kane daa no adi faa n’amanehunu ne akyire animuonyam a ɔbɛba he ho.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Nyankopɔn daa no adi kyerɛɛ saa adiyifoɔ he sɛ, ɔnyɛ bɛ ho ne bɛsomeeɛ na mmom ho ne bɛde nnoɔma a asie na bɛɛka ho asɛm he ɔɔsom ho. Na akyire yiaa bɛada Asɛmpa he adi akyerɛ yɛ nyinaa. Saa Honhom Kronkron he a bɛsoma no firii soro he tumi so ne bɛnam kasa kyerɛɛ bɛ; saa tumi heaa so ne bɛnam kasa kyerɛɛ yɛ nso. Yeinom yɛ nnoɔma bi a abɔfoɔ mpo pɛɛ sɛ behu mu. Abrabɔ kronkron

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: Nti honsi ho adwene pi, na homma ho ani nna hɔ. Honnyina yie, na homma ho ani nna adom a bɛde bɛma ho Yesu Kristo ba a ɔbɛba he mu he so.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Sɛ hoyɛ asoɔmmerɛ mma yi, ɔnsɛ sɛ homma akɔnnɔ abrabɔ a odii ho so berɛ a na honnim Nyankopɔn he di ho so bio,

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: na mmom, ɔsɛ sɛ hoyɛ kronkron bibiaa a hoyɔ mu sɛnea Nyankopɔn a ɔfrɛɛ ho he yɛ kronkron he,

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: na bɛatwerɛ sɛ, “Ɔsɛ sɛ hoyɛ kronkron, efiri sɛ, meyɛ kronkron.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Na sɛ hofrɛ deɛ ɔnhwɛ nnipa anim, na obu atɛne sɛdeɛ biaa adwuma teɛ he sɛ Agya a, homfa suro mmɔ ho bra ho ahɔhobea tenabea yi mu.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Sɛ honim sɛ bɛamfa nnoɔma a ɔporɔ, te sɛ dwetɛ anaa sikakɔkɔɔ ne gyee ho firii ho abrabɔ hunu a ho nya firii ho agyanom nkyɛne he mu,

english_verse: You were rescued by the precious blood of Christ, that spotless and innocent lamb.
translation_verse: na mmom, bɛde Kristo a ɔte sɛ adwammaa a onni dɛm ne nkekaeɛ he mogyaa a ne boɔ ɔdene he ne gyee ho.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Ansa na Nyankopɔn bɔɔ wiase he, na waayi no dada, na ho nti ne nna a odi akyire yi he, wada no adi.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Ɔnam ne so ne hogyee Nyankopɔn a onyanee no firii awufoɔ mu na ɔmaa no animuonyam he diiɛ. Ɔnam so ama ho gyidie ne ho anidasoɔ atim Nyankopɔn mu.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Afei a hoayɔ setie ama nɔkorɛ he de adwira ho kra ho ama hoanya nuadɔ a nyaatwom nni mu he, homfiri ho akoma nyinaa mu nnodɔ ho ho.

english_verse: Do this because God has given you new birth by his message that lives on forever.
translation_verse: Na bɛamfiri aba a ɔporɔ mu, na mmom befiri nea ɔmporɔ mu, ɔne sɛ bɛnam Nyankopɔn asɛm a ɔte ase na ɔbɛtena hɔ he so ne awo bɛ foforɔ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Sɛnea Twerɛsɛm he ka sɛ, “Nnipa nyinaa te sɛ serɛ; na bɛ animuonyam te sɛ nhwiren. Serɛ he wu ma ne nhwiren he pre gu,

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: nso Awurade asɛm he ya hɔ daa nyinaa.” Yei ne Asɛmpa he a bɛaka akyerɛ ho he.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Hontwe ho ho mfiri bɔne nyinaa, nnaadaa nyinaa, nyaatwom, anibereɛ ne sɛ hooka nsɛm de agu nnipa ho fi, ho.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Honyɛ sɛ nkokoa a bɛɛpre honhom mu nofosuo kronkron anom na sɛ honom a, hoanyini akɔ nkwagyeɛ mu,

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ hoaka Awurade ayamyɛ he ahwɛ.

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Hommra Awurade a ɔyɛ boɔ a nkwa yam he nkyɛne. Ɔno ne nnipa poo no, na Nyankopɔn ani so deɛ ɔyɛ nea wayi no, na ɔsom bo he.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Ho nso hote sɛ aboɔ a nkwa yam a bɛnam so oosi honhom mu dane a ɔbɛyɛ asɔfokuo Kronkron a bɛnam Yesu Kristo so bɛbɔ honhom mu afɔdeɛ a ɔsɔ Nyankopɔn ani ya mu.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Na ɔya atwerɛ he mu sɛ: Hwɛ, mede tweaso tiboɔ a bɛayi he na ne boɔ ɔdene ato Sion, na deɛ ɔgye no di he ani onnwu.

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Saa boɔ yi ho wɔ mfasoɔ yie ma ho a hogye di, na bɛ a bɛnnye nni he deɛ asɛm he abam sɛ: “Boɔ a abantofoɔ apo he, abɛyɛ tweasotiboɔ,”

english_verse: They disobeyed the message and stumbled and fell over this stone, because they were doomed.
translation_verse: ne sintiboɔ ne sintiduatoɔ botane ama bɛ. Bɛne besonti, efiri sɛ bɛanyɛ setie amma asɛm he. Ɔno nti na beyii bɛ maeɛ.

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Na ho deɛ, hoyɛ abusua a bɛayi ho, sɛ adehyeɛ asɔfokuo, mane kronkron, Nyankopɔn ankasa nkurofoɔ a bɛayi ho sɛ honka n’anwanwadwuma he ho asɛm. Ɔno na ɔfrɛɛ ho firi sum mu baa ɔno ankasa hann nwanwasono he mu.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Nna bi a atwam he, na honnyɛ Nyankopɔn nkurofoɔ, nso afei, hoyɛ ne nkurofoɔ; nna bi a atwam he na honnim Nyankopɔn mmɔborɔhunu he, nso sɛsei deɛ, hoanya ne mmɔborɔhunu he. Hontena ase sɛ Nyankopɔn nkoa

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Adɔfonom, mekasa kyerɛ ho sɛ ahɔhoɔ ne amamfrafoɔ a hoya wiase. Hontwe ho ho mfiri honam akɔnnɔ a ɔne kra he di asie he ho.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Hommɔ bra pa ya amanamane mufoɔ a hofra bɛ mu he mu, na sɛ bɛka ho ho nsɛm sɛ hoyɛ nnebɔnyɛfoɔ a, bɛahu ho papa a hoayɔ he nso nam so ahyɛ Nyankopɔn animuonyam, “nsrada” he.

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Hommrɛ ho ho ase Awurade dini mu mma nnipa nhyehyɛeɛ nyinaa, sɛ ɔyɛ hempɔno

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: anaa amradofoɔ a hempɔno he asoma bɛ sɛ bɛntwe nnebɔnyɛfoɔ aso, na bɛnkamfo bɛ a bɛyɛ papa he.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Na yei ne deɛ Nyankopɔn pɛ, sɛ hode papayɔ si nnipa a benni adwene he nkwaseasɛm ano.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Hontena ase sɛ nnipa a bɛde bɛ ho, na bɛmfa bɛ ahofadie he nyɔ bɔne biaa nso. Na hontena ase sɛ Nyankopɔn nkoa.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Homfa anidie mma nnipa nyinaa. Honnɔ anuanom agyidifoɔ. Honsuro Nyankopɔn, na homfa anidie mma hempɔno.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Ho, nkoa nso, hommrɛ ho ho ase mma ho wuranom, na honnni bɛ a bɛ yam yɛ na bɛ tim ɔmmrɛ nkoaa ni, na mmom honni bɛ a bɛ tim ɔdene nso ni.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Nipa a ɔsɔ Nyankopɔn ani ne dea ɔnam Nyankopɔn ho ahonim nti, ɔde awerɛhoɔ hu amane a nka ɔnsɛ sɛ ohu, na ne nyina mu he, ogyina pintinn.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Na sɛ hoyɔ bɔne na bɛhwe ho, na honya ho boasetɔ a, mmɛ mfasoɔ ne hobenya? Na mmom sɛ hoyɔ papa na hohu amane na honya ho boasetɔ a, Nyankopɔn behyira ho.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Na yei nti ne Nyankopɔn frɛɛ ho, efiri sɛ, Kristo he ankasa huu amanneɛ maa ho de saa nhwɛso he gya ho, sɛnea hobedi n’anammɔno akyi.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: Ɔno na wanyɛ bɔne, na bɛanhu nnaadaa biaa nso n’anum.

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Bedidii no atɛm he, wammua bɛ. Ohuu amane he, wampoopoo n’ani, na mmom ɔde n’asɛm hyɛɛ deɛ obu atɛntenenee he nsa.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Kristo he ankasa soaa yɛ bɔne ya ne honam mu kɔɔ asennua he so sɛnea yebewu ama bɔne, na yɛatena ase tenenee mu. Ne mmaa ntampeɛ mu ne hoanya ayaresa.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Na hote sɛ nwane a bɛayera nso afei deɛ, hoasane abedi ho kra Hwɛfoɔ ne Wɛmfoɔ he akyi.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Saa nso ne ho, ayerenom, ɔsɛ sɛ hobrɛ ho ho ase ma ho kununom sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a sɛ bɛ mu bi nnye asɛm he nni a, ho subane pa he bɛtwetwe no ama no agye asɛm he adi,

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: sɛ bebehu bɛbɛhwɛ ho abrabɔ a hoobɔ no tenenee ne nyamesuro mu he.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Hommma ho ahoɔfɛ nyɛ nnipa ani so deɛ te sɛ ti a hoayɔ no kyɛnkyerɛnn, anaa sika kaawa a hohyɛ anaa ntoma papa a hofira,

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: na mmom homma ɔnyɛ akoma a hode dwoɔ ne honhom a ɔyɛ dinn asiesie no. Ɔno ne sɔ Nyankopɔn ani.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Saa kwane yi so ne mmaa agyidifoɔ a bɛtenaa ase tete he a na bɛwɔ anidasoɔ Nyankopɔn mu he nam brɛɛ bɛ ho ase maa bɛ kununom, de kyerɛɛ bɛ ahoɔfɛ.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Sara yɔɔ saa. Ɔyɔɔ setie maa Abraham, na ɔfrɛɛ no “Me wura.” Sɛ hoyɔ papa na hommma bibiaa mmɔ ho hu a, hedeɛ na seesei hoyɛ ne mmamaa.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Saa ne ho, kununom nso, ɔsɛ sɛ hodwene ho yerɛnom ho ya ho asetena mu. Homfa anidie mma bɛ, na honhu sɛ bɛyɛ mmerɛ kyɛne ho, na afei nso honhu sɛ bɛne ho yɛ adedifoɔ, na bibi ansi ho mpaebɔ kwane.

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: N’awieeɛ ne sɛ, ho nyinaa hontena ase asomdwie mu. Honnya tema mma ho ho ho ho. Honnodɔ ho ho ho ho, na honyɛ ahummɔborɔ, na hommrɛ ho ho ase.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Hommfa bɔne ntua bɔne so ka, na hommfa yea nso ntua yea so ka. Na mmom daa, honhyirahyira, efiri sɛ, ɔno ne bɛma ho anya nhyira.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Na deɛ ɔdɔ nkwa na ɔpɛ sɛ ohu nna pa he, ma no nyi ne kɛtrɛma mfiri bɔne mu, ne n’ano na anka nnaadaasɛm.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Ma no nkyiri bɔne na ɔnyɔ papa, ma no nhwehwɛ asomdwie na onni akyire.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Efiri sɛ Awurade ani ya bɛ a bɛtene so, na n’aso abie ama bɛ mpaebɔ, na bɛ a bɛyɔ bɔne deɛ, Awurade ani kyiri bɛ.

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Sɛ wobɔ tenenee ho mmɔdene a, hwane ne betumi aha ho?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Na sɛ tenenee nti hohu amane mpo a, hoyɛ nhyira. Honnsuro nnipa, na hommma hwee nnha ho.

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Na mmom homfa anidie mma Kristo sɛ Awurade na honsom no ho akoma. Honsiesie ho ho sɛ, berɛ biaa a bi bebisa gyidi a howɔ ya ho mu he ho asɛm he, hobɛkyerɛ no aseɛ

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: dwoɔ ne anidie kwane so. Honkura ahonim pa mu na bɛ a bɛka ho Kristo mu abrabɔ pa ho nsɛmmɔne he ani awu asɛm a bɛka tia ho he ho.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Na sɛ hohu amane papa ho na sɛ ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn pɛ sɛ ɔba saa a, ɔyɛ sene sɛ hohu amane ɔnam bɔne a hoayɔ nti.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Na Kristo nso huu bɔne ho amane prɛko; ɔno a ɔtene he wu maa abɔnefoɔ, na ɔde ho akɔ Nyankopɔn nkyɛne; ɔno na bekuu no honam mu nso, ɔnam Honhom he so sɔreeɛ,

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: na ɔkɔkaa Asɛmpa he kyerɛɛ ahonhom a bɛdeda afiase

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: a tete he bɛyɛɛ asoɔdenfoɔ, berɛ a Nyankopɔn abodwokyɛre twɛneeɛ, Noa nna a bɛɛyɔ adaka he mu. Yei mu ne akra kakraa bi a bɛyɛ nwɔtwe nyaa nkwa nsuo no mu.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Ɔno na afei ne nsɛso a ɔno ne asubɔ he, gye ho nso nkwa, a ɔnyɛ honam ho fi yi mu, na mmom ɔyɛ ahonim pa ho adebisa a Yesu Kristo wusɔreɛ nti yɛnam so yɛ Nyankopɔn deɛ.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Saa Yesu yi ne kɔɔ soro na ɔte Nyankopɔn nifa, na bɛde abɔfoɔ ne bɛ a tumidie ahyɛ n’ase.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Esiane sɛ Kristo huu amane ne honam mu nti, ho nso homfa adwene korɔ heaa bi mfa nhyɛ ho ho dene. Efiri sɛ, biaa a ohu amane honam mu he ne bɔne nni bibiaa yɔ.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Efiri seesei ɔɔkɔ he, ho nna a aka ya asaase so ha he, ɔsɛ sɛ Nyankopɔn ne di ho abrabɔ so, na mmom ɔnyɛ nipa akɔnnɔ.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Yɛ asetena berɛ a atwa mu he, yɛsɛe berɛ yɔɔ anyeaniefoɔ apɛdeɛ, sɛ yɛnantee ahohwie, akɔnnɔ, nsaboro, agobɔne, didimeeɛ ne abosonsom a bɛkyiri mu.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Seesei ɔyɛ anyeaniefoɔ he nwanwa sɛ ho ne bɛ mmɔ mu mmu ahuhubra bio, ɔno nti, bɛka ho ho nsɛmmɔne.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Nso bebebu bɛ ho nkonta akyerɛ Nyankopɔn a wasiesie ne ho bu ateasefoɔ ne awufoɔ atɛne he.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Saa nti ne bɛkaa Asɛmpa he kyerɛɛ awufoɔ, sɛdeɛ bebebu bɛ atɛne sɛ ateasefoɔ a bɛya honam mu, na bɛatena ase honhom mu sɛ Nyankopɔn.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Nnoɔma nyinaa awieeɛ abɛne. Saa nti homma ho adwene mu nna hɔ, na ho ani nna hɔ mma mpaeɛ.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Ne titire koraa he, honnodɔ ho ho yie, efiri sɛ, dɔ kata bɔne nyinaa so.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Honyɔ ahɔhoyɛ a anwiinwii biaa nni mu.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Honhom mu adom a biaa anya he, onnyina so mfa nsom afoforɔ sɛ Nyankopɔn adom ahodoɔ he ho fie ahwɛfoɔ pa.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Sɛ bi ɔɔka asɛm a ɔnka Nyankopɔn asɛm. Biaa a ɔsom he, mfa ahoɔdene a Nyankopɔn de ma no he nsom sɛnea bibiaa mu, bɛbɛfa Yesu Kristo so ahyɛ Nyankopɔn a animuonyam ne tumi wɔ no daadaa he animuonyam. Amen! Amaneɛ a Kristo nti Behu

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Anuanom, hommma amanehunu a hoohu he nyɛ ho nwowa te sɛ nea hontee ho asɛm da.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Na mmom, homma ho ani nnye sɛ ho ne Kristo oohu amane sɛnea ho ani bɛgye na ho adi ahurusie da a n’animuonyam bɛda adi he.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Nhyira nka ho sɛ Kristo dini nti bɛya ho, efiri sɛ animuonyam honhom a ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn honhom he ya ho so.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Nso ɔnsɛ sɛ ho mu biaa hu amane sɛ wudifoɔ anaa korɔmfoɔ anaa dwotwafoɔ anaa sɛmpɛfoɔ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Na sɛ hohu amane ya ho Kristosom ho a, hommma ho ani nwu na mmom, honna Nyankopɔn ase sɛ Kristo dini bata ho ho.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Na berɛ aduru sɛ bebu atɛne, na Nyankopɔn nkurofoɔ ne bebedi kane abu bɛ atɛne. Na sɛ befiti aseɛ ya yɛ so a, mmɛ kwane so ne ɔbɛfa akɔ bɛ a bɛnnye Asɛmpa a ofiri Nyankopɔn nkyɛne he nni he nkyɛne?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Na sɛ, “ɔdene sɛ bɛbɛgye nipa pa nkwa a, hedeɛ bɛ a bɛnnye asɛm he nni ne nnebɔnyɛfoɔ he deɛ, mmɛ ne bɛba bɛ so?”

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Saa nti, bɛ a behu amane sɛnea Nyankopɔn ahyehyɛ he, ɔsɛ sɛ bɛde bɛ ho ma Bɔadeɛ nɔkwafoɔ he na bɛkɔ so yɛ papa.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Me a meyɛ asafo panyini he, metu asafo he mu mpanyimfoɔ fo sɛ, meyɛ Kristo amanehunu he ho dansefoɔ nti n’animuonyam a ɔbɛba he bɛka me.

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: Honyɛne nnwankuo a Nyankopɔn de bɛ ahyɛ ho nsa he, na honnyɔ no nhyɛ so, na mmom honyɔ no dɔ mu, sɛdeɛ Nyankopɔn pɛ; ɔnyɛ adufudepɛ nti, na mmom akoma pa mu.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Honnhyɛ bɛ a bɛde bɛ ahyɛ ho nsa he so, na mmom honyɛ nhwɛso pa mma nnwankuo he.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Na sɛ Dwanhwɛfoɔ panyini he ba a, bɛbɛma ho animuonyam ahenkyɛ a ɔnnsɛe da.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Saa ne ɔsɛ sɛ mmabunu, hobrɛ ho ho ase ma mpanyimfoɔ. Ho nyinaa mfa ahobrɛaseɛ nkatanim mmɔ ho asene na honsom ho ho ho ho efiri sɛ, “Nyankopɔn si ahantanfoɔ kwane na ɔdom ahobrɛaseɛfoɔ.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Nti hommrɛ ho ho ase nhyɛ Nyankopɔn nsa a tumi ya mu he ase sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a ɔbɛma ho so berɛ a ɔsɛ mu.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Homfa ho dadwene ne ho haw nyinaa nto ne so, efiri sɛ, ɔdwene ho ho. Honsi sɔhwɛfoɔ he kwane

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Homma ho ani nna hɔ, na honwɛne, efiri sɛ, ho tamfoɔ bronsam he nam sɛ gyata a ɔɔbobom hwehwɛ nea obenya no amene.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Homfa gyidie nnyina hɔ pintinn nsi no kwane efiri sɛ, honim sɛ amanehunu korɔ heaa ne bɛde ato ho nuanom agyidifoɔ a bɛya wiase afanaa nyinaa so sɛ otwa sɛ behu.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Na adom nyinaa Nyankopɔn a wafrɛ ho aba ne daa animuonyam he mu Kristo mu he, ɔnoaa ne sɛ ho hu amane kakra, obesiesie ho pɛ; ɔbɛma ho ase atim. Ɔbɛhyɛ ho dene; ɔbɛma ho anya nnyinasoɔ.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ɔno ne tumi yɛ no deɛ daa daa. Amen. Nkradie ne nkyea

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Me nua gyidini Silwano ne boaa me ma metwerɛɛ saa krataa tiaa yi. Mepɛ sɛ mehyɛ ho nkurane na medi adanseɛ sɛ, yei yɛ Nyankopɔn adom trodoo. Honnyina mu pintinn.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Asafo a Nyankopɔn ayi no Babel he ne me ba Marko kyea ho.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Homfa dɔ nkyeakyea ho ho ho ho Kristo mu. Asomdwie nka ho a hoya Kristo mu he nyinaa.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Simon Petro, Yesu Kristo akoa a ɔsane yɛ ne somafoɔ twerɛ krataa yi de kɔma bɛ a esiane yɛ Nyankopɔn ne yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo tenenee nti, bɛanya gyidie a ɔte sɛ yɛ deɛ heaa.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Adom ne asomdwie nnɔɔso mma ho, Nyankopɔn ne yɛ Awurade Yesu ho nimdeɛ mu. Kristoni frɛ ne ne yie he

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Na Nyankopɔn nam ne tumi so akyɛ yɛ nnoɔma a ɔfa nkwa ne nyamesom-pa ho nyinaa, nea ɔnam ɔno ankasa ne ho nimdeɛ so afrɛ yɛ aba ɔnoaa n’animuonyam ne ne mmaninyɛ mu.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Yeinom so ne ɔnam ama ne bɔhyɛ akɛseɛakɛseɛ a ɔsombo he aba mu ama yɛ, na honam yeinom so adwane akɔnnɔ mu porɔeɛ a ɔya wiase; na hoanya Nyankopɔn su he bi.

english_verse: Do your best to improve your faith by adding goodness, understanding,
translation_verse: Ne saa nti, hommɔ mmɔdene mfa nneyɔeɛ a ho te nka ho gyidie ho; na homfa nimdeɛ nka nneyɔeɛ pa ho;

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Na sɛ yeinom ya ho mu na ɔdɔɔso a, ɔmmma honyɛ mmerɛ anaa nnipa a bɛnso aba yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo fam.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Na deɛ onni yeinom he, ɔte sɛ nifirani a ontumi nhu adeɛ a ne werɛ afiri sɛ bɛahohoro ne bɔne dadaa he.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Nti me nuanom, homfa mmɔdemmɔ nsi frɛ a bɛafrɛ ho ne yi a bɛayi ho he pi; na sɛ hoyɔ saa a, honnsonti da.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Sɛ hofa saa kwane yi so a, hobenya akwannya kɛseɛ paa a hode bɛkɔ yɛ Awurade ne yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo ahennie a otim hɔ daa he mu.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Ne saa nti, daa mekaekae ho saa asɛm yi a honim na atim nɔkorɛ a hoagye adi he mu he.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Nso megye di sɛ, ohia sɛ mmerɛ tentene a mete ase yi, mebɔ ho nkaeɛ kanyane ho saa asɛm yi ho.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: Menim sɛ ɔnnkyɛre biaa na matoa nananom nseɛdo sɛnea yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo daa no adi kyerɛɛ me he.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Nso mɛbɔ mmɔdene na me wuo akyi he, hoatumi akae yeinom da biaa. Kristo animuonyam hyerɛn ho adansedie

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ anansesɛm a bɛanwene ne yɛto kyerɛɛ ho berɛ a yɛkaa yɛ Awurade Yesu Kristo tumi ne ne ba he ho asɛm kyerɛɛ ho he, na mmom yɛde yɛ ani kann huiɛ n’animuonyam, na ɔno ho ne yedii adanseɛ kyerɛɛ ho.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Na berɛ a onyaa anidie ne animuonyam firi Agya Nyankopɔn hɔ na nne bi firi animuonyam kɛseɛ mu kaa sɛ, “Yei ne me dɔ Ba a ɔsɔ m’ani he,”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: yɛ ankasa yɛtee nne he sɛ ofiri soro ɔɔba berɛ a na yɛne no ya bepɔ kronkron he so he.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Yei ahyɛ adiyifoɔ ne nkɔmhyɛsɛm he mu dene ama yɛ. Ɔsɛ sɛ hotie no yie, efiri sɛ, ɔte sɛ kanea a ɔhyerɛn sum mu kosi sɛ adeɛ bɛkye ama anɔpa nsoromma ahyerɛn ho akoma mu.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Na deɛ odi kane koraa he, honhu sɛ adiyisɛm biaa nni hɔ a nipa dasani betumi de ɔnoaa n’adwene akyerɛ aseɛ,

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: efiri sɛ adiyisɛm biaa nni hɔ a ofiri nipa nyansa mu ne baeɛ, na mmom Honhom Kronkron he ne nam nnipa he so kaa asɛm a ofiri Nyankopɔn nkyɛne.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Nso, atorɔ adiyifoɔ sɔree bɛ mu, sɛdeɛ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ atorɔfoɔ bɛsɔre ho nso ho mu, awiawia bɛ ho abɛkyerɛ nkyerɛkyerɛ bɔne a nɔkorɛ nni mu, na bɛapo owura he a ɔgyee bɛ he sɛ bɛ Awurade, na ɔnam so ama sɛeɛ aba bɛ so prɛko pɛ he.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Nnipa bebree bɛfa akohwibra so; na esiane nea bɛyɔ he nti, nnipa bɛkasa atia nɔkorɛ kwane he.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Saa atorɔ adiyifoɔ yi nam bɛ adufudepɛ so bɛka nnaadaasɛm akyerɛ ho de apɛ ho ho mfasoɔ. Na bɛ deɛ bɛ atemmuo a ɔya hɔ firi teteete he ntwentwɛne ase, saa nso ne bɛ sɛefoɔ he nso gyina bɛ aboboa ano pɛɛ.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Nyankopɔn amfa abɔfoɔ a bɛyɔɔ bɔne he ho ankyɛ bɛ. Ɔtoo beguu Asamando amanehunu bunu mu, guu bɛ nkɔnsɔnkɔnsɔn, na hɔ ne bɛɛtwɛne atemmuo da he.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Na sɛ Nyankopɔn amma kane wiase he amfa ne ho anni, na mmom Noa a ɔyɛ tenenee sɛnkafoɔ ne nnipa nson a bɛka ne ho ne ɔgyee bɛ, na ɔde nsuhyiri bɛkataa amumuyɔfoɔ wiase he so;

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: na afei nso, sɛ ɔhyee Sodom ne Gomora nkuro ma no danee nsõ, na ɔde sɛeɛ buu bɛ fɔ hyee bɛ ase de bɛ yɔɔ nhwɛsoɔ maa bɛ a akyire yi bɛbɛyɛ amumuyɔdeɛ,

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: hedeɛ na Awurade nim kwane a ɔbɛfa so agye n’akyidifoɔ afiri haw mu, na wama bɛatwe bɛ a bɛntene aso de akosi atemmuo da he,

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: ne titire he, bɛ a bedi bɛ honam akɔnnɔ akyi na bebu Nyankopɔn tumi he animtia. Saa atorɔ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ yi yɛ aniɔdenfoɔ ne ahopɛfoɔ, bensuro sɛ bɛbɛkasa atia animuonyamfoɔ henom.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Na abɔfoɔ a bɛwɔ ahoɔdene ne tumi sene saa atorɔ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ yi mpo nka nsɛmmɔne mmu bɛ atɛne Awurade anim.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Na yeinom deɛ, bɛte sɛ mmoa a benni adwene a bɛ su ne sɛ bɛawo bɛ sɛ bɛnkye bɛ nsɛe bɛ. Bɛka deɛ bennim ho nsɛmmɔne, bɛbɛfa bɛaa bɛ sɛeɛ kwane so akɔ sɛeɛ mu,

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: na bebenya bɛ nnebɔne so akatua. Nea bebu no anigyeɛ ne daa akohwie asetena, bɛyɛ nkekaeɛ ne dɛm, na nea bɛ ani gye hoaa ne sɛ bɛde atorɔ nkyerɛkyerɛ bɛdaada ho berɛ a bɛ ne ho bom didi he.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Bɛwɔ ani a awaresɛeɛ ahyɛ no ma a ontumi nkwati bɔne. Bɛdaadaa nnipa a bɛyɛ mmerɛ kɔ bɔne mu. Bɛwɔ akoma a anibereɛ ahyɛ no ma. Bɛyɛ nnomee mma.

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Bɛamane afiri kwane pa he so nti bɛayera. Bɛafa kwane a Beor ba Bileam a ɔpɛ ne mfasoɔ kwammɔne so,

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: na bɛkaa n’anim ne bɔne he ho. N’afunumu de nipa nne kasaeɛ de sii diyifoɔ he abɔdamsɛm he ho kwane.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Yeinom yɛ mmura a nsuo nni mu, bosuo a mframa bɔ huu de kɔ, bɛne bɛde sum kabii asie bɛ.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Na bɛkeka akokurokosɛm a mfasoɔ biaa nni so, na bɛnam honam akɔnnɔ ne ahohwie so to bɛ a afei ne bɛatete bɛ ho afiri nnebɔnyɛfoɔ ho he mmradɛ.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Atorɔ akyerɛkyerɛfoɔ he hyɛ bɛ bɔ sɛ bɛbɛma bɛ ahofadie, nso bɛ ankasa deɛ bɛyɛ porɔeɛ nkoa efiri sɛ nipa biaa yɛ akoa ma bibiaa a odi ne so.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Na sɛ nipa sua yɛ Awurade ne yɛ Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo ho nsɛm, na ɔnam so dwane firi wiase yi mu akwammɔne so, na akyire yi ɔkɔ bɔne mu bio ma ɔdane bɔne akoa a, hedeɛ na tebea a ɔyam seesei he aseɛ koraa sene kane deɛ he.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Sɛ saa nipa he nnim Kristo koraa a, nka ɔyɛ ma no sene sɛ obesua ne ho nsɛm na afei ɔbɛdane bɛ akyi akyerɛ mmara kronkron a ɔde maa no he.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Nea ɔbaa bɛ so he kyerɛ sɛ, saa bɛ yi yɛ nɔkorɛ: Kramane sane kɔ ne feɛ ho bio, na “prako a bɛadware no he nso kɔyantam ne ho atɛkyɛ mu.”

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: na hoakae nsɛm a adiyifoɔ kronkron he kaeɛ mmerɛ bi a atwam he ne mmara a efiri Awurade ne Agyenkwa a bɛde faa ho asomafoɔ so maa ho he.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Nea odi kane he, ɔsɛ sɛ hote aseɛ sɛ, nna a odi akyire he mu he, afedifoɔ a bedi bɛaa bɛ honam akɔnnɔ akyi de fɛwdie bɛba,

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: abɛka sɛ, “Ɔhyɛɛ ho bɔ sɛ ɔbɛba. Wanka saa? Na afei ɔya he? Yɛ nananom awuwu dadaada, nso bibiaa te sɛ nea ɔte firii adebɔ mfitiaseɛ!”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Bɛboapa bu bɛ ani gu nɔkorɛ he so, ɔne sɛ, ofiri tete na Nyankopɔn kasaeɛ na bɛbɔɔ soro ne asaase, bɛbɔɔ asaase firi nsuo mu na bɛde nsuo ne yɔeɛ

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: na bɛde nsuhyiri nso ne sɛee kane wiase he.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Nso soro ne asaase a ɔya hɔ seesei yi deɛ, bɛnam Nyankopɔn asɛm heaa so ɔɔkora ama gya asɛe no. Bɛɛkora ama da a bebebu nnebɔnyɛfoɔ atɛne na bɛasɛe bɛ he.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't forget that for the Lord one day is the same as
translation_verse: Na, adɔfonom, hommma ho ani mpa nɔkwasɛm yi so sɛ, Awurade ani so he, da koro te sɛ mfie apem, na mfie apem nso te sɛ da koro.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Awurade ntwentwɛne ne nane ase ne bɔ a wahyɛ ho sɛnea binom dwene he. Na nea ɔteɛ ne sɛ, ɔwɔ ho ho boasetɔ, efiri sɛ, ɔmpɛ sɛ biaa bɛyera, na mmom ɔpɛ sɛ biaa nya adwensakra.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Na Awurade da he bɛba mpofirem te sɛ korɔmfoɔ ɔɔba he. Saa da he, soro bɛbobom dendene na ayera, na wiem nnoɔma bɛhye na asɛe, na bɛapa asaase ne so nnwuma nyinaa nso ho ntoma.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Sɛ saa kwane yi so ne bɛbɛfa asɛe ade nyinaa deɛ a, hedeɛ abɛ nnipa ne ɔsɛ sɛ hoyɛ ya abrabɔ kronkron ne nyamesom pa mu,

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: berɛ a hootwɛne na hoopɛ sɛ Nyankopɔn da he ba ntɛm yi? Ɔno mu ne soro bɛsɔ gya asɛe, na wiem mfitiasedeɛ anane ahye.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Nso sɛnea ne bɔhyɛ teɛ he, yɛɛtwɛne soro foforɔ ne asaase foforɔ a tenenee ahyɛ mu ma he. Afotuo a odi akyire ne awieeɛ

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Nti, adɔfonom, hogu so ɔɔtwɛne da he yi, hommɔ mmɔdene sɛ hobɛyɛ nnipa kronkron a mfomsoɔ biaa nni ho ho ya Nyankopɔn anim na ho ne no atena asomdwie mu.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Na honkae sɛ Awurade boasetɔ he kyerɛ nkwagyeɛ te sɛ nea yɛ nua Paulo nam nyansa a Nyankopɔn de maa no he so twerɛɛ ho he,

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: sɛdeɛ ɔfa so twerɛ ne nkrataa nyinaa he, na saa nsɛm yiaa so nso ne ogyina twerɛeɛ. Nsɛm bi a mu ɔdene ya ne nkrataa he mu a bɛ a bensuaa adeɛ na bɛ ase ntimiiɛ ntumi nkyerɛ aseɛ yie, sɛnea Twerɛsɛm a aka he nso bɛnkyerɛ aseɛ yie ma ɔde sɛeɛ bra bɛ he.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Nso, adɔfonom, ho deɛ honim yei dada. Honhwɛ ho ho so yie, na bɛ a benni mmara so annaadaa ho ama hoamfiri ho tim a hoatim he mu anhwe ase.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Na honyini ya yɛ Awurade ne Agyenkwa Yesu Kristo adom ne nimdeɛ mu. Ɔno ne animuonyam nka no seesei ne daa. Amen.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Nea na ɔya hɔ firi mfitiaseɛ, nea yɛate, nea yɛde yɛ ani ahu, nea yɛhwɛɛ no yie na yɛde yɛ nsa kaeɛ a ɔfa nkwa asɛm he ho he,

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: ampa, nkwa he daa ne ho adi kyerɛɛ yɛ, na yɛahu a yeedi ho adanseɛ, na yɛɛka daa nkwa a ɔya Agya he nkyɛne a bɛdaa no adi kyerɛɛ yɛ he ho asɛm akyerɛ ho,

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: nea yɛahu na yɛate he ne yɛɛka akyerɛ ho nso, sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a ho ne yɛ benya ayɔnkofa. Bio nso saa ayɔnkofa yi ya yɛne Agya he ne ne Ba Yesu Kristo ntam.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Yɛɛtwerɛ yei sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a yɛ anigyeɛ bewie pɛyɛ. Hann mu asetena ne bɔneka

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Afei, yei ne asɛm a yɛate afiri ne Ba he nkyɛne a yɛɛbɔ ho amanneɛ: Nyankopɔn yɛ hann a sum nni ne mu koraa.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Na sɛ afei yɛka sɛ yɛne no wɔ ayɔnkofa na saa berɛ koro heaa mu yɛnante sum mu a, na yeedi torɔ na yɛnnante nɔkorɛ he mu.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Na sɛ yɛnante hann he mu sɛnea ɔno nso nante mu he a, hedeɛ na yɛ ne yɛ ho yɛ ho wɔ ayɔnkofa, na ne Ba Yesu he mogyaa te yɛ ho firi bɔne nyinaa ho.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Sɛ yɛka sɛ yenni bɔne a, na yɛdaadaa yɛ ho, na nɔkorɛ he nni yɛ mu.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Na sɛ yɛka yɛ bɔne kyerɛ Nyankopɔn a, ɔyɛ nɔkwafoɔ ne teneneeni sɛ ɔde yɛ bɔne bɛkyɛ yɛ, na wate yɛ ho afiri nea ɔntene nyinaa ho.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Sɛ yɛka sɛ yɛnyɔɔ bɔne a, yɛma Nyankopɔn yɛ torɔfoɔ, na n’asɛm he nni yɛ mu.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Me mma nkumaa, meetwerɛ yei abra ho na aboa ho ama hoanyɔ bɔne; na sɛ bi yɔ bɔne a, yɛwɔ kamafoɔ bi ya Agya he nkyɛne, ɔno ne Yesu Kristo teneneeni he.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Na Kristo he ankasa ne yɛ yɛ bɔne ho mpatadeɛ, na ɔnyɛ yɛ bɔne nkoaa, na mmom wiase nyinaa bɔne nso.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Adeɛ paa a ɔkyerɛ sɛ yennim Nyankopɔn ne sɛ, yebedi ne mmara so.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi ka sɛ, “Menim no,” na nso onni ne mmara so a, saa nipa he yɛ torɔfoɔ a nɔkorɛ he nni ne mu.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Na biaa a odi Nyankopɔn asɛm so he, ɔno mu ne Nyankopɔn dɔ he awie pɛyɛ. Yei ne ma yenya ahotɔsoɔ sɛ yɛte ne mu.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Ɔsɛ sɛ biaa a ɔka sɛ ɔte ne mu he bɔ ne bra sɛ ɔnoaa pɛpɛɛpɛ. Mmara foforɔ

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Adɔfonom, mmara a meetwerɛ abra ho yi nyɛ asɛm foforɔ. Ɔyɛ mmara dadaa a hoate firi mfitiaseɛ heaa. Mmara dadaa he yɛ adeɛ a hoate ho asɛm dada.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Nso, kwane bi so he, mmara a meetwerɛ abra ho yi yɛ foforɔ, na mu nɔkorɛ he da adi ya Kristo mu. Sum he ootwam na hann trodoo he ahyɛ aseɛ ɔɔhyerɛn.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Biaa a ɔka sɛ ɔya hann he mu, nso ɔtane ne nua he da so ya sum mu.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Biaa a ɔdɔ ne nua he te hann mu, na bibiaa nni saa nipa he mu a ɔto bi sintidua.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Nso biaa a ɔtane ne nua he te sum mu. Na ɔnam sum mu a onnim baabi a ɔɔkɔ, efiri sɛ, sum he afira n’ani.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Mma nkumaa, meetwerɛ ho krataa yi, efiri sɛ, ne dini nti, bɛde ho bɔne akyɛ ho.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Agyanom, meetwerɛ abra ho, efiri sɛ, honim nea ɔte ase firi mfitiaseɛ he. Mmabunu, meetwerɛ abra ho, efiri sɛ, hoadi Bronsam so. Mmɔfra nkumaa, meetwerɛ abra ho, efiri sɛ, honim Agya he.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Agyanom, meetwerɛ abra ho, efiri sɛ, honim nea ɔte ase firi mfitiaseɛ he. Mmabunu, meetwerɛ abrɛ ho, efiri sɛ, howɔ nwentaasoɔ. Nyankopɔn asɛm he te ho mu na hoadi bɔnefoɔ he so nkunim. Wiase dɔ ne Nyankopɔn dɔ

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Honnnɔ wiase anaa bibiaa a ɔyɛ wiase deɛ. Biaa a ɔdɔ wiase he, Agya he dɔ nni ne mu.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Na bibiaa a ɔyɛ wiase su, te sɛ, honam akɔnnɔ, ani akɔnnɔ, ne asetena mu ahoahoa, mfiri Agya he, na mmom ofiri wiase.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Na wiase ne n’akɔnnɔ ootwam, nso nea ɔyɔ Nyankopɔn apɛdeɛ he tena hɔ daa. Nea ɔko tia Kristo

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Me mma nkumaa, awieeɛ he abɛne. Bɛka kyerɛɛ ho sɛ Kristo-kotiafoɔ he bɛba, nso seesei, nnipa bebree aba a bɛko tia Kristo. Yei nti yɛahu sɛ ampa awieeɛ he abɛne.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Nɔkwasɛm ne sɛ, befiri yɛ mu ne kɔeɛ deɛ, nso na benni yɛ afa, na sɛ bɛya yɛ afa a, nka bɛne yɛ tenaa hɔ. Nso begyaa yɛ hɔ sɛnea bebehu no pefee sɛ benni yɛ afa.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Na ho deɛ, hoanya ngosra firi Kronkronni he hɔ, nti ho nyinaa howɔ nimdeɛ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Ɔnyɛ sɛ honnim nɔkorɛ he nti ne meetwerɛ saa krataa yi, na mmom honim, na honim nso sɛ, torɔ biaa mfiri nɔkorɛ mu mma.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Afei, hwane ne torɔfoɔ he? Torɔfoɔ he ne nea ɔka sɛ Yesu nyɛ Kristo he. Ɔno ne Kristo-kotiafoɔ he. Saa nipa he ne nea ɔpo Agya he ne Ba he nyinaa.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Na nea ɔpo Ba he po Agya he nso; nea ɔgye Ba he, gye Agya he nso.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Homma asɛm a hote no mfitiaseɛ he ntena ho mu. Sɛ asɛm a hotee no mfitiaseɛ he tena ho mu a, ɔno ne hobɛtena Ba he ne Agya he mu.

english_verse: The Son has promised us eternal life.
translation_verse: Na yei ne wahyɛ yɛ ho bɔ he, nkwa a onni awieeɛ he.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Meetwerɛ ho afa bɛ a bɛpɛ sɛ bɛdaadaa ho he ho.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Na ho deɛ, ngosra a honyaa no ne nsa mu he te ho mu, nti onhia ho sɛ bi kyerɛkyerɛ ho; na mmom nea ngosra heaa kyerɛkyerɛ ho afa adeɛ nyinaa ho he, hontena deɛ wasra ho ngo he mu. Na nea wakyerɛkyerɛ ho he yɛ nɔkorɛ, na ɔnyɛ torɔ!

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Na afei, me mma nkumaa, hontena ne mu sɛnea ɔbɛyɛ a sɛ oyi ne ho adi a, yebenya akokoɔduro na yɛmfa aniwuo nkohinta da a ɔbɛba he. Nyankopɔn mma

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Sɛ honim sɛ ɔyɛ teneneeni a, honhu sɛ biaa a ɔyɔ ade tenenee he, Nyankopɔn ne awo no.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Honhwɛ dɔ mmorosoɔ a Agya he de adɔ yɛ, sɛ bɛmfrɛ yɛ Nyankopɔn mma. Na yɛyɛ ne mma nso. Deɛ nti a wiase nnim yɛ he ne sɛ onnim no.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Me nuanom, seesei yɛyɛ ne mma nso nea daakye yɛbɛyɛ he nya nnaa adi. Nso yenim sɛ, sɛ oyi ne ho adi a, yɛbɛyɛ te sɛ ɔno, efiri sɛ, yebehu no sɛnea ɔteɛ ankasa.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Na biaa a ɔwɔ saa anidasoɔ yi ne mu he te ne ho, sɛnea ɔno nso ho te he.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Biaa a ɔyɛ bɔne he to Nyankopɔn mmara, efiri sɛ, bɔne yɛ mmarato.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Honim sɛ ɔbaa sɛ oobeyi bɔne afiri hɔ, ɔno deɛ, bɔne biaa nni ne mu.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Nti nea ɔte ne mu he nkɔ so nyɔ bɔne. Na biaa a ɔkɔ so yɔ bɔne he nhuu no, na onnim no.

english_verse: Children, don't be fooled. Anyone who does right is good, just like Christ himself.
translation_verse: Hommma bi nnaadaa ho, mma nkumaa. Nea ɔyɔ nea ɔtene he yɛ teneneeni sɛnea ɔno nso yɛ teneneeni he.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Nea ɔkɔ so yɔ bɔne he yɛ Bronsam deɛ, efiri sɛ, Bronsam firi mfitiaseɛ pɛɛ ne yɔɔ bɔne. Yei nti ne Nyankopɔn Ba he baeɛ: Ɔbaa sɛ ɔɔbɛsɛe Bronsam nnwuma.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Biaa a ɔyɛ Nyankopɔn ba he ntena bɔne mu, efiri sɛ, Nyankopɔn su ya ne mu na ɔnam sɛ Nyankopɔn awo no nti, ontumi ntena bɔne mu.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Nsosonoeɛ a ɔda Nyankopɔn mma ne Bronsam mma ntam ne sɛ, biaa a ɔnyɔ deɛ ɔtene anaa ɔnnɔ ne nua he mfiri Nyankopɔn. Honnodɔ ho ho ho ho

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Na yei ne nsɛm a hoate firi mfitiaseɛ, sɛ honnodɔ ho ho ho ho.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Ɔnsɛ sɛ yɛyɔ sɛ Kain a na ɔyɛ Bronsam deɛ nti, okuu ɔno ankasa ne nua. Na ɛɛne nti ne Kain kuu no? Ɔyɔɔ saa efiri sɛ, ɔnoaa ne nnwuma a ɔyɔeɛ he, na ɔyɛ bɔne. Nso ne nua he deɛ, ɔyɔɔ deɛ ɔtene.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Nti anuanom, sɛ wiasefoɔ tane ho a, hommma ɔnnyɛ ho nwanwa.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Yenim sɛ yɛatwam afiri wuo mu aba nkwa mu, efiri sɛ, yɛdɔ anuanom. Nea onni dɔ he te wuo mu.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nipa biaa a ɔtane ne nua he yɛ wudini, na honim nso sɛ wudini biaa nni daa nkwa ya ne mu.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Yei ne ma yehu sɛnea dɔ teɛ, sɛ ɔno de ne nkwa too hɔ maa yɛ. Ɔsɛ sɛ yɛ nso yɛde yɛ nkwa to hɔ ma yɛ nuanom.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Sɛ bi yɛ defoɔ na ohu sɛ ne nua hia bibi, na wanhu ne mmɔbɔ a, ɔbɛyɛ dɛ na watumi aka sɛ ɔdɔ Nyankopɔn n’akoma mu?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Me mma nkumaa, hommma yɛmmfa ano anaa kɛtrɛma kɛkɛ nnɔ, na mmom homma yɛdɔ nna adi nneyɔeɛ ne nɔkorɛ mu.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
